name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 1/5/2025
body:
The ‘Great Colorado Wolf Experiment’: Where we’ve been and how it’s going
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**January 5, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
This week, we’re highlighting one of the most contentious issues shaping Colorado’s landscape—both literally and politically—the **reintroduction of gray wolves** under Proposition 114. Thanks to an [insightful commentary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by contributing writer Lindy Browning, we have a detailed account of where we’ve been and where we’re headed in what she aptly calls the "Great Colorado Wolf Experiment."
As Lindy outlines, the challenges facing this initiative are immense. More than a year since the first wolves were released, the program has drawn criticism from ranchers, conservationists, and even everyday Coloradans. Ranchers and livestock growers have [faced significant losses](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) employees navigate backlash in their communities. Meanwhile, voters in Western Colorado feel overlooked by Front Range policies that seem detached from the realities of rural life.
The wolves themselves haven’t fared much better. Of the initial ten reintroduced, three have died (see this week's news about a [reward for info on one of the deaths](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)), and four were captured for preying on livestock. The remaining animals are being closely monitored, and the future of Colorado’s deer and elk populations, as well as hunting licenses, hangs in the balance.
Lindy’s reporting captures the frustration of many who see ballot-box biology as an ill-informed method for managing complex wildlife issues. She draws comparisons to the failed Proposition 127, which voters rejected in 2024, signaling growing skepticism toward top-down, ideologically driven environmental policies.
For more of Lindy’s in-depth reporting on this issue, including a deep dive into the environmental and political forces driving Colorado’s wolf policy, as well as other important reporting on the Western Slope, [click here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
As always, thank you for being part of the RMV community. Together, we’re shining a light on the issues that matter most to Colorado.
In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Top Stories of 2024: Elections, password leaks, Tren de Aragua, Trump visit and more](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) There’s one thing to say for 2024 in reflection — it wasn’t boring on the political front. Along the way there were a dozen candidates for one highly coveted seat in the U.S. House, a once in three-decades special selection committee, a Secretary of State failing to keep passwords secure, the trial of Tina Peters, members of the GOP’s central committee unable to agree on leadership, a visit to the state from Donald J. Trump, gang violence in Aurora, Republican gains and much more.
**[In tight vote for Speaker, Johnson could potentially sweep four GOP votes from Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A slight Republican margin in the U.S. House will make Speaker Mike Johnson’s re-election bid later this week potentially a must-see. Republicans hold a 220-215 seat advantage in the U.S. House, but one Republican has resigned, and two other Republicans have indicated their opposition to Johnson.

**[David Weiss, the terminated Jeffco chief of schools, found dead in Maryland](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Two weeks after ex-Jefferson County Chief of Schools David Weiss was terminated, he is believed to have committed suicide, Fox 31 News is reporting.
|
---
**STATE**
**[‘This isn’t a goodbye,’ Rep. Boebert says in parting thoughts to 3rd District](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a parting message to Colorado’s 3rd District Friday, U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert discussed relationships, accomplishments and a hopeful future.

**[Freshman state Rep. Larry Don Suckla brings grit and vision of rancher to legislature](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Meet Larry Don Suckla, the cowboy legislator from Colorado’s vast District 58, who’s set to shake up the Golden Dome with his down-to-Earth wisdom and dash of rural humor.

**[Marc Catlin drawing on youth football, rafting and Bigfoot for inspiration as he ‘graduates’ to Senate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In preparation of his move to Colorado’s upper chamber for the 75th legislative session, Marc Catlin has reflected upon a time in which he coached youth football.
**[AG Weiser first in the Democratic field for governor: ‘I’m committed to fighting for the people of Colorado’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Attorney General Phil Weiser didn’t waste any time in 2025 making his future intentions known. He was the first to declare a run in the Democratic field for governor. He announced the decision Thursday, Jan. 2, in a Twitter/X post on his personal account.
**[Senate District 30 committee picks John Carson to serve Douglas County in 75th Legislature](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) John Carson, an attorney and U.S. Marine Corps veteran who previously served as a Colorado regent, was elected Saturday through a vacancy committee to serve in the 75th Colorado Legislature in Senate District 30, representing Douglas County.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[After two Republicans flip their support, Mike Johnson elected as U.S. House Speaker](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) After a short period of consternation, Republican Mike Johnson has been elected as Speaker of the U.S. House for the 119th Congress.

**[In 2024 election, more voters identified as Republican, flipping a trend dating to FDR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[NEWSMAX](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The 2024 election featured far more Republicans than Democrats in the electorate, reversing a longtime trend in party identification dating back to the New Deal in the 1930s.

**[Surgeon general calls for cancer warning labels on alcohol](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Alcohol should come with a warning label indicating it is a leading cause of preventable cancer, Surgeon General Vivek Murthy said in a new report Friday.

**[Army releases details on Colorado Springs man who died in Las Vegas Cybertruck explosion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [KKTV-TV CBS 11](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The U.S. Army released more details Thursday on the man who Las Vegas police say died in a Cybertruck explosion outside a Trump hotel Wednesday.
**[Trump ally America First Legal warns sanctuary cities of violating federal law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [NEWSMAX](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) America First Legal, a nonprofit with ties to President-elect Donald Trump, has sent letters cautioning sanctuary city mayors across the U.S. about the perils of violating federal immigration laws.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Denver airport’s Great Hall, at cost of $2.1 billion, remains at risk for overspending, audit says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Denver International Airport’s Great Hall renovation project may exceed $2 billion, and auditors are worried the city could face even higher costs due to potential overspending on future construction.

**[Neighbors, acquaintances of Matthew Livelsberger offer range of reactions after Cybertruck explosion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO SPRINGS GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A close friend of Matthew Livelsberger’s ex-wife said she was stunned when she woke up to the news Thursday morning that the career Army man she knew as “bizarre and unhealthy” was apparently the person involved in the Las Vegas explosion at a Trump hotel.

**[Upticks in Denver COVID, RSV, flu, norovirus cases brewing a post-holiday quadruple punch](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) It’s not unusual for health officials to see a rise in the standard trifecta of co-circulating winter viruses — influenza, RSV and COVID-19 — particularly as people return from extended holiday travel and gatherings.
**[What to know about the 2025 National Western Stock Show Kick-Off Parade](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Get your best cowboy attire ready, the National Western Stock Show Kick-Off Parade is a week from Thursday. On Thursday, Jan. 9, at noon, downtown Denver will be flooded with boots, chaps, cowboy hats and cattle to usher in the 119-year-old Colorado tradition.
**[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Lundberg: Get ready, there will be more laws for Colorado citizens in 2025](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _With the start of 2025, several new laws and regulations become effective for the people of Colorado.__There will now be a requirement (SB24-065) that a driver of any age must use a hands-free system to make calls while driving. With the almost constant use of smartphones in everyday life, my guess is virtually everyone subject to these rules will be violating this law from time to time._ __
**[Gonzalez: In the 75th legislative session, lawmakers should focus on affordability](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _As prices for Coloradans continue to increase, the state legislature must step in to provide relief for the ones they serve._ _In recent years, what the legislature has done is add more unnecessary costs to everyday expenses from energy to groceries to housing._ __
**[Letter: Threats and intimidation have been used to gain influence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The attack in New Orleans, killing and injuring many, was the plot by a terrorist, motivated by one’s hate and disbelief in this country’s freedom._ __
**[Sloan: Is Trudeau, who has presided over disaster, exiting stage left?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _This made the rounds a couple weeks ago: President-elect Trump, fresh off of announcing his intention to impose a 25% tariff on Candidian goods, reportedly floated to Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau the idea of absorbing Canada into the Republic as the 51st state._
**[Gaines: The people doing ag in this state need to speak up for each other](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Whether you run cattle on the Western Slope of Colorado or you grow forage on the Plains, there are precious few people in Colorado in Production Ag, while there seems a never-ending list of advocates — paid, volunteer, and sometimes from out of state — who are speaking up in support of things that either have the potential to harm producers or that will most assuredly harm them._ __
__**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** __

|

name: Special Elections Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Virginia specials...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:

subject: Former January 6th Prisoner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans For West Virginia
body:
| | |

| | I refuse to let serving 90 days in federal prison stop me
---
| |
---
| | **Dear fellow patriot and Trump supporter,** **[Will you rush a DERRICK FOR SENATE contribution in the next 48 hours to help me win this critical election for Republicans?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fcf87308ab254dd2bbca0df4d6bad307&_e=y2RPOr0CZx6DO42L1wnlRzqoC85lCiL-GVxm0exzqFgge7DY1_cA4C412cP-nbI9zPEAfVBPp8bpQiK69wBNRTX-lneTTy1LoFzyYvD_NhzXWXR1xkWvoloo9BXiLj13LyVkKBtQ0ltDOIdYBxL6LoNgF0CgeHdNSbn6zH_IjIZgWBZulsOokiUGIB5bwppo5zcvwlmIqKyu9rhpivJduBwKFKSFukz2N5lq9x7KODj2NyGcZazKoa-tAvJmYtWc3ocYR5oXGFMo2oiqgyFuiUYf0WyrJ7qdzlx2wOJwkBkcs69IMvPUj8mK0D4ITaX5oFa_4exaW91sgaT6Y1hQ2uD4Kuzn7MU4iZHPct_wNBTBeZb1xBnNP0xiHcoHG4xfq-OoeGs0q7Jqi1xZxN-64L70jlxi0iHFMqcnZULNDV05P-JDbDaS_Jx0tCOv8-EX)** My name is Derrick Evans. When I was arrested and thrown in federal prison on January 6th, the weaponized justice system you hear about on TV became a harsh reality for me and my family. Now, like you, I'm not a hateful guy... I'm not looking to overthrow our government or lead some "insurrection"... I'm proud to be an American, and I refuse to let the time I served in prison stop me from being able to serve conservatives like you in the United States Senate. And I need your help to win my upcoming election battle. [Will you rush over your much-needed support?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fcf87308ab254dd2bbca0df4d6bad307&_e=y2RPOr0CZx6DO42L1wnlRzqoC85lCiL-GVxm0exzqFgge7DY1_cA4C412cP-nbI9zPEAfVBPp8bpQiK69wBNRTX-lneTTy1LoFzyYvD_NhzXWXR1xkWvoloo9BXiLj13LyVkKBtQ0ltDOIdYBxL6LoNgF0CgeHdNSbn6zH_IjIZgWBZulsOokiUGIB5bwppo5zcvwlmIqKyu9rhpivJduBwKFKSFukz2N5lq9x7KODj2NyGcZazKoa-tAvJmYtWc3ocYR5oXGFMo2oiqgyFuifAoa62S-sFM28c1TnXjA3o69QfuC8UWEDq7lLdHFaaczFiVTl6Nu5Ap6kinKWB0MN8VGFnvTOt5byDBjJkQNJFSOWHGTwJoJ03L9ie5D_QaVR7YO5s_cDWi0qrHlYLicJQZf_dd0qpDnTxaHb175LE2zQaLroCj7ScDbJAlDnJS) Born in Huntington and raised in Wayne County, I've been a proud West Virginian my entire life. I played college football. I went on to be a teacher and a coach. And shortly after I started a career in property management, I ran for public office. _Why?_ Because like you, I'm a pro-life conservative who's sick of seeing God's unborn children being killed, mutilated, and harvested... I'm sick of seeing obesity and opioids decimate our communities and ruin the lives of an entire generation of Americans - _perhaps your children or grandchildren..._ And I'm sick of seeing citizens like you and me lied to by our own government and told that we can never question their authority. Bottom line: a day of reckoning is long overdue in Washington. This is especially true in the Senate, which brings me to the next part... _Scorched earth._ That's the plan. Republicans like you and me cannot let our Senate leaders continue to shuck the American people. No more loaded omnibus spending bills. No more handouts for crony corporations and big donors. No more money for Ukraine. No more money for woke bureaucrats and weaponized agencies. No more business as usual in Washington. You can see it happening in real-time... Right now, the Senate is "debating" some massive spending bill that we all know was drafted by lobbyists and lawyers behind closed doors. They're "debating" whether to confirm President Trump's nominations, or if the American people will let them get away with installing their Swamp buddies instead. And they're "debating" how much money should go to the war machine in Ukraine, instead of using those tax dollars to build the wall, bring manufacturing jobs back to America, and invest in safer streets and stronger families. Now, Republicans like you and me have some real fighters in the House... But only with the support of conservatives like you can I win my election and usher in a new era of Senate leadership that'll fight for you. **[**Will you rush a DERRICK FOR SENATE contribution in the next 48 hours to help me win my upcoming election battle?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fcf87308ab254dd2bbca0df4d6bad307&_e=y2RPOr0CZx6DO42L1wnlRzqoC85lCiL-GVxm0exzqFgge7DY1_cA4C412cP-nbI9zPEAfVBPp8bpQiK69wBNRTX-lneTTy1LoFzyYvD_NhzXWXR1xkWvoloo9BXiLj13LyVkKBtQ0ltDOIdYBxL6LoNgF0CgeHdNSbn6zH_IjIZgWBZulsOokiUGIB5bwppo5zcvwlmIqKyu9rhpivJduBwKFKSFukz2N5lq9x7KODj2NyGcZazKoa-tAvJmYtWc3ocYR5oXGFMo2oiqgyFuiZbeWU0m_FEA3Fs8v4p-xx7XYqIbUOt_X6gtn2DJ0DE0WY2f09VtWniWLmA-FWJFzyBPDM0faLlZXd8GY2F7Y0WlNSk-eu_GBDdW07A1WZf0ws5VyH25NYQleMSiOvr1lJwu63zdiPVK1m8RLhI_ieXbaoibpw7L4i1gi222KK8a)**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fcf87308ab254dd2bbca0df4d6bad307&_e=y2RPOr0CZx6DO42L1wnlRzqoC85lCiL-GVxm0exzqFgge7DY1_cA4C412cP-nbI9zPEAfVBPp8bpQiK69wBNRTX-lneTTy1LoFzyYvD_NhzXWXR1xkWvoloo9BXiLj13LyVkKBtQ0ltDOIdYBxL6LoNgF0CgeHdNSbn6zH_IjIZgWBZulsOokiUGIB5bwppo5zcvwlmIqKyu9rhpivJduBwKFKSFukz2N5lq9x7KODj2NyGcZazKoa-tAvJmYtWc3ocYR5oXGFMo2oiqgyFuiR2fm2nvHe_5Lq0jDYIOdHDlIqZl45qezlOMRftP21fgW4oRgPM0aOvFI45GT6Exv97LqpzofdD4zvlhfkplWRmZGRMXYvU-MWGNIAufpL5njbE1fp8GNJ7XhYGmtLd7u4LdQuUY6xSUPKUyIiX2CF50QaGhMFR8e2prPBfmU2d9)
---
Thank you,
---

TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for standing up against the MAGA Justices on the Supreme Court!_**

First, Justice Clarence Thomas was EXPOSED for accepting luxury vacations and bribes from GOP mega-donors. Then, he and fellow far-right Justice Samuel Alito REFUSED to recuse themselves from January 6th cases despite their EXTREME bias. **But now, you’re taking a stand to FINALLY hold the Supreme Court accountable for their blatant misconduct!**

[**I know Republicans are already plotting their revenge against you, so today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my support for this bill and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85791?t=9&akid=18351%2E878179%2E8FWbTS) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85791?t=10&akid=18351%2E878179%2E8FWbTS)

-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18351%2E878179%2E8FWbTS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18351%2E878179%2E8FWbTS).**

These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

[] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard. name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: This time is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
Eleni Kounalakis for Governor Logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62802/images/ekg-logomark-min.png]

Hello and Happy New Year, Peter!

Like many of you, I spent the holidays resting and regrouping. I cherished time with my husband and sons, friends and family, and thought a lot about how to approach the year ahead. So, as 2025 gets going and my campaign for Governor of California shifts into high gear, I wanted to share some thoughts. Here goes:

Eight years ago, when Trump won the first time, I could barely get out of bed - and when I did, I joined millions of others in marching, speaking out, and ultimately stepping forward to run for Lt. Governor of California.

This time is different. A close friend and fellow activist put it this way - “I don’t have four years of my life to spare being miserable.” So, how do we continue fighting for our values while staying hopeful and optimistic about the future? Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi said it first, and she said it best: DON’T AGONIZE, ORGANIZE.

This year, let’s keep reminding ourselves that we’ve been here before. Our country was strong enough to contend with the first Trump administration, and we can do it again.

At the same time, we must prepare for the many ways Trump’s policies will set us back on the issues we care about and, most importantly, the people he will target. We do not know exactly what he will do, but when he comes after women, children, the LGBT community, immigrants, efforts to combat climate change, and California’s economic strength, we will be ready to fight back.

With your support, we helped elect pro-choice Democrats to Congress in 2024. Now, as we begin the new year, we will build on that momentum, and I hope you will continue to stand by my side.

If you would like to help us start 2025 off strong, please contribute whatever you can afford to my campaign for Governor today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eleni-em-jan25/]

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eleni-em-jan25/]

There’s a lot of work ahead of us in 2025. I can’t wait to get started.

With love and wishing you a Happy New Year,

Eleni Kounalakis

Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
2443 Fillmore Street #300
San Francisco, CA 94115

This email was sent to .
Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vm1adzX1UkmdxnshGX5o5A2?unsubscribedata=ASyznwSXdNpceeqrrCNMAWQSj%2BCl9yCNFe3YPL4yCu2xB%2BIB5vmz%2BjvI9tSsr8cuVWjVNiiBYdsSaUGfpkdmg%2Btxa5skU7ZERlvwruBaPkLtn9QR3uPKDvZRUlq%2FaxEs1rklpzEIi7j7%2Fj%2FRKYfPDQmVAkwIxaoikkb91RvYcGtupGTalxRGO5RAuM3VJaSuhiLXLUDJTRcxoZ8TCLgLRStUU9yOvsm6UeFISj1prq1b09JPdVtOF3rE3s54TxNfZTrwIWL0mkO7QxVk4FjiDF4SlMzpkWZzDJWAILZwRyGjT9tv%2BGWfIddF53ziwi2JpGB3Y1vAGqSGLcvQc38Vao3BHPtV0jz9ROd7VvjN0Bwhcb3rOGm%2FCZVjpR6YkB9USM4K7ByLozo6H%2B%2FLYqbJBZQrVgf4BgIpNN%2Bpv0qIlCdc3sqqxoyo284BWIRcl8ha] to unsubscribe.

name: Derrick Evans
subject: Former January 6th Prisoner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans For West Virginia
body:
Dear fellow patriot and Trump supporter

| | |
---
| | I refuse to let serving 90 days in federal prison stop me
---
| |
---
| | **Dear fellow patriot and Trump supporter,****[Will you rush a DERRICK FOR SENATE contribution in the next 48 hours to help me win this critical election for Republicans?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zl3rbaj4q1gk5qnp0i0kuka1m9tedal3dsb7re3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chhm8oj2c9h2bs)** My name is Derrick Evans.When I was arrested and thrown in federal prison on January 6th, the weaponized justice system you hear about on TV became a harsh reality for me and my family.Now, like you, I’m not a hateful guy...I’m not looking to overthrow our government or lead some “insurrection”... I’m proud to be an American, and I refuse to let the time I served in prison stop me from being able to serve conservatives like you in the United States Senate.And I need your help to win my upcoming election battle. [Will you rush over your much-needed support?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8fbf9pkqu08su53l7j2r1a1q9tfqc3idq1fn49o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chhm8oj2c9h2bs) Born in Huntington and raised in Wayne County, I’ve been a proud West Virginian my entire life. I played college football. I went on to be a teacher and a coach. And shortly after I started a career in property management, I ran for public office. _Why?_ Because like you, I’m a pro-life conservative who’s sick of seeing God’s unborn children being killed, mutilated, and harvested... I’m sick of seeing obesity and opioids decimate our communities and ruin the lives of an entire generation of Americans – _perhaps your children or grandchildren..._ And I’m sick of seeing citizens like you and me lied to by our own government and told that we can never question their authority.Bottom line: a day of reckoning is long overdue in Washington.This is especially true in the Senate, which brings me to the next part..._Scorched earth._ That’s the plan.Republicans like you and me cannot let our Senate leaders continue to shuck the American people. No more loaded omnibus spending bills. No more handouts for crony corporations and big donors. No more money for Ukraine. No more money for woke bureaucrats and weaponized agencies. No more business as usual in Washington.You can see it happening in real-time... Right now, the Senate is “debating” some massive spending bill that we all know was drafted by lobbyists and lawyers behind closed doors.They’re “debating” whether to confirm President Trump’s nominations, or if the American people will let them get away with installing their Swamp buddies instead. And they’re “debating” how much money should go to the war machine in Ukraine, instead of using those tax dollars to build the wall, bring manufacturing jobs back to America, and invest in safer streets and stronger families.Now, Republicans like you and me have some real fighters in the House... But only with the support of conservatives like you can I win my election and usher in a new era of Senate leadership that’ll fight for you.**[**Will you rush a DERRICK FOR SENATE contribution in the next 48 hours to help me win my upcoming election battle?**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3tm3hle2ds1fr88cpbv68tloe7romu1qlhr6320_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chhm8oj2c9h2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7tb14tbeqkr55ternf945eauh3c06ntcm207vh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chhm8oj2c9h2bs)
---
Thank you,
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm97bacjoo0ap9mpul2qsvb0pj6tsq2v5g9od5f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chhm8oj2c9h2bs)
---
Derrick Evans For U.S. Senate
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Evans For West Virginia
---
PO Box 146 Prichard W.V. 25555
---

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3sfrg8el99j0so6g7ko3ife5giabvkhmvdlg7pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chhm8oj2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2e7ece2a-1338-4954-9ec3-e30e6e1f39c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Old building with US flag. Photo by Jon Rehg. Royalty paid on Shutterstock.
There is a writer whose work I really like. His name is Lucas Kunce. Last week on Facebook, I shared [his article about responses to the question about people voting against their own self-interests](https://substack.com/redirect/88839e5a-30d6-4e32-9dec-98d8acd399ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Lucas writes eloquently about politics in rural Missouri.
Lucas ran for U.S. Senate last year to defeat Republican Josh Hawley. Don't we all wish he would have been successful? Sadly, Lucas ended his campaign with roughly $54,000 in debt. His post election report indicates $220,109 in the bank with debts of $274,775.
In mid-December, Lucas Kunce [filed with the FEC](https://substack.com/redirect/677fd2fd-3644-4a3d-bc96-633dea2ad23e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to change his campaign committee into a hybrid political action committee (PAC).
I wrote about PACs on December 22, 2024, when I [asked if you had gotten an email from a candidate whom you did not know.](https://substack.com/redirect/9d9d3da5-e213-4bfb-ae7c-a6f6932821b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) I thought it was important to talk about political action campaigns (PACs). One reader wisely pointed out that I did not explain what a PAC was. Oops. Apologies for that oversight.
In the campaign leading up to the November 2024 election, NY-21 voters did not experience fundraising solicitations from PACs who were supporting candidates. I know. I was the Democratic candidate in NY-21. I did not use them.
Honestly, in the 2024 election, the PACs were busy fluttering around candidates in the NY coordinated campaign (Upstate candidates John Mannion and Josh Riley, for example). I spent several weeks grumbling about this, thinking that candidates raise buckets of money when PACs take them on. Maybe I was jealous. Maybe I was just desparate for any means by which to raise money, and on first blush, a PAC seemed like a good way to go.
I have new perspective. My new team (whom I really really like!) has schooled me in the basics of "splits" with PACs. In the case of Lucas Kunce's PAC, called, "Heartland Patriots", it would appear that the PAC is using a NY-21 candidate to fundraise to retire the debt from Kunce's Senate campaign.
Heartland Patriots is a hybrid PAC, which means they keep two separate bank accounts: one for direct, limited contributions that are funneled to a candidate, and another for indirect and unlimited contributions not associated with a campaign. This type of fundraising arrangement came about as a result of the Supreme Court ruling in [Citizens United](https://substack.com/redirect/1911714c-25c0-48ae-b8b4-5f1ed8256fc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and another case called [Carey v FEC.](https://substack.com/redirect/9c0c1a37-1940-46cb-a891-33754bab6011?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Citizens United case is what made it possible for Elon Musk to spend [$277 million on Trump's campaign](https://substack.com/redirect/d7764694-1a0e-4707-974e-ac3d46da4c3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to basically buy his way into access to and controlnof our government.
Here is the way that "splits" work: for every single donor dollar that gets sent in response to the email that purports to introduce or advocate for a candidate, the NY-21 candidate keeps 20 cents, and Heartland Patriots keeps 80 cents. In other words, the overwhelming majority of the money being raised from the email is getting sent out of NY-21 to address a debt situation for a candidate who ran last year in a different part of the country.
I will, at some point in my political career, likely use a PAC that does splits. They are a reality since campaign spending is intoxicatingly high after Citizens United. And, admittedly, they are a way to get your name out there, while raising at least 20 cents on the dollar.
(Sidebar: Really, the PAC I am hoping to use is [Rural Freedom Network (RFN)](https://substack.com/redirect/3ef0f173-becd-46ca-a58f-3e981c3adde8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They do not send money to a candidate, but instead do some amazing television, billboard, and print ads. To work with them, I need a committee to contact them on my behalf, since the rules will not allow them to work directly with a candidate.)
But all of that will come later. For now, nobody - not me, not the candidate who is having Heartland Patriots send out fundraising email for him, not any of the other people who have announced interest in being the Democratic nominee - nobody is actually "running" for Congress _**yet**_ in NY-21. For now, we have a race that is anticipated, but which has not been called.
Honestly, something about this Heartland Patriots thing just doesn't sit right with me. Maybe I'm still smarting from the PACs who worked with other upstate NY candidates during the General Election but not with me. Or maybe I'm just wanting some backup support. Either I or my team members work hard on every text and email that goes out. Maybe I wish some person or organization would do it for me.
I don't know. Just something...
Wait. I think I've got it. I forgot to mention that this is like the fourth email I have received from a PAC trying to fundraise off of this particular not officially-the-candidate guy. It feels weird to me to have so many of these emails go out from various PACs purporting to introduce and fundraise for this candidate. Plus, it feels like it is just too soon in the campaign cycle. For all we know, the Democratic committee leaders will skip over me and skip over the person who is sending fundraising emails for Heartland Patriots. I mean, 9 of us have expressed interest in running. It's possible that neither me nor the Heartland Patriots guy will get picked for the ballot. (So far. I think the Republicans are well into the double digits on number of hopeful nominees. Where were any of these people a year ago when we needed candidates?)
Here's the source of my queasiness. I am worried about donor fatigue once we actually have a race and a Democratic candidate. Will people then say no to donating because they already sent money to an 80-cents-on-the-dollar PAC? And if that happens, are we not right back where we were in the November 2024, with the NY-21 Democrat under-funded because available donor dollars were simply stretched too thin?
Most of us in NY-21 are not Musk-like gazillionaires. If you are like me, and you have to count every penny and really think long and hard about whose campaign you are going to support, you might not like the idea of 80 cents on your dollar being sent to pay off the debts of Josh Hawley's opponent.
If I have just described you, when you get an email from someone who says they are running for Congress in NY-21, be sure to scroll down to read the "Paid for by..." part before clicking to approve your ActBlue credentials.
For clarity, [my fundraising messages say, "Paid for by Paula Collins for Congress."](https://substack.com/redirect/0c0dc043-38f4-4ea5-b0d8-0a416f81a6ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown

**SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** **_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... clean_body: Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown SHOCKING REPORT: CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever. If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it. If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply. Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity. Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... NEW AND IMPROVED... But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while. In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. And YES there's a payment plan! Yes, right now, you can get your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems on a convenient, no-credit-check payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the peace of mind knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. | | **Dear fellow patriot and Trump supporter,****[Will you rush a DERRICK FOR SENATE contribution in the next 48 hours to help me win this critical election for Republicans?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=754646de79974ff0b01b5dee4db254b1&_e=mJMI42jBJJ917NqzjRUv8xHgsrkchnNT61iIvIv8B5-z2mlMKRhzGtkkzCnrpVYbOSWqwVMDkSLq0XQC8je62fF-ZOA6EZlRC9hHYXb6_gdCx7uS6rkuorxPp_EZDIV_gOddMfSD8oCbK-xEodU43bHs4mu3F5q3UqOF56bHeMkS-_nV1k-wc8Rxp5RH8KXXC0T66jAa21f9SYdJo3cxTkhOfd_SfppdgKbMdOc2-PEpX7fpGyioUco28HRHMDx22UaY7IOrhjm24pT9jNSQuImLopO__u0B5xnaDT1YmeSGUS7r24S_PnZjkBS3sirZVoO_OJIMn5go3f7Ek82t49MFg7Vpq8K1u99gChsk6QxYxXFMj5YxEG28sAl5LwZw)** My name is Derrick Evans.When I was arrested and thrown in federal prison on January 6th, the weaponized justice system you hear about on TV became a harsh reality for me and my family.Now, like you, I’m not a hateful guy...I’m not looking to overthrow our government or lead some “insurrection”... I’m proud to be an American, and I refuse to let the time I served in prison stop me from being able to serve conservatives like you in the United States Senate.And I need your help to win my upcoming election battle. [Will you rush over your much-needed support?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=754646de79974ff0b01b5dee4db254b1&_e=mJMI42jBJJ917NqzjRUv8xHgsrkchnNT61iIvIv8B5-z2mlMKRhzGtkkzCnrpVYbOSWqwVMDkSLq0XQC8je62fF-ZOA6EZlRC9hHYXb6_gdCx7uS6rkuorxPp_EZDIV_gOddMfSD8oCbK-xEodU43bHs4mu3F5q3UqOF56bHeMkS-_nV1k-wc8Rxp5RH8KXXC0T66jAa21f9SYdJo3cxTkhOfd_SfppdgKbMdOc2-PEKRHsF46P4q97PH8IddV1JnYf-U81ZpUKC8UzToEoCJlwrnCTCNCPzXHIeTdBNeHOQvgxXs2sfVh_5SL8krqXlCCLraEc2bAxSLMLvCfAWSaUeGpWLQjfJw0OWGDxYNEig_85_Uw-YwV586GtToSNM) Born in Huntington and raised in Wayne County, I’ve been a proud West Virginian my entire life. I played college football. I went on to be a teacher and a coach. And shortly after I started a career in property management, I ran for public office. _Why?_ Because like you, I’m a pro-life conservative who’s sick of seeing God’s unborn children being killed, mutilated, and harvested... I’m sick of seeing obesity and opioids decimate our communities and ruin the lives of an entire generation of Americans – _perhaps your children or grandchildren..._ And I’m sick of seeing citizens like you and me lied to by our own government and told that we can never question their authority.Bottom line: a day of reckoning is long overdue in Washington.This is especially true in the Senate, which brings me to the next part..._Scorched earth._ That’s the plan.Republicans like you and me cannot let our Senate leaders continue to shuck the American people. No more loaded omnibus spending bills. No more handouts for crony corporations and big donors. No more money for Ukraine. No more money for woke bureaucrats and weaponized agencies. No more business as usual in Washington.You can see it happening in real-time... Right now, the Senate is “debating” some massive spending bill that we all know was drafted by lobbyists and lawyers behind closed doors.They’re “debating” whether to confirm President Trump’s nominations, or if the American people will let them get away with installing their Swamp buddies instead. And they’re “debating” how much money should go to the war machine in Ukraine, instead of using those tax dollars to build the wall, bring manufacturing jobs back to America, and invest in safer streets and stronger families.Now, Republicans like you and me have some real fighters in the House... But only with the support of conservatives like you can I win my election and usher in a new era of Senate leadership that’ll fight for you.**[**Will you rush a DERRICK FOR SENATE contribution in the next 48 hours to help me win my upcoming election battle?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=754646de79974ff0b01b5dee4db254b1&_e=mJMI42jBJJ917NqzjRUv8xHgsrkchnNT61iIvIv8B5-z2mlMKRhzGtkkzCnrpVYbOSWqwVMDkSLq0XQC8je62fF-ZOA6EZlRC9hHYXb6_gdCx7uS6rkuorxPp_EZDIV_gOddMfSD8oCbK-xEodU43bHs4mu3F5q3UqOF56bHeMkS-_nV1k-wc8Rxp5RH8KXXC0T66jAa21f9SYdJo3cxTkhOfd_SfppdgKbMdOc2-PE5ibFCF4_yVRjW9mu3V6rrFxE2JDB7Glp26oH6lPvkXq10MpsUJx3V8l5ifLRkpJMgm5fVFORVBI47zLw5xEwKqZqArrGddjCwSkvdXmj3PvL8jPfV-YOFqTQG2-7rmzHQYkmozaZeBQ7IEFnSRKMP)**

name: Troy Downing
subject: Help me reach my first goal

body:
I need your help to hit the ground running.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._CZ7Nz7CIAgyhg)
---
Peter, it's Congressman Troy Downing.

As a freshman Congressman, I'll be facing a lot of pressure from The Establishment to conform to their way of doing things. _**But I didn't run for office to be a rubber stamp for the status quo**_.I ran to shake things up and fight for the conservative values and principles we hold dear, like bolstering national security, shutting down the border invasion, supporting our veterans, and ending government waste.

I'm eager to get to work for you and the rest of the America First Patriots around the country to execute this mandate, but I need your help to hit the ground running.

I've set an ambitious goal for my first month in office and need your support to reach it. **To be blunt, I need to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to tell The Establishment that we won't back down from this fight for America.**

[**Will you help me reach this critical goal by chipping in $25, $50, or more today? Every dollar counts, and with your support, we can show Washington that we are ready to take on the challenges ahead and defend the values that make this country great.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19623/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/a13fee89fd822c238aec07ce99e848d5921bf140) here at any time.

---
---
|
---
January 6th, 2025
---
|
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19623/6374453/722e2ddab93f7cb39d1ed79b0e77c9ae251b9a64/a13fee89fd822c238aec07ce99e848d5921bf140). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19623/6374453/722e2ddab93f7cb39d1ed79b0e77c9ae251b9a64/a13fee89fd822c238aec07ce99e848d5921bf140).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19623/6374453/722e2ddab93f7cb39d1ed79b0e77c9ae251b9a64/a13fee89fd822c238aec07ce99e848d5921bf140)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: 4 Years After January 6th...
body:
4 years later there is no "stop the steal," no election deniers, and no storming of the capitol.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vziu9-rrl9o0-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **4 Years After January 6th...**
---
|
---
| | | | folks, Four years ago today, the nation watched in horror as MAGA extremists attacked our Capitol, driven by lies, fear, and an unprecedented attempt to overturn a legitimate election. The events of Jan. 6, 2021, will forever stand as a reminder of what happens when democracy is undermined and replaced with chaos. Today, as Congress gathers to certify President-elect Donald Trump’s Electoral College victory, the scene couldn’t be more different. There are no objections from Democrats about the validity of the election and no calls to “Stop the Steal.” Republican trust in elections has, unsurprisingly, surged after their 2024 victory—an unmistakable display of confirmation bias. Democrats don’t need propaganda or violent mobs to stay in power—we have the truth, and we have you. Together, we’ve defended democracy against MAGA’s relentless attacks. But the fight isn’t over. We cannot mince words: MAGA doesn’t care about democracy. They care about greed, unchecked power, and bending the truth to fit their agenda. While Democrats work tirelessly to defend our institutions, protect voting rights, and uphold the rule of law, Donald Trump and his enablers have shown they’ll sacrifice everything—including the Constitution itself—for personal gain. [**_This is a battle for the soul of America, and we refuse to let Trump and his MAGA loyalists win. Stand with us—because democracy is worth fighting for. Together, we will protect what matters most._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vziu9-rrl9o1-kyd76rh7/)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: PETA Snaps at Border Patrol, Firefighters Rescue Dog, and a Chilly Poll Question
body:
The U.S. Border Patrol Union of the Rio Grande Valley is [pushing back](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8GOqwZ7BC5oHiNu7x2S2sw4wQJQwTEjv9-ldW2W17p6hzpfN3mG4UY0v0_bWzbe82zBn1RgArM7CnEcx6ktw78iJItXnuDpkfQ8mFxXHB1vXEe9HUdwY8O_LoYWhdEPV5ksB8YIBjEHgfsPLoBekb0fhzgwmIA9qHl0rUHN35TXeOZdy7dkjcZ7aO1ZxX9P6EnoafjOLqdYuRz4dQKxc9L6CnxUYWeYl4oqt_hcvFc1JNayVG9UshJVTqr2oPnrEJVKTdFKWwUFblXZaEnWax_HiHGUM1VDHDfKPxIZPuzzW71dwAAAP__idxouQ) against allegations that one of its agents abused a K-9 dog in a viral video captured by a Corpus Christi resident at the Falfurrias checkpoint on New Year's Day.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WHWAjBoYu3tK1o0W4Iz4J16lN4-Ttq1Rdu3_fT_p_nKdzkiqf1_e0cGyPsk4GTH8CPMEwUZL6nJymeAEKqDmitwMOFsHoOWafCZgoW4eeMydfgu1dcNzbgKZoiS8MEAZEiw47wosDy4hEwUHPygGTtHXr2syNH2kv9bneeevyuuga59Zuu7JvyozKjMdxdF_fqUqqUvg1UWb8O-gt0u2QWmUfvHJwXZLUX6X9m3WP5icAAP__Ep5PyA) | |
# Monday, January 6, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1882, [Sam Rayburn](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQgOGnMRvo7uxAGTx0YUvXjuioj2DV2JHthPD2Vbv3Bf5f3-d1vrIPPt4-eBdbX2uaCejSArbQz459OGfTOLuAG7ERi4PusdcI1GxWnCYeVy1am9Uw0kDMMJhBXK_N29h4-xsDhB5Ro8HO4WJAC6Jzo4GLKAPifE25q5tUeXFZw5mekruvtDfBbrXei9LviiZF03EcXS0bpxh8lC7lm6Jp4-iWlL4VTRJr9lIUTZnP5ZFjW3h_SGgrB8-r5JyabN398CH40g_KwG1nH_5m9V_909JPAAAA__9CyF3P) was born in Kingston, Tennessee. He represented much of Northeast Texas in the U.S. House from 1913 to 1961. Beginning in 1940, he served as Speaker of the House for all but four years until his death. We hope you're staying warm as the [polar vortex](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OrSAURp8GO8zegBgLitvYndtOaeCwVTIoBoh65ukn89NO_X1ZWVlvj-lhQwz78t9uZOo9p0mA6DggBz15G-JrUo03DvyADRnspUYtEUSzGke9njvVdbq3ODupLDo5KCDhn09A1wTzBQMEjShRYevRKZCE6P2goCOmgHyoKbd1pUq3LXN8pZNy-0xbE81a61GY_MfEyMR4XVfrbYy2JFco_96YGHe6ChPjz8Zr4qs9ic-Z6CPsC6-0HYXb3fMjlRJcJH6kaDM_U650853uyi-idy5QKYXd0GTjjyvEGIrumYJlsyF-O9U_I51GfAYAAP__Hz1rWw) descends on the state. Let us know what you've done to prepare (if anything) for this week's cold snap—and weigh in on what you think "cold" is in today's poll! Later today, we'll be sending you a special message featuring our sponsor, [GoldCo](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kcuunDAMhp8m7ILs3CiLLCpRdqdVpSN1iUJihqjhIgjDzNtXTLurxkvL3_9Z9q-P7sPFFOfbdzeRzY9h6QQIzQE5mC64mJ6dKoLtIdRYkMVKGjQSQRSjReN1b1xda636XqkKA6lBVChdwJ6GItorDBAMokSFZcBegSTEEGoFmpgCCjEvW5lHyvRw-5Cey5220i9TkeyY87oz-ZWJlon2PM_yJJfyuG5LJp_jMv-OmdPkYuK4XhATbZ8O4gZrIS9MtvvgY2CyqQB_jnDVD2w-iQmTdiYbAOTfXgmfI_H2r583FKJ3mQITxs9MNl-05qbWXNUCmDBHnrp9OTZPTDbvwGtoohCPicnm5fjX9G5aXbzN_29VbDasZ0wp7qZiCm4X9bpGfvueuxV_AgAA__9y4Y1-), and their strategies to help safeguard your savings. We hope you'll find their insights valuable and timely. Achieving your life goals—both in your career and beyond—requires sustained productivity. However, let’s be honest: the aging process often challenges our energy and productivity levels. That’s why we’re excited to introduce today’s sponsor, [Qualia Senolytic](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WHWAjBoYu3tK1o0W4Iz4J16lN4-Ttq1Rdu3_fT_p_nKdzkiqf1_e0cGyPsk4GTH8CPMEwUZL6nJymeAEKqDmitwMOFsHoOWafCZgoW4eeMydfgu1dcNzbgKZoiS8MEAZEiw47wosDy4hEwUHPygGTtHXr2syNH2kv9bneeevyuuga59Zuu7JvyozKjMdxdF_fqUqqUvg1UWb8O-gt0u2QWmUfvHJwXZLUX6X9m3WP5icAAP__Ep5PyA).
* * *
Abilene ⛅ 40/21° | Amarillo 🌥️ 44/15° | Austin ☀️ 49/29° | Brownsville ⛅ 66/46° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 57/36° | DFW ☀️ 40/22° | El Paso 🌤️ 60/34° | Houston ☀️ 46/28° | Laredo ⛅ 60/41° | Lubbock 🌥️ 45/17° | Midland ⛅ 45/22° | San Antonio ☀️ 53/33° | Tyler ☀️ 41/24° | Waco ☀️ 42/25°
|
---
## PETA Accuses Border Patrol of Animal Cruelty
The U.S. Border Patrol Union of the Rio Grande Valley is [pushing back](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8GOqwZ7BC5oHiNu7x2S2sw4wQJQwTEjv9-ldW2W17p6hzpfN3mG4UY0v0_bWzbe82zBn1RgArM7CnEcx6ktw78iJItXnuDpkfQ8mFxXHB1vXEe9HUdwY8O_LoYWhdEPV5ksB8YIBjEHgfsPLoBekb0fhzgwmIA9qHl0rUHN35TXeOZdy7dkjcZ7aO1ZxX9P6EnoafjOLqdYuRz4dQKxc9L6CnxUYWeYl4oqt_hcvFc1JNayVG9UshJVTqr2oPnrEJVKTdFKWwUFblXZaEnWax_HiHGUM1VDHDfKPxIZPuzzW71dwAAAP__idxouQ) against allegations that one of its agents abused a K-9 dog in a viral video captured by a Corpus Christi resident at the Falfurrias checkpoint on New Year’s Day. In the video, an agent is seen [hitting the K-9 several times](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO3CAQQL8Gd2MxA4vjgiKNu0ub0hpg7EXHLitM7Nu_jy596ic9Pb3fH-sH55Kf-y9-iO9fW11J0w00gnZr4lzeqx2SDzrNOIjHyTh0BjUNd5_Y4TaFOUoKLjg0gZ37YYIRuzmXpiH7b5lG7RANWhwTBquNIKY0W30TZbWk3Gsb-126fPGxlXc9pY2xPobi772_DmV-KloULdd1jZ85535-Y0ULt55jEUXLU65D0VJq5KJoOXPjAmdOUoFLkV0O-IQZOPw5BMIbQm1JGry4t1qAd3l2RctNG6C4OUIywLNBsFOIMFNA2IydYookKDw0n15XLiUfblJW7w_O5V9y_-_D09PfAAAA___AJnIw) with her knee. The alarmed witness, Jessica Pena, got out of her car to ask the agent to stop, but she was told to return to her vehicle. People for the Ethical Treatment of Animals (PETA) has called for an independent investigation into the incident and the removal of the dog from the handler’s custody. The agency [agreed to conduct an investigation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6jAQAL8m6Rztrk1CChevoeO1V0ab7CZYZzCKDYa_P3H99aMZzdd5OnOI4bb956v68lrTREAHA2ign4RDfE-uFT-DjNiqx8H22FsEai-eVhZiPo7DMC602MOiIyuSW2me15Hb4D8yQOgRLTrsBGcHVhFFRgcHbRyohJL2rly06IvzGt_pqXu3pGsb_aWUe27sv4ZODZ1qrd1Na66q3x-godMjmzntoru5c9lTNLzprRieH1nFSNoMARydhXb3cq8hxpD7oXGwXTnE30r5c_vp6ScAAP__CsRaiA). Meanwhile, the union stated the behavior in question was not abuse and that the agent was “utilizing proper corrective techniques as she was trained to do.”
## Texas Has 19 of the Nation's 20 Least-Insured Counties
According to a [study by SmartAsset](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7-OszAQBPCnsTtHXtv8K1x8DV2-9kq0sAtYMhDhTS55-xPXXz3Sb2a-7sMdU0778h83jvKej8FZVxkLxtYDYcqfIWiKo6UONEdofA21B-v0GqkJM41d6FpXoZ8dYBXI4Rja0JBvWp3ihVmwNYCHADeCMVjPAERdsBWrYJmSHOdNVhZ-Y5nz53jxeZuOTee4ijyK8v-U65Xry4anYCksV6xcTyhoijwpcVGuXxmzrCbt5XniPrGZLgoXNtcMfUZ6fKecU6kbFeyyYcq_PfLn8Vd0PwEAAP__NYRbCA), Texas has 19 of the 20 counties in the nation with the highest rates of uninsured individuals under age 65. While four counties along the border in South Texas top the list for the highest rates of uninsured residents--between 29% and 32%--over 23% of the under-65 population in the following counties don't have health insurance: Ector (Odessa), Potter (Amarillo), [Dallas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQBp_GdEa75i9XuEhDd2lTooVdwJKxT9gcR54-uvTpP30zmu_7cCfnXVi-aBObX3McDJhGA2poBybnr6Eu2I7ANyzEYle12FYIplgtwQhdMwlUczuOk2mkZh67ppPuQ2asCmffZ4DQIlZYY8k41lAJIvOthkZUDcIux73Mq2R5UZr9FZ-yl1PcCm_XnB9JVZ_K9Mr053mWvNFCPy7Ie6FMvwr5vE60ix6P5IKkpEz_xirTAyrTp3zwpZm8p6SneIR8adpiWHReRQfKLoakvVDK2oV07MLK9MVu-XE6711qO1XDspHzf1b530xPa34DAAD__8Pqa6Y), Harris, and El Paso. Bastrop County (Central TX), Nueces County (Corpus Christi), and several counties in East and Southeast Texas [also made the list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd2vtYpuEguJv3OVvr7SwWcfoCESGhOTtT4505dWj-Wb0fV2mi_XBx-t_e2NTXmuaJMoBkADV5KwP76lvnJnRaWrY0KlTpDpC2WxG6nmWw8rc0XLGVZ-YcFX67BQ7fVZD480BQ0JF1FFPraO5x46JnNM9Dix6ZOdL2tuyceGXzWt4pyfv7ZJuTTBbKfcsun9CjkKOtdb2-2XjEQo5Rq5ZyPFTE3IkDWkFifDIsKRHLJ4zVF82CKlyLrCxDWUDH_Njt3FhWI4le2UIabGFHfgIv7RmN-5efQg-q5Po8XqzPnxelT81PY38CQAA__9eNWuL). According to the study, the average annual premium for an individual was nearly $9,000 last year, while the premium for a family of four was an estimated $25,500.
## Slaton Harvey House Named State Historic Site
The Texas Historical Commission named a 1912 diner in Slaton as the [state’s 40th historic site](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfYzajO-OAGDx0YUvXjsjgIz7V4AhfQ_LvKzJ063LL6X16el_X8eo58Xb79Cs5eS55NGAuGlBDOwbP6TXaKrgJQo8VOeyaFtsGwVTRTcuE3cVa34dmCmh7P3dmboMBa3HpuordiQFCi9igxTrgZKEhxBB6CxdSFiiw5L2WSEJPX5b0yg_a6zmvVXJR5F5U86HMoMxwHEf9PU_hfCoznLYyA-B5GmWGN6AjF8k7zz7pOa8rl8J505tfqeiSvORNR78_6KVj_imkLUjURbzQX1QXFlJmqHYX7genxKXtlIXb6jm9q8m_Wz2c-Q0AAP__pMtr9w), capping an effort that began in 1989 to preserve it for future generations. Slaton’s Harvey House is [one of several establishments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8GNlt3gHE9MHTxlq4drbM5YiQcIqBx8vdVund_ek_v-7JcKKZ4u37Rwa49Q14UqKED7MAunmJ6LUZ6t4KfULLDUVu0GkHJ3fG0rUHT6MOw2ZFGFT7WMG0AKynmgWV0bxkgWESNBnuPqwHNiN5PBgYWBtjHlkvfdm78pBrSKz-49Fs-ZHJ7a_cq9KdQs1DzeZ594ivffM2BDi5xozco1LxTefCr23PjVLvCtdFPoVurQs2yOH8_Y0qx2lEYuB4U01-g_Xv8cOo3AAD___hQWro) that entrepreneur Fred Harvey built along the Santa Fe Railway routes between Chicago and San Francisco and from Galveston to Los Angeles, providing quality food to travelers in the sparsely populated frontier. The Harvey House was converted to a passenger and freight depot in 1942 and abandoned altogether in the 1980s. It was slated for demolition in 1989, but a group of local residents raised funds to [restore the building](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQQOGnsbugGf8hFy5uky633RINO0OwZOIIHAhvv8r22x990vm6DTfKJT_u_2mR1N5THQwYfwG8QBiYcjkHpzmNwBG1JOxtwGARjJ4Texmp59gLsfeRXAQxxkwcA4L3Vuf0wQAhIFp02DGODqwgMkcHXpQD4dzq2rVZmrxpm8pZd1m777rokubWnpuy_5S5KnM9jqPbCrX6mGnd5Zzra5NPqcyVxvpqek38PHIpeQu9cnBfKJdfqv35tifzEwAA__-Ow1Gg) and turn it into a museum with a bed and breakfast. “ _It’s huge for West Texas and for those of us who have toiled and labored for 30-plus years. It’s especially gratifying because it’s gonna guarantee that it will survive for generations_ ,” Slaton Railroad Heritage Association board member Tony Privett said.
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WHWAjBoYu3tK1o0W4Iz4J16lN4-Ttq1Rdu3_fT_p_nKdzkiqf1_e0cGyPsk4GTH8CPMEwUZL6nJymeAEKqDmitwMOFsHoOWafCZgoW4eeMydfgu1dcNzbgKZoiS8MEAZEiw47wosDy4hEwUHPygGTtHXr2syNH2kv9bneeevyuuga59Zuu7JvyozKjMdxdF_fqUqqUvg1UWb8O-gt0u2QWmUfvHJwXZLUX6X9m3WP5icAAP__Ep5PyA) As we age, our bodies accumulate “senescent” or “zombie” cells—old, worn-out cells that no longer serve a useful function but still consume space and nutrients from healthy cells. These cells contribute to aging symptoms, such as aches, slower workout recovery, and reduced mental and physical energy. clean_body: The U.S. Border Patrol Union of the Rio Grande Valley is against allegations that one of its agents abused a K-9 dog in a viral video captured by a Corpus Christi resident at the Falfurrias checkpoint on New Year's Day. | | | | | | Monday, January 6, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1882, was born in Kingston, Tennessee. He represented much of Northeast Texas in the U.S. House from 1913 to 1961. Beginning in 1940, he served as Speaker of the House for all but four years until his death. We hope you're staying warm as the descends on the state. Let us know what you've done to prepare (if anything) for this week's cold snap—and weigh in on what you think "cold" is in today's poll! Later today, we'll be sending you a special message featuring our sponsor, -, and their strategies to help safeguard your savings. We hope you'll find their insights valuable and timely. Achieving your life goals—both in your career and beyond—requires sustained productivity. However, let’s be honest: the aging process often challenges our energy and productivity levels. That’s why we’re excited to introduce today’s sponsor, . Abilene ⛅ 40/21° | Amarillo 🌥️ 44/15° | Austin ☀️ 49/29° | Brownsville ⛅ 66/46° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 57/36° | DFW ☀️ 40/22° | El Paso 🌤️ 60/34° | Houston ☀️ 46/28° | Laredo ⛅ 60/41° | Lubbock 🌥️ 45/17° | Midland ⛅ 45/22° | San Antonio ☀️ 53/33° | Tyler ☀️ 41/24° | Waco ☀️ 42/25° | PETA Accuses Border Patrol of Animal Cruelty The U.S. Border Patrol Union of the Rio Grande Valley is against allegations that one of its agents abused a K-9 dog in a viral video captured by a Corpus Christi resident at the Falfurrias checkpoint on New Year’s Day. In the video, an agent is seen with her knee. The alarmed witness, Jessica Pena, got out of her car to ask the agent to stop, but she was told to return to her vehicle. People for the Ethical Treatment of Animals (PETA) has called for an independent investigation into the incident and the removal of the dog from the handler’s custody. The agency . Meanwhile, the union stated the behavior in question was not abuse and that the agent was “utilizing proper corrective techniques as she was trained to do.” Texas Has 19 of the Nation's 20 Least-Insured Counties According to a , Texas has 19 of the 20 counties in the nation with the highest rates of uninsured individuals under age 65. While four counties along the border in South Texas top the list for the highest rates of uninsured residents--between 29% and 32%--over 23% of the under-65 population in the following counties don't have health insurance: Ector (Odessa), Potter (Amarillo), , Harris, and El Paso. Bastrop County (Central TX), Nueces County (Corpus Christi), and several counties in East and Southeast Texas . According to the study, the average annual premium for an individual was nearly $9,000 last year, while the premium for a family of four was an estimated $25,500. Slaton Harvey House Named State Historic Site The Texas Historical Commission named a 1912 diner in Slaton as the , capping an effort that began in 1989 to preserve it for future generations. Slaton’s Harvey House is that entrepreneur Fred Harvey built along the Santa Fe Railway routes between Chicago and San Francisco and from Galveston to Los Angeles, providing quality food to travelers in the sparsely populated frontier. The Harvey House was converted to a passenger and freight depot in 1942 and abandoned altogether in the 1980s. It was slated for demolition in 1989, but a group of local residents raised funds to and turn it into a museum with a bed and breakfast. “ It’s huge for West Texas and for those of us who have toiled and labored for 30-plus years. It’s especially gratifying because it’s gonna guarantee that it will survive for generations ,” Slaton Railroad Heritage Association board member Tony Privett said. | Flying together with our sponsor As we age, our bodies accumulate “senescent” or “zombie” cells—old, worn-out cells that no longer serve a useful function but still consume space and nutrients from healthy cells. These cells contribute to aging symptoms, such as aches, slower workout recovery, and reduced mental and physical energy. Much like pruning dead leaves from a plant, helps remove these cells, allowing the body’s healthier cells to thrive. This clinically tested formula is designed to rejuvenate cellular health and revitalize aging tissues, offering a potential breakthrough in supporting longevity and overall well-being. . | ➤ Nathan Hecht , the Texas Supreme Court’s longest-serving justice, retired last week at the age of 75, as required by the state constitution. ## Report: Postal Workers Stealing Mail
U.S. postal [workers are stealing mail,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuxCAQRL8Gd5zYBWOuoEjj7tKmtLC9HCTYWIDOur-PnD71aEbz3tdjeriY4v78dBvZ5vOEAnsugAs9rS6m96S61XoiJNmRhUFq0FJK6IJdpAdjvFOosQcQi1jAAw3aOCPFfe6ivdYECA0ge5Q3GNTdr2D8PJvZzD1TgtbYcrl957i3QD6984vKbclbl2xo7ahMfjAcGY4tUIgpXRnDMeSNdjorw7EXWqPS_Mi1ucTPXH6oVF4buQuNby4mHvd60NJy4U_aqbjECx25NIZjV-x6nDGlWPXAlHhehb8L7T8lL4u_AQAA__-LRGPe) and the U.S. Postal Service Inspector General blames insufficient internal controls and active recruitment of workers by criminals. According to a USPS investigation, organizations are [actively recruiting postal workers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uhDAQBOCnMd2e_MPfFS7S0F3alGiNF3BiMLL37sTbR6RPPZpPo_l6jA8MMezLJ25keU6jlroBqUC2o8cQz7GuvJ2JNJmKrOpMq1pjjKpWq6mvDZJpJ6Olrx02ClWn-t5hd6euqYK9NKlkq5RptLmprr7PXvWzc73rXSNqST5wyrfvFHZeaY5nelG-TWmrol2ZjyLMh9CD0MORCmPksFG5cqGHZzkKzDhRgfW5EPCaCRmwwIYhwjvlH8oFChNG2EKMIe0FcPeAmYAxL8TkwZ0w5bCFHSPksC9F6KHK1h_vq1LaTtRyucS_WfzfTS-rfwMAAP__2s1sxw) to steal checks, credit cards, and other valuables, with recent cases including two workers charged with stealing over $1 million in business checks from facilities in Virginia and North Carolina. The investigation found [contributing factors include](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAYhJ8Gb1jwY2NnYMjClo7taEH4SUixsYAE5e0rV107n77T3fd1WS4mxLDdPsyKqvq0AIORMk6ZXJwJ8b0MnVMeEVB0qPgkJJdCCN7dlbVwErM7GUQcuLUTeDnw2Ylx8lLOsgvqaGOcSc7FCKLn03Dyjs_e2tnOdiQDQxdqyv0jha3e0cd3emHur2ntorrXuhcizgQ0Ad1a69eyHRkBjRt9FgL6msOKBPQNN8wmEtAlrUifZS-0pfyNudBS0Rwn6WpCpGErO15ryvSPoRn3lCsBbTI9n3n7zPXRZeX2FmIMRU5kYLeD_d1V__P0UvATAAD___FHbEs) a lack of policies on personal belongings in the workplace, high supervisor vacancy rates, and inadequate theft awareness training.
## Terrorist Used Smart Glasses in NOLA
The FBI has confirmed that Shamsud-Din Jabbar, responsible for the New Orleans truck attack on New Year’s Day, [visited the city](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAUBOBfgzss3oNgu6C4xl2uvdIC80i4xRABGyv_fpXVttt90kij0fy7blcbU8y3v_Yg00PZUOCFC-BCb97G9NrU4E0gQpIDGZikBi2lhOFuYHdBLADoJh98WCRphVarIBbC2ashmnebAKEB5AXlCJNagoc5ODe72V2YEuRjL3X8X2LudwrpVZ5Ux70cQzL33h-NyT8MV4breZ5jdnums71zhuubDNfPxn-U6eSlJrK5cdu73T-o8oO65bdkW6PGHzWWyp-xxd543bOFWeMih2r844wpxaYnpsTtsDF9r-i_vfI0-BUAAP__kOtluQ) at least twice ahead of the attack. Additionally, the FBI released footage Jabbar recorded during a bike ride through the French Quarter using Meta smart glasses. [See the footage here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O2zAQhJ9G6tbgjyRLBYs06i5tSmNJruy9UKTApW347QOlv2YwwAw-DObP1-0LOXG-_8adXNvKzSgzgtKgpltETp_b0Ee3ERmyPTl9tZOerLW6f7gwj0FNynuNQ0QzL4tZ9LwEbTEEM1LP7qQprSat7WjsRV-HZYt63ryf_ezHblAUuZV6-S6c24O29CkvqpdQ9j65R2uHdPZXZ9bOrPlzFGln1Jn1BHdmVfqU0z0FMr3l7NEbSk2EWYCFBRrVWipLA3ngLs8IkTN8o_dY4V0qgexYG9wTipBAfFbOd8DWMPwFzBGOSi8uT0kfqBRKjRShVT46s_bVxePNKbFM125Q9x05_d_ffvrz5cy_AAAA__800nnP). Jabbar also wore the Meta glasses during the attack; however, they were not recording, officials said. Also this weekend, U.S. military bases across the country [heightened base security,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuhDAQAL_GdD75wbNwkYbu0qZEa7zcbWIwshdO_H106dOPZqT5uk93oEjb4xNWdLykySjTSKWlaqcAFK-proJbEA3aCp3ubKtba62unq6f57oxqtODbwaFg1EdNLWHAMF2i_YVubdNadVqbRtjb7qrhyXofvG-971vRK0wEKd8-0608ROXeKUT821OaxXdk3kvwn4IMwozMpQf2MJ-5D0VfCPCjBu-ijDjUeRKkRjyJT0UlAXnIxNfkvNRGIPkDCdGzMKMVXZhf1GMVNpO1OqxAsW_JP-34HTmNwAA__82U1_F) including suspending the Pentagon's "Trusted Traveler Program" and requiring a full ID check at all entry points.
## List: Biggest Movies of 2024
Animated sequels were big at the box office in 2024, making up four of the top 10 [highest-grossing movies worldwide](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyhCAUAL8GOxx4T9AUFGnsLm1KBw_wXoLiAJG5v89c-vQ7uzP7eVtuliId24fdvakhLSBAcSG50IuzFJ_L0DkTvAePnTdyRC01IsruYRCmUQc9hclZrdYVFdoQFAatRjWo0JF52YQUWkpUgL0ch7fg5BTWdVqnVbFBeEc15f4r0VEfPsRnunzu72nvonnUehaG7wxmBnNrrb-o_Nh4tydVG6nUF8hgzvb49o7XdPItp1Lo2PieLvK8pRxdI-c5HRwEDAzmLht3NoqRih7ZILbdUvxL1v8WXAZ-AwAA__8OzV7Z). _Inside Out 2_ took the top spot as the first animated film to pass $1 billion in ticket sales, with _Despicable Me 4_ , _Moana 2_ , and _Kung Fu Panda 4_ ranking third, fourth, and eighth, respectively. _Deadpool & Wolverine_ was the second highest-grossing movie of the year, and _Dune: Part Two_ rounded out the top five. Of the [20 top-grossing films](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyhCAUAL8GOxx4T9AUFGnsLm1KBw_wXoLiAJG5v89c-vQ7uzP7eVtuliId24fdvakhLSBAcSG50IuzFJ_L0DkTvAePnTdyRC01IsruYRCmUQc9hclZrdYVFdoQFAatRjWo0JF52YQUWkpUgL0ch7fg5BTWdVqnVbFBeEc15f4r0VEfPsRnunzu72nvonnUehaG7wxmBnNrrb-o_Nh4tydVG6nUF8hgzvb49o7XdPItp1Lo2PieLvK8pRxdI-c5HRwEDAzmLht3NoqRih7ZILbdUvxL1v8WXAZ-AwAA__8OzV7Z), only _It Ends With Us_ and _The Wild Robot_ were not based on previous films or film series, though both are book adaptations.

clean_body: U.S. postal and the U.S. Postal Service Inspector General blames insufficient internal controls and active recruitment of workers by criminals. | | | | | | Monday, January 6, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1912, New Mexico was of the United States, adding over 121,000 square miles of territory to the nation. The Flyover introduces a new section today: "The White House Transition," tracking news of the Trump administration's first 100 days. Take a look and let us know what you think by replying to this e-mail. This afternoon, we'll be sending you a special message featuring our sponsor, , and their strategies to help safeguard your savings. We hope you'll find their insights valuable and timely. Today's message comes from Type 2 Defense and offers information about blood sugar management. . | Report: Postal Workers Stealing Mail U.S. postal and the U.S. Postal Service Inspector General blames insufficient internal controls and active recruitment of workers by criminals. According to a USPS investigation, organizations are to steal checks, credit cards, and other valuables, with recent cases including two workers charged with stealing over $1 million in business checks from facilities in Virginia and North Carolina. The investigation found a lack of policies on personal belongings in the workplace, high supervisor vacancy rates, and inadequate theft awareness training. Terrorist Used Smart Glasses in NOLA The FBI has confirmed that Shamsud-Din Jabbar, responsible for the New Orleans truck attack on New Year’s Day, at least twice ahead of the attack. Additionally, the FBI released footage Jabbar recorded during a bike ride through the French Quarter using Meta smart glasses. . Jabbar also wore the Meta glasses during the attack; however, they were not recording, officials said. Also this weekend, U.S. military bases across the country including suspending the Pentagon's "Trusted Traveler Program" and requiring a full ID check at all entry points. List: Biggest Movies of 2024 Animated sequels were big at the box office in 2024, making up four of the top 10 . Inside Out 2 took the top spot as the first animated film to pass $1 billion in ticket sales, with Despicable Me 4 , Moana 2 , and Kung Fu Panda 4 ranking third, fourth, and eighth, respectively. Deadpool & Wolverine was the second highest-grossing movie of the year, and Dune: Part Two rounded out the top five. Of the , only It Ends With Us and The Wild Robot were not based on previous films or film series, though both are book adaptations. | ➤The Biden administration has notified Congress of a planned $8 billion weapons sale to Israel. name: History Facts
subject: Would you eat pink margarine?
body:
Margarine developed an unsavory reputation very quickly after it first arrived in North America from Europe in the 1870s. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cf80mimdwzx3wu3bv0qq18hfulf940kasm5jh8uw933bwhf4nfqn5l8mvkm5rv00mjti7l1b4auhshfdm0x59b1skwijs2ooier14oks0dbcvh3hmc9uubusmueivbyw855bfvli6ddinjm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Some U.S. states had laws requiring margarine to be dyed pink.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| M argarine developed an unsavory reputation very quickly after it first arrived in North America from Europe in the 1870s. Both the dairy lobby and popular media maligned the butter substitute (then made from surplus animal fats), claiming that it was unhealthy, prepared under unsatisfactory conditions, and full of harmful chemicals. Twenty states regulated margarine’s labeling, and seven more banned it outright before Congress stepped in and passed the 1886 Oleomargarine Act, which, among other things, heavily taxed the manufacture and sale of margarine. Retailers tried to get around the law by selling margarine as butter, which only intensified the anti-margarine crusade.
---
To make the difference between margarine and butter more obvious, 32 states [passed legislation regulating the color of margarine](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Most of those states banned the color yellow, but at least five states (Minnesota, South Dakota, Vermont, and West Virginia) went a step further and required that margarine be dyed pink to highlight its artificiality. The Supreme Court struck down pink margarine requirements as unconstitutional in 1898, but bans on yellow margarine remained in effect. In 1902, Congress even amended the Oleomargarine Act to increase taxes on artificially colored yellow margarine. But when the price of butter skyrocketed in the 1940s, public opinion shifted. The Oleomargarine Act was repealed in 1950, and state regulations started to follow suit. The last bans on yellow margarine were in Minnesota and Wisconsin, and both were repealed by 1967.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

---
6.5
| | Americans who used margarine in 2020
---
184 million
| Americans who used margarine in 2020
---
184 million

---
89 million
| | Minimum fat content for margarine in the U.S.
---
80%
| Minimum fat content for margarine in the U.S.
---
80%
| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## Quebec banned yellow margarine until 2008.
The United States’ fraught relationship with margarine paled in comparison to [Canada’s reaction](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spo1pk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). The entire country banned margarine entirely from 1886 to 1948, allowing it only for a brief window during World War I butter shortages. After that, margarine laws were up to the provinces, and Quebec was among the most strict; margarine wasn’t allowed at all until 1967. In 1987 — after most of North America was pretty much over the anti-margarine campaign — the province banned colored margarine. In 1997, the Unilever consumer goods culture decided to import 480 containers of margarine from the U.S. to Quebec to challenge the law. A legal battle dragged on until 2005, and while the yellow ban was upheld at the time, the provincial cabinet finally repealed it in 2008.
