clean_body: Margarine developed an unsavory reputation very quickly after it first arrived in North America from Europe in the 1870s. | M argarine developed an unsavory reputation very quickly after it first arrived in North America from Europe in the 1870s. Both the dairy lobby and popular media maligned the butter substitute (then made from surplus animal fats), claiming that it was unhealthy, prepared under unsatisfactory conditions, and full of harmful chemicals. Twenty states regulated margarine’s labeling, and seven more banned it outright before Congress stepped in and passed the 1886 Oleomargarine Act, which, among other things, heavily taxed the manufacture and sale of margarine. Retailers tried to get around the law by selling margarine as butter, which only intensified the anti-margarine crusade. To make the difference between margarine and butter more obvious, 32 states . Most of those states banned the color yellow, but at least five states (Minnesota, South Dakota, Vermont, and West Virginia) went a step further and required that margarine be dyed pink to highlight its artificiality. The Supreme Court struck down pink margarine requirements as unconstitutional in 1898, but bans on yellow margarine remained in effect. In 1902, Congress even amended the Oleomargarine Act to increase taxes on artificially colored yellow margarine. But when the price of butter skyrocketed in the 1940s, public opinion shifted. The Oleomargarine Act was repealed in 1950, and state regulations started to follow suit. The last bans on yellow margarine were in Minnesota and Wisconsin, and both were repealed by 1967. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Pounds of butter eaten by the average American in 2021 6.5 | | Americans who used margarine in 2020 184 million | Americans who used margarine in 2020 184 million | | Cows in the United States in 2023 89 million | | Minimum fat content for margarine in the U.S. 80% | Minimum fat content for margarine in the U.S. 80% | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Quebec banned yellow margarine until 2008. The United States’ fraught relationship with margarine paled in comparison to . The entire country banned margarine entirely from 1886 to 1948, allowing it only for a brief window during World War I butter shortages. After that, margarine laws were up to the provinces, and Quebec was among the most strict; margarine wasn’t allowed at all until 1967. In 1987 — after most of North America was pretty much over the anti-margarine campaign — the province banned colored margarine. In 1997, the Unilever consumer goods culture decided to import 480 containers of margarine from the U.S. to Quebec to challenge the law. A legal battle dragged on until 2005, and while the yellow ban was upheld at the time, the provincial cabinet finally repealed it in 2008. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zivt0mu2pbem0a0046alk362hrfngf3f2ito50ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chgeapb4clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd9mfghcc9ml3i6s4hdlie9p9oetul348s2vi5hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chgeapb4clh2bs)

body:

|

Friend,

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy have been handpicked for a monumental task: **To shrink the size of the federal government and reduce wasteful spending and excess.**

But House Republicans are on board, but we can't do it without you. **[Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zntc2doobjtkhflf1f70p8o68c46nmns7eigb9jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chge6ob6c9h2bs "Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?")**

DOGE has a LOT of work to do to drain the swamp and get the government working for the people of this great country, and that starts now.

**[Will you please complete House GOP's DOGE Survey today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi2mce7s3sfg7tqv6ch7cc6vp7enrl26ionosgm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chge6ob6c9h2bs "Will you please complete House GOP’s DOGE Survey today?")**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuhgbgu1u98vvhnr4prm3rtk25qin3kekuvsit68_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chge6ob6c9h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znb1hgjnrqh8hep7vhf8t50ai41tdp9ebutme5ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chge6ob6c9h2bs)
---

---

name: America First Alerts
subject: We need to hear from you before Inauguration.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JEFF CRANK FOR CONGRESS
body:
This Presidential term is going to set the wave for every Presidential term that follows.

| | | | **_President Trump’s Inauguration is 2 weeks away!_**
As his team is preparing to make America great again in 2025, they need to hear from you now more than ever!

---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zun3s8d8877ct9c0o5gn33qj76s92r86ac4t3q68_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chge6ob6c9h2bs)
With that being said we have one question for you:
**_What should President Trump’s first act in his new term be?_**
**This Presidential term is going to set the wave for every Presidential term that follows.**

As woke illiberalism replaced live-and-let-live liberalism as the

My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z047hc7398el695hv9jnlpdusq74ttpja98flajg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chge1oj2cdh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**

subject: MassGOP Demands Accountability for State-Funded Crime: Illegal Immigrant Found in Shelter with Firearms and $1 Million in Fentanyl
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oPJjlPjVXUi8Vp7-1RD8qPORJmwl2dx8tG9QYLeHSnH0c3SKKDUa2KOO0-S_AYIXbN1VuBoJN-1z8BvG08AOulXw0_a5BWKuOPG3bOborRI7BvLGDM9G0GZxJzl-qxuikQIKs2JhpghwcErSGnLBDA==&c=B9VpInqwqu9mCwGB3EvA20TWEkDNWACLXoJ3uIjknwoR8a1Ppp08Fg==&ch=Xi5jTlyCz54Ls6GQ_J8OGM3IHHrAl4_JdEt2pYWtpcnIQuXfdNwdZw==)
---
| MassGOP Demands Accountability for State-Funded Crime: Illegal Immigrant Found in Shelter with Firearms and $1 Million in Fentanyl
---
---
| Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party fully supports the unified efforts of the House Republican Caucus in their letter to the Healey-Driscoll Administration, demanding accountability after an illegal immigrant was discovered in a taxpayer-funded emergency shelter with multiple firearms and an estimated $1 million worth of fentanyl. Every member of the House Republican Caucus joined in signing this critical call to action.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale praised the House Republican Caucus for their leadership and strongly criticized the Healey-Driscoll Administration for this egregious oversight, stating, "Why are long-term Massachusetts families left waiting for emergency housing while a criminal illegal immigrant is conducting a criminal enterprise from within state-funded housing? This amounts to state-funded crime. The House Republican Caucus is doing a great service to the people of Massachusetts by demanding answers for this dangerous and unacceptable failure."
Carnevale emphasized the urgency of the situation, concluding, "Republicans have called for residency requirements for emergency housing time and time again. This must serve as the final wake-up call to the Democratic supermajority and the Healey-Driscoll Administration to reform the state-funded Emergency Assistance program. The migrant crisis has spiraled into a financial catastrophe, a humanitarian disaster, and a severe threat to public safety. Massachusetts residents deserve answers and Democrats need to put partisanship aside and work with Republicans on solutions."
###
---

clean_body: My final chance to save my home... They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me. | Dear Friend, I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you. Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration. This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my final chance to save my home. Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th. During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s truly important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that eternal “heavenly treasures” await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession. I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions. "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Update For America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: I almost died defending the Capitol four years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250106-1-160&refcode2=3635.734936.2v2exL&t=1&akid=3635%2E734936%2E2v2exL)
---
Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired and directed by Donald Trump.
I am writing to you because the fight to defend our democracy is not over.
Republicans that supported Trump and defended his actions on January 6th control the House and the Senate. Trump and his allies are set to retake the White House later this month. But we’re lucky, because we have fighters of our own.
So I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help support my friend Ruben — a Marine, a fighter, a patriot. A man who was ready to fight, just like me, on January 6th. Someone who will stand in the breach and hold the line against Trump and the MAGA Right.
So please:
[**Can you make today the day you make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250106-1-160&t=2&akid=3635%2E734936%2E2v2exL)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250106-1-160&t=3&akid=3635%2E734936%2E2v2exL)
Trump called January 6th a “day of love.” His supporters almost loved me to death that day.
I can assure you their hearts were not full of love as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed.
I wonder how loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield.
Trump says he’s going to pardon the people who attacked me and our Capitol that day.
So I am going to do everything I can to support my friend, Senator Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking:
[**Can you contribute to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today? Use this link to give whatever you can afford to make sure he has everything he needs to hold the line against Trump and the MAGA Right.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250106-1-160&t=4&akid=3635%2E734936%2E2v2exL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Harry Dunn
subject: My life changed on January 6, 2021.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99945298/521262755/604658357?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.06_J6-Anni2_B1_F1_S1_C1_U2_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE0MThjYmUtM2FjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JQHfHaatrf2p4bJQ5ysTToLcITmx2OUqdDnVF7M_fhI=#)
---
4 years ago today, I was walking into the Capitol for my shift as a Capitol police officer.

_I wouldn't know it yet, but my life was about to change forever._

I'd be attacked. Beaten with clubs, baseball bats. Sprayed with WD-40, pepper spray, bear spray. Called slurs that I'd never been called in my life.

An angry mob, emboldened by Donald Trump and MAGA-extremists pushing the Big Lie, would storm the Capitol. Never caring about the lives of me and my fellow officers. They destroyed a sacred place, an institution dedicated to upholding the rule of law. And they attempted to destroy democracy.

**My life changed on January 6. It's the reason I've spent the last 4 years fighting.**

[**_Our fight for democracy is never over, especially with Donald Trump taking office two weeks from today. I need you to dig deep right now. | | | On this solemn anniversary of January 6th, we stand defiant, confronting the unsettling return of Donald Trump after his violent coup attempt in 2021—a brazen assault on our democracy that continues to resonate in our present and threatens to darken our future. Trump’s chilling proclamations of dictatorship on day one, his relentless quest to subvert our Constitution, and his appalling calls to pardon the very domestic terrorists who violently stormed the Capitol, all reveal the true face of his MAGA movement. _He shamelessly glorifies these insurrectionists as “patriots,” while plotting to unleash an authoritarian dystopia upon our beloved America._ **This is not merely a moment for reflection; it is a clarion call for action! The time has come for the rise of the resistance to stand against this encroaching tyranny!** **[Your support is urgently needed to defend the very soul of our nation. clean_body: | | | On this solemn anniversary of January 6th, we stand defiant, confronting the unsettling return of Donald Trump after his violent coup attempt in 2021—a brazen assault on our democracy that continues to resonate in our present and threatens to darken our future. Trump’s chilling proclamations of dictatorship on day one, his relentless quest to subvert our Constitution, and his appalling calls to pardon the very domestic terrorists who violently stormed the Capitol, all reveal the true face of his MAGA movement. He shamelessly glorifies these insurrectionists as “patriots,” while plotting to unleash an authoritarian dystopia upon our beloved America. This is not merely a moment for reflection; it is a clarion call for action! The time has come for the rise of the resistance to stand against this encroaching tyranny! ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. The MAGA movement strikes at the heart of our democracy, threatening to unravel the freedoms we cherish. Trump, Elon Musk, and JD Vance aim to replace justice with tyranny, unity with division, and hope with fear. We cannot stand idly by as this dark vision looms on the horizon. ** We do not obey in advance. We do not bow to a king. We persist and resist to protect the promise of America and defend our free and fair democracy. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:

As his team is preparing to make America great again in 2025, they need to hear from you now more than ever!

name: Blue Amp Action HQ
subject: The MVPs of 2024: Kamala and Tim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96511d5c-2be3-439e-983e-453c5e29bba0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf84187bb-1c60-451c-b430-007f6083921e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know that the 2024 election didn't go as we would have hoped, Peter. But despite all the challenges and adversity, we're so proud and grateful for Kamala Harris and Tim Walz's historic run to fight for our democracy and freedom and bring our country on a new path forward. They are truly a reminder that our work is not over, and that the fight for a better America is long and hard-fought. We wanted to thank them for taking a stand against Trump and showing us that we can have a bright future ahead of us – even in times of darkness and uncertainty. [Will you take a minute to sign our card and thank Vice President Kamala Harris and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz for their inspiring run?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b276152-8d5c-4bbc-80c6-6ac214713479/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Abolish the Electoral College! (VPP)
subject: we haven’t heard from you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Join millions of Americans taking a stand:
| | **_BREAKING:_
Pew Research Poll Shows Majority of Americans Want to Abolish the Electoral College in Favor of Popular Vote**

But we still don’t know where YOU stand!

[**Should we ABOLISH the Electoral College?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/electoral-college/?source=VPP_20250106_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b) | [YES, THE PEOPLE SHOULD DECIDE ELECTIONS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/electoral-college/?source=VPP_20250106_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b)
---
[NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/electoral-college/?source=VPP_20250106_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/electoral-college/?source=VPP_20250106_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b)
1\. Republicans have only won the popular vote **TWICE** since 1988.

2\. **EVERY** American’s vote deserves to be counted equally — the Electoral College needs to GO!!!
**More and more voters are taking a stand against the Electoral College, so we need to make sure YOU are one of them:**

[**Should we ABOLISH the Electoral College?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/electoral-college/?source=VPP_20250106_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b)
[YES, THE PEOPLE SHOULD DECIDE ELECTIONS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/electoral-college/?source=VPP_20250106_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b)

You are one of 23 Democrats we haven’t heard from in your state. Please respond now!

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18352%2E878179%2Esjbm0b)

name: JD Vance
subject: Every Trump voter needs to support Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1c955102ea5f4348aeba32bc8396815e&_e=DY-eyit5apYQxx_dtUFJMY6Cy62JGhkoDW4K7oxxlDwhMwn08APsVx6SvWN2K9rTSAHTtZdopAe0uv5niBhCbIZEc2INXkOaFJJyh7y2nmiDoGQePQU4bzxZVhi9Lkc8Q0QjIMA7GdZYuwa87RuqLXWyfj2JCPOpkqA_f0coSRmQJIJxU7Pji0D20j0rv1NYazsGxrtoC8A7PdkSoDkrhFrHeKe5tO2w0H2pbjR6NE_YVhBIbBNlMPbBSZnk4BGid6MaL3IJiqfdqsNfIArAgnsNLNja29gc7Psb40lHL0l6eXaGXjZZrLbGskG1cUfGLg5zOqqDj2_FbaAOkudehJ6TkCrkI-Jv9qSYmhqRLB2DuuwqiA3BT2aTiH9PUF1Ypyo-h367-yOFeeISIa3I1x5BjZCo1tmLM58BgIen4hM%3D)

Peter,

The effort to tank Pete Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.

Pete is going to get his hearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee, not a sham hearing before the American media.

**[And before he does, I'm calling on ALL PATRIOTIC AMERICANS to rush to his defense and fill up our Official Letter of Support with MILLIONS of signatures. >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1c955102ea5f4348aeba32bc8396815e&_e=DY-eyit5apYQxx_dtUFJMY6Cy62JGhkoDW4K7oxxlDwhMwn08APsVx6SvWN2K9rTSAHTtZdopAe0uv5niBhCbIZEc2INXkOaFJJyh7y2nmiDoGQePQU4bzxZVhi9Lkc8Q0QjIMA7GdZYuwa87RuqLXWyfj2JCPOpkqA_f0coSRmQJIJxU7Pji0D20j0rv1NYazsGxrtoC8A7PdkSoDkrhFrHeKe5tO2w0H2pbjR6NE_YVhBIbBNlMPbBSZnk4BGiBcCTY-fTT4Q9p2Rs6BA88ovjQU3HfPQbtAYu58APXsHhBkVAvc5XiU8Ps-_9vw_9A939bVOrxuc0-BnHOgsZGq8P1EP_A9ht5M9xQlRaz43QjO0KD1NKbQsTGs65BYLMLF3nB7ZJIwrZqDdytoTQeWGSCLUDJHmusZeDoTd-1GY%3D)
**
**[SIGN THE LETTER](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1c955102ea5f4348aeba32bc8396815e&_e=DY-eyit5apYQxx_dtUFJMY6Cy62JGhkoDW4K7oxxlDwhMwn08APsVx6SvWN2K9rTSAHTtZdopAe0uv5niBhCbIZEc2INXkOaFJJyh7y2nmiDoGQePQU4bzxZVhi9Lkc8Q0QjIMA7GdZYuwa87RuqLXWyfj2JCPOpkqA_f0coSRmQJIJxU7Pji0D20j0rv1NYazsGxrtoC8A7PdkSoDkrhFrHeKe5tO2w0H2pbjR6NE_YVhBIbBNlMPbBSZnk4BGi36zxFXrMUdLaSUHf89cGn1A1ow1kS9dKQXfwL8ISo5ZgD2W3hH0Qu8h8DAQAt_TvySYG7GOApNl6kIdIhe-6QELS5yXsLOkdaXl8YjqPnVqgiwHBHWQn9-natNQ_cVlKQYQDcz9eOe5XxFBi_QH-bP0XImm7lJ0jFOOrccB8ZAw%3D)**

They can't go after President Trump and me. We already beat them in a landslide!

That's why they've focused their efforts on attacking a proud veteran like Pete Hegseth.

Pete will dismantle their DEI agenda, eradicate wokeism, and build our military back into a fighting machine - _**and that TERRIFIES them.**_

**[But as a veteran, I'm PROUD to endorse Pete Hegseth as our next Secretary of Defense, and I'm hoping that you'll do the same by signing his Official Letter of Support. >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1c955102ea5f4348aeba32bc8396815e&_e=DY-eyit5apYQxx_dtUFJMY6Cy62JGhkoDW4K7oxxlDwhMwn08APsVx6SvWN2K9rTSAHTtZdopAe0uv5niBhCbIZEc2INXkOaFJJyh7y2nmiDoGQePQU4bzxZVhi9Lkc8Q0QjIMA7GdZYuwa87RuqLXWyfj2JCPOpkqA_f0coSRmQJIJxU7Pji0D20j0rv1NYazsGxrtoC8A7PdkSoDkrhFrHeKe5tO2w0H2pbjR6NE_YVhBIbBNlMPbBSZnk4BGii7HfnrFTEsxUxVnx9rmvW8tfKE5ap-5ifZi06fHcTlklPH90lDBBsTKADE8wpTqzbdm1_mekLvgzoqNsS8SJhF2yjJGxDtLi3VTtHeS1Qwc1pw0M6IxKm_7nPrR6nHPksH-UOPIOZEIjMLh5vEusNrV6XEJPBcluOZi-AHPxaJs%3D)
**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: January 6th, 2021.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This was a dark day in the history of our nation—one that we must never forget.
#

Friends -
On this day four years ago, we watched in horror as an angry mob of insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol. It was a dark day in the history of our nation—one that we must never forget.
The unfortunate truth is that many of the people who attacked the Capitol are the same people who have fallen prey to extremist rhetoric. For years, the gun lobby has riled up their supporters with inflammatory language, flat-out encouraging its supporters to take up arms against their own government.
Donald Trump will be president once again in two weeks. We have experienced a Donald Trump presidency before, and we’ve all seen what he’s capable of. We know he enabled and encouraged the attack on our nation’s Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
Here at GIFFORDS, we’ll be doing everything we can over the next four years to keep Donald Trump in check and prevent acts of political violence. But we can’t do this work alone.
[**Will you join our fight against political violence by making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250106-1-b&t=1&akid=9773%2E3935704%2ErpDKmP)

Trump's National Security Adviser Mike Waltz **[DESTROYED elitist clown Jim Acosta](https://substack.com/redirect/97b3abe3-f4ac-46f3-a11c-0337033dca6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for repeatedly spewing Trump lies during a tense live interview on CNN.
Acosta was ready with a list of new accusations against Trump, each of which **[Waltz had a solid answer for.](https://substack.com/redirect/97b3abe3-f4ac-46f3-a11c-0337033dca6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/97b3abe3-f4ac-46f3-a11c-0337033dca6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The trump campaign may have broken federal law by using Arlington National Cemetery for political purposes,... Are you concerned at all with the Trump campaign playing politics with Arlington National Cemetery?" Acosta pressed Waltz.
"Jim, I was there," Waltz answered. "Those families had the ceremony set up,... and then invited both Trump and Kamala Harris who was in Washington that day. She choose not to come, he choose to be there for them!"
Acosta's weird never-ending vendetta against Trump is on full display here, and in the end he completely falls on his face. **[Watch Waltz make him look like a complete fool.](https://substack.com/redirect/97b3abe3-f4ac-46f3-a11c-0337033dca6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/97b3abe3-f4ac-46f3-a11c-0337033dca6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented by All Family Pharmacy](https://substack.com/redirect/76ff6457-1603-44ab-ba24-36af1f3fe870?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Find out why so many are turning to Ivermectin and Mebendazole for Covid, Parasites and Cancer:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/76ff6457-1603-44ab-ba24-36af1f3fe870?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

The Democrats are furious at voters for rejecting their extreme agenda on November 5th, and they want to sabotage the incoming Trump administration. That 's why I am aggressively calling attention to it._**

The good news is a federal judge in **Texas** has now blocked the Biden administration from selling any more parts of the border wall before President Trump takes office.

But that doesn't mean these corrupt leftists aren't looking for other ways now to sabotage President Trump and his America First agenda!

[**You can see what I had to say on this Biden border wall scheme on**** _Hannity_**** >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9CcmF6ZW4tQmlkZW4tQWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb25fMjAyNTAxMDYmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CcmF6ZW4tQmlkZW4tQWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24mdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTQmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/6OcOwBEHEAeI0OlH1N43TQ)

**As President Trump has said, this attempt to sell off the border wall is criminal. All those involved in authorizing it should expect to be investigated and prosecuted.**

**I will not let up in the fight to hold these Biden administration radicals accountable and I 'm counting on your support as we hit the ground running this year.**

Ted Cruz

body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]
Hi there, it’s Jay.
Today marks the fourth anniversary since former (and soon-to-be) President Trump helped launch an insurrection on our nation’s capital.
By denying the results of our free and fair election system, Trump created one of the darkest days in history . But now, he’ll become the 47th President of the United States.
And the policies that he wants to put in place – restricting reproductive rights, gutting the Affordable Care Act, and cutting funds to our public school systems – show how far he’s willing to go to hurt all Americans, including those right here in Virginia.
But unlike Trump and my opponent, Jason Miyares, I’ll always stand up for the rule of law and protect Virginians.
Virginia will be the first state to determine how much Trump can implement his Project 2025 agenda. If you’re ready for an attorney general who will put Virginia families first, please donate any amount you can today to help us get Jason Miyares out of his post. body:
Read this letter to Trump and approve it:

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8fb8p39n7svhdeok1g0s344ia3nf834j5tf46ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chie2pb6c5h2bs)

Friend, a once in a LIFETIME opportunity for you!

Top Trump allies have crafted a beautiful **appreciation letter for President Trump,** and we want you to have a read-through and _[SIGN the letter!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpdsgnrrt9mkleic1rk02r6rr7jo26c48n9s5uu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chie2pb6c5h2bs)_

**You have stood by President Trump through thick and thin, so we thought YOU would want to be the FIRST to approve this letter and sign your name.**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf03j1smj790l68utic7ho4f5ids0nnosgc41bbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chie2pb6c5h2bs)

_Please take a moment to read this heartfelt letter. We can 't send it to Mar-a-Lago without YOUR blessing!_
**[Read the letter from TOP Trump Allies like you to APPROVE and SIGN the letter before we send it off to President Trump's home.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl0e5ilnf4hkg3hn563qhesfugksjhcfiq2kir2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chie2pb6c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

Top Trump Allies
**[READ AND SIGN;](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcs2dt2jkmk6glenmr60l7uodnrlmroi7p58a2fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3chie2pb6c5h2bs)**

Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
PO Box 1682
Bellevue, WA 98009-1682

Since 1980, AmeriPAC has helped fund and elect a large number of conservative, freedom-oriented candidates to public office. We’ve played a huge role in several presidential cycles. We directed much of our time and funds from generous patriots like you to oppose radical Leftist candidates, including Bill Clinton, Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, and Kamala Harris. At AmeriPAC, we want to personally restore our country for freedom-loving patriots like you.

American Briefing

Team, January 6th was more than just an attempt to break into our nation’s Capitol. It was an attempt to break down our institutions and who we are as Americans. I remember the terror I felt as I hid in the House balcony praying for the safety of myself and my colleagues. I remember how close we were to losing our democracy that day – and remember why I am so committed to protecting our freedoms. And I remember how the courage of Capitol police, our custodians, and staffers helped keep us safe from harm. I was proud to come back to the House floor to finish certifying the results from our free and fair election, knowing that democracy, not hatred, had won that day. **But far-right misinformation about our political system – especially our election process – has sowed immeasurable damage to the faith so many Americans have in our government. We have to do anything we can to fight back against these lies and their devastating consequences.** [**Team, if you’re fired up to protect our democracy and ensure nothing like the January 6 riot happens again, will you please chip in $15 or more today to support my fight against MAGA misinformation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99952223/521282316/-1694324749?amount=15&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.06_Jan6_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZhMTMyMi00M2NjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_I-zbd9O_-hGdDgc817tdyPLQ7NlODSCAWhHYB-47fw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99952224/521282317/-1694324749?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.06_Jan6_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZhMTMyMi00M2NjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_I-zbd9O_-hGdDgc817tdyPLQ7NlODSCAWhHYB-47fw=)**

name: Maureen Braun
subject: A Special Invitation to Hoosier Heritage Family Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend, As Mike Braun’s wife of 48 years, it’s an honor to invite you and your family to a day of fun, community, and celebration at the **Indiana State Museum**. My husband, and our entire family, are so excited to kick off this new chapter for Indiana with all of you!
**Join us for Hoosier Heritage Family Day!**
📅 Date: Sunday, January 12, 2025
⏰ Time: 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM
📍 Location: 1650 W Washington St., Indianapolis, IN 46204
🎟️ Admission: Free for everyone!
This event is all about celebrating the heritage, people, and spirit that make Indiana home. There’s something for everyone to enjoy:
* **Fun giveaways** for all ages
* **Photo opportunities** with my husband, Governor-Elect Mike Braun
* **Storytime with me!!**
* **A scavenger hunt** to keep the kids entertained
* **Snacks and treats** to keep you fueled
* **Crafts and activities** for the whole family
* **Meet the Beckwith family**
* And more surprises we can’t wait to share!

We’ve planned this day to bring Hoosiers together in celebration, and it would mean so much to have you there. It’s a chance to make memories, connect with neighbors, and share in this exciting moment for our state.
Will you be able to join us? Let me know below! 👉 **[RSVP Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c16d4c00a87347d29b1a224bb3e54373&_e=qTmuEPtnWNAsUlhnyEFU538Z-72ObJVc0975GqkxiUi2k65SvbuatCvENQm3-aGFup7rGjFX-iwSZzzCx62jmJINFj4RAnKVyGbBmQpsP39Hjk4DgJZdK6_ZJHOqxSpGh58nQUG9OK2ZIhUL7hw8rrbaN4wtp_o1ANpekfXvzN5J3ymn9qNxLBUa_2QRLZcHB6Sdm4ips9udyiSglZx642FAMeh4GEnDQFOws-fsAZ6huZialNUrsvCM64xQTJ-JZEbdOl_-eShmEvD_kZIwlg%3D%3D)**
We can’t wait to see you there!
Warm regards,
---
| |
---
Maureen Braun
Wife of Governor-Elect Mike Braun
---
|
---

What I learned working in the first Trump Administration, and what it might mean for this one

# [A Tale of Two Trump Administrations](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154271704&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjcxNzA0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYxNzg2NTYsImV4cCI6MTczODc3MDY1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RFxdhZDm6HZTxJRI7Rq-P7bKYr_PA5kp_nUX9u5u36I)
### What I learned working in the first Trump Administration, and what it might mean for this one
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Jan 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154271704&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjcxNzA0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjE3ODY1NiwiZXhwIjoxNzM4NzcwNjU2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3-Q__gCJrDSwhoAHJaW7raVsKSoHpRV9XHDA-zg8XYQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154271704&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjcxNzA0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYxNzg2NTYsImV4cCI6MTczODc3MDY1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RFxdhZDm6HZTxJRI7Rq-P7bKYr_PA5kp_nUX9u5u36I&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154271704&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjcxNzA0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYxNzg2NTYsImV4cCI6MTczODc3MDY1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RFxdhZDm6HZTxJRI7Rq-P7bKYr_PA5kp_nUX9u5u36I)
---
| | [](https://substack..q0_pvPBqQAM8iE7-JxbGQvcapRMkeL7ii6h_vSZg1fg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/a-tale-of-two-trump-administrations?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I hope everyone had a great New Year and is staying safe in the snow if you are buried in it like we are! As this year begins and the new administration comes in, I've been getting a lot of questions about what I think about this or that nominee or what's going to happen.
Rather than give my thoughts on individual nominees, which anyone can do, I thought I would give you some broader things to look at based on a unique experience I have: as a Marine, I spent nearly four years working at the Pentagon under the first Trump administration.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.7DojskWyauUVzXiZTdIlVbeLW1_p2Hj9uT_BnyOYdKE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154271704)
For the first three years I was the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff's representative to the "interagency" (a word they use when multiple governmental agencies work together on an issue) for conventional arms control. Which means that I spent a lot of time traveling from the Pentagon to the White House to represent the military at National Security Council conventional arms control meetings. I also spent a lot of time overseas on arms control delegations and in negotiations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4c5e98b9-edb2-4354-a8dc-d915829128f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Representing the USA (The views expressed in this Substack are those of the individual only and not those of the Department of Defense. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.)_
At the end of the third year I was scheduled to resign my commission in order to transition to the Marine Reserve so I could do anti-monopoly work, but instead I extended on active duty for a year so that I could work on procurement in an office under the Undersecretary of Defense for Research and Engineering. Which meant I spent a decent amount of time over at Congress and again at the White House- this time with the administration's innovation people.
What I learned during those four years is that there's a reason why the first Trump administration accomplished so little of what it set out to do, and why the two big campaign promises that actually turned into reality were basically (1) a massive tax cut for the richest people and corporations and (2) getting a heavy corporate-leaning supreme court majority that overturned Roe (the promise), but also did a lot of other bad things for everyday people.
The reason that that administration's accomplishments were so limited is because governing is actually pretty hard and takes a lot of work. Turning campaign promises into policy and then that policy into action takes a lot of people with the same goals working to make it happen and people who know what levers to pull and buttons to press.
The common theme between those two promises that were kept? They were both organized by Mitch McConnell and the corporate wing of the Republican Party. Say what you will about them, those guys know how to enact policy, which is how the [top 1% has managed to take $50 trillion in wealth from the bottom 90%](https://substack.com/redirect/f2aae5b8-f385-43ce-b42a-b7cfdde5cc3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the past few decades.
The first Trump team, however? Not so much.

And one reason is that there wasn't much of a team when you got down to it. Trump appointed people to enact his vision in the government at [the slowest pace in decades](https://substack.com/redirect/dabe4f88-d0e0-461f-bd32-eec574457409?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Seven months into his administration, after a discussion on Fox & Friends on how he still hadn't nominated anyone for 366 senior positions, he tweeted: "We are not looking to fill all those positions. Don't need many of them - reduce size of government."
Only, what I learned on the Joint Staff and at the Undersecretary of Defense's office is that this resistance or inability to nominate people for those positions meant that, instead of his people driving the government toward his vision, the so-called deep state- a consistent target of his and Stephen Bannon's ire- actually ended up running the country.
I experienced that personally. During his campaign, Trump talked a lot about our allies not carrying their load and how he was going to fix it.
Believe it or not, I discovered that this was true and actually a real problem during my arms control work. Over and over again I met with military leaders of our western European allies to remind them of and share intelligence on the Russian military modernization and preparations for military expansion. Whenever I asked them to take hard positions on Russia at these meetings, they would hem and haw and say that yes, their military was very worried about it, but that their government just wouldn't let them be aggressive about it.
Why? Because their countries were meeting their energy needs with cheap Russian natural gas. A deep irony considering that by buying that gas, these countries were funding Russia's very military modernization that their militaries were so worried about! And rather than take a hard position on Russia and stop funding Putin's ambitions, do you know what their governments did instead? They asked the US to send over more troops and equipment to protect them from the very Russian military threat that they were funding. And, of course, we did, because that's what we do no matter who the President is, including Trump. The administrations of both Presidents Obama and Trump (and later Biden) through the European Deterrence Initiative, provided European security to the tune of [billions of dollars every year](https://substack.com/redirect/8b484991-bde3-41d7-9629-61913f70b50f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the very countries that were funding the threat.
So while Trump's political campaign vision on allies, at least in the niche circumstance of conventional arms control, would have been both helpful and welcome at the meetings and negotiations I was a part of took at NATO HQ, in Brussels, Belgium, and at something called the Organization for Security and Cooperation in Europe (the OSCE), in Vienna, Austria, it never made it down to us because they didn't know how to turn politics into policy and action.
In this case, the Trump administration did not have an Ambassador to the OSCE for the _entire time_ I was there. He came in just as I was leaving, more than two and a half years into Trump's four year term. Other countries didn't think that the US took the negotiations seriously, since we never had an ambassador, so they had incentive to take hard positions on Russia no matter what we said in our lopsided delegations. And believe me, they were lopsided.

When Putin sent hand-picked retired generals to represent Russia in negotiations and presentations, the United States sent me, a Marine Major, because that's who was in the Pentagon office dealing with treaties and the administration hadn't picked someone.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/befee2a0-7796-4ddb-ba42-28b90ad097b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Representing the United States as a Marine Major across from Russian General Zolotarev on the degrading security situation in Europe._
Without an ambassador, the delegation to the OSCE was led by career state department personnel - and much of the official policy and guidance they had to operate under was still from the Obama presidency.
That's what happens when you don't know how or don't choose to govern.

Sometimes, when I was at one negotiation or another, the President would tweet something that was indirectly relevant to our work. Allies and other countries' representatives would run up and ask what it meant, and if it changed anything. It was an awkward position for us to be in because our answer was always no, even if the President had just said something contradicting our positions. Because tweets don't change policy, orders and official documents change policy.
There's a reason for that. Things might be said in a tweet or in the media for another purpose. To mislead, to create negotiating space, or who knows what other reason. So we can only take positions that are officially communicated to us because we don't know why and aren't in a position to guess at the reason for saying something through an unofficial channel.
But official guidance and presence was much less frequent because there were few people in position to push it. When positions are vacant, or those positions are filled by people who are more interested in glamor than in governing, politics aren't turned into policy and your policies aren't turned into action because the levers of government aren't properly operated.
The first Trump Administration actually had a few people at the beginning of the first term who knew how to govern, but as they were fired, quit, or just moved on, that number dwindled to almost nothing, and many of those who were left behind were only doing it for their own career advancement and notoriety, not to actually accomplish anything. So, ultimately, after having significant power through most of the Trump administration, by the end, the government bureaucracy that the administration hated so much essentially had complete control.
For example, almost [forty percent of Pentagon positions](https://substack.com/redirect/d7ebb9b1-5997-4835-aa59-78521b0ea324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)- and basically all of the higher ones- were vacant near the end, essentially leaving the Joint Staff to run the US military without real civilian oversight. Which is not how it's supposed to be.
Now, here we are on round two, and the Trump team seems to have discovered that they really failed to enact their policies last time because they didn't appoint anyone. So they are making nominations at light speed this time.
But their nominations are... well... curious, to say the least.
And if this is who they have available for the highest positions in our country, can you imagine who it's going to be at the middle level appointed positions where most of the work actually happens?
My guess is there will be very few people who actually know how to turn campaign promises into policy and then action.
For those who do, they could very well get caught up fighting the DOGE bros, who are going to want to have their fingers in absolutely everything as they try to diminish the government's power to do anything at all.
Time will tell who ultimately is nominated and approved and how fast, but these are some of the things to think about as the administration comes in and tries to move forward. The more the DOGE bros mix it up and the more show horse vs workhorse appointments there are, the fewer campaign promises will be turned into action.
Because it's not usually the flashy folks who are effective, it's the ones you've never heard of, like his Department of the Interior team from the first administration.
They successfully flaunted Congressional hearings, [sent pages of wingdings in response to Congressional requests for information](https://substack.com/redirect/b635245e-a613-4b83-b109-986a6fa532f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and managed to make it much easier for private enterprise to convert public land into private profit. Because, again, say what you will about the corporate wing of the Republican Party (sellouts, cowards, crooks, whatever), but there's a reason they have all lined up behind Trump: they know how to govern, and when they get their people in, or they choose the legislative agenda, they deliver for themselves.
In that case, if it's mostly flash at the top and a few corporatists in the most extractive but overlooked positions, it's likely to be few campaign promises turned to action, a lot of noise at the top, and a lot of tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans and corporate America. And not much else.
As always, let me know what you are seeing and think in the comments and please share with anyone you think might be interested!
Until next time.
Lucas
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

clean_body: What I learned working in the first Trump Administration, and what it might mean for this one | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? What I learned working in the first Trump Administration, and what it might mean for this one | | | Jan 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | I hope everyone had a great New Year and is staying safe in the snow if you are buried in it like we are! As this year begins and the new administration comes in, I've been getting a lot of questions about what I think about this or that nominee or what's going to happen. Rather than give my thoughts on individual nominees, which anyone can do, I thought I would give you some broader things to look at based on a unique experience I have: as a Marine, I spent nearly four years working at the Pentagon under the first Trump administration. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. For the first three years I was the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff's representative to the "interagency" (a word they use when multiple governmental agencies work together on an issue) for conventional arms control. Which means that I spent a lot of time traveling from the Pentagon to the White House to represent the military at National Security Council conventional arms control meetings. I also spent a lot of time overseas on arms control delegations and in negotiations. | | ---|---|--- Representing the USA (The views expressed in this Substack are those of the individual only and not those of the Department of Defense. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.) At the end of the third year I was scheduled to resign my commission in order to transition to the Marine Reserve so I could do anti-monopoly work, but instead I extended on active duty for a year so that I could work on procurement in an office under the Undersecretary of Defense for Research and Engineering. Which meant I spent a decent amount of time over at Congress and again at the White House- this time with the administration's innovation people. What I learned during those four years is that there's a reason why the first Trump administration accomplished so little of what it set out to do, and why the two big campaign promises that actually turned into reality were basically (1) a massive tax cut for the richest people and corporations and (2) getting a heavy corporate-leaning supreme court majority that overturned Roe (the promise), but also did a lot of other bad things for everyday people. The reason that that administration's accomplishments were so limited is because governing is actually pretty hard and takes a lot of work. Turning campaign promises into policy and then that policy into action takes a lot of people with the same goals working to make it happen and people who know what levers to pull and buttons to press. The common theme between those two promises that were kept? They were both organized by Mitch McConnell and the corporate wing of the Republican Party. Say what you will about them, those guys know how to enact policy, which is how the over the past few decades. The first Trump team, however? Not so much. And one reason is that there wasn't much of a team when you got down to it. Trump appointed people to enact his vision in the government at . Seven months into his administration, after a discussion on Fox & Friends on how he still hadn't nominated anyone for 366 senior positions, he tweeted: "We are not looking to fill all those positions. Don't need many of them - reduce size of government." Only, what I learned on the Joint Staff and at the Undersecretary of Defense's office is that this resistance or inability to nominate people for those positions meant that, instead of his people driving the government toward his vision, the so-called deep state- a consistent target of his and Stephen Bannon's ire- actually ended up running the country. I experienced that personally. During his campaign, Trump talked a lot about our allies not carrying their load and how he was going to fix it. Believe it or not, I discovered that this was true and actually a real problem during my arms control work. Over and over again I met with military leaders of our western European allies to remind them of and share intelligence on the Russian military modernization and preparations for military expansion. Whenever I asked them to take hard positions on Russia at these meetings, they would hem and haw and say that yes, their military was very worried about it, but that their government just wouldn't let them be aggressive about it. Why? Because their countries were meeting their energy needs with cheap Russian natural gas. A deep irony considering that by buying that gas, these countries were funding Russia's very military modernization that their militaries were so worried about! And rather than take a hard position on Russia and stop funding Putin's ambitions, do you know what their governments did instead? They asked the US to send over more troops and equipment to protect them from the very Russian military threat that they were funding. And, of course, we did, because that's what we do no matter who the President is, including Trump. The administrations of both Presidents Obama and Trump (and later Biden) through the European Deterrence Initiative, provided European security to the tune of for the very countries that were funding the threat. So while Trump's political campaign vision on allies, at least in the niche circumstance of conventional arms control, would have been both helpful and welcome at the meetings and negotiations I was a part of took at NATO HQ, in Brussels, Belgium, and at something called the Organization for Security and Cooperation in Europe (the OSCE), in Vienna, Austria, it never made it down to us because they didn't know how to turn politics into policy and action. In this case, the Trump administration did not have an Ambassador to the OSCE for the entire time I was there. He came in just as I was leaving, more than two and a half years into Trump's four year term. Other countries didn't think that the US took the negotiations seriously, since we never had an ambassador, so they had incentive to take hard positions on Russia no matter what we said in our lopsided delegations. And believe me, they were lopsided. When Putin sent hand-picked retired generals to represent Russia in negotiations and presentations, the United States sent me, a Marine Major, because that's who was in the Pentagon office dealing with treaties and the administration hadn't picked someone. | | ---|---|--- Representing the United States as a Marine Major across from Russian General Zolotarev on the degrading security situation in Europe. Without an ambassador, the delegation to the OSCE was led by career state department personnel - and much of the official policy and guidance they had to operate under was still from the Obama presidency. That's what happens when you don't know how or don't choose to govern. Sometimes, when I was at one negotiation or another, the President would tweet something that was indirectly relevant to our work. Allies and other countries' representatives would run up and ask what it meant, and if it changed anything. It was an awkward position for us to be in because our answer was always no, even if the President had just said something contradicting our positions. Because tweets don't change policy, orders and official documents change policy. There's a reason for that. Things might be said in a tweet or in the media for another purpose. To mislead, to create negotiating space, or who knows what other reason. So we can only take positions that are officially communicated to us because we don't know why and aren't in a position to guess at the reason for saying something through an unofficial channel. But official guidance and presence was much less frequent because there were few people in position to push it. When positions are vacant, or those positions are filled by people who are more interested in glamor than in governing, politics aren't turned into policy and your policies aren't turned into action because the levers of government aren't properly operated. The first Trump Administration actually had a few people at the beginning of the first term who knew how to govern, but as they were fired, quit, or just moved on, that number dwindled to almost nothing, and many of those who were left behind were only doing it for their own career advancement and notoriety, not to actually accomplish anything. So, ultimately, after having significant power through most of the Trump administration, by the end, the government bureaucracy that the administration hated so much essentially had complete control. For example, almost - and basically all of the higher ones- were vacant near the end, essentially leaving the Joint Staff to run the US military without real civilian oversight. Which is not how it's supposed to be. Now, here we are on round two, and the Trump team seems to have discovered that they really failed to enact their policies last time because they didn't appoint anyone. So they are making nominations at light speed this time. But their nominations are... well... curious, to say the least. And if this is who they have available for the highest positions in our country, can you imagine who it's going to be at the middle level appointed positions where most of the work actually happens? My guess is there will be very few people who actually know how to turn campaign promises into policy and then action. For those who do, they could very well get caught up fighting the DOGE bros, who are going to want to have their fingers in absolutely everything as they try to diminish the government's power to do anything at all. Time will tell who ultimately is nominated and approved and how fast, but these are some of the things to think about as the administration comes in and tries to move forward. The more the DOGE bros mix it up and the more show horse vs workhorse appointments there are, the fewer campaign promises will be turned into action. Because it's not usually the flashy folks who are effective, it's the ones you've never heard of, like his Department of the Interior team from the first administration. They successfully flaunted Congressional hearings, , and managed to make it much easier for private enterprise to convert public land into private profit. Because, again, say what you will about the corporate wing of the Republican Party (sellouts, cowards, crooks, whatever), but there's a reason they have all lined up behind Trump: they know how to govern, and when they get their people in, or they choose the legislative agenda, they deliver for themselves. In that case, if it's mostly flash at the top and a few corporatists in the most extractive but overlooked positions, it's likely to be few campaign promises turned to action, a lot of noise at the top, and a lot of tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans and corporate America. And not much else. As always, let me know what you are seeing and think in the comments and please share with anyone you think might be interested! Until next time. Lucas Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I've Got A BIG Announcement To Share w/You!
body:
I am beyond excited to share with you that in 2025, Sheridan.Church will be getting an outside facelift along with the installation of an outdoor bask
| | |
---
I am _beyond excited_ to share with you that in 2025, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10191.1.6730b939e3dc84b23615fc9077226bbc) will be getting an **outside facelift** along with the **installation of an outdoor basketball/pickle-ball court** targeting the next generation! With your help previously, we have taken a **former night-club** and _transformed_ it into a **beautiful church** on the inside. Now it's time to tackle the outside. **Phase 1** of this project (outside facelift + basketball/pickle-ball court) will cost the church around $250,000. We do things on a cash basis at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10192.1.a40766bea65a4344859618f597d5ec7a) and _I need your help_. Please consider partnering with us in 2025 with a gift of **$25** , **$250** , **$2500** _or more_. This message is going out to **thousands of believers** and if everybody will do something in 2025, we can accomplish this phase of transforming a **former tavern** into a **tabernacle**. Take a look at the pictures below! **Phase 2** is the addition of an upper deck of seating to our main auditorium. You can give by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10193.1.825f8c253f5b64f85ad9549d9b6c5f29) Thank you in advance!
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

You are invited to come _meet_ and _hear_ from [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10196.1.34b6d3f139c2b20425f425d5f29b790a) on Thursday, March 6 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10197.1.3828a2df6730cbe6c946991b70cb681f) in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had **Eric** at **Sheridan** and it was an incredible event. You can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/livetrump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10198.1.704177d48a0d24c775d13cb76b929d31) However, this March will be even better because **President Trump** will already be in the **White House** and we will hear _exclusive insights_ from **Eric** of what is taking place in the **Trump administration**. There will also be other guests at this event that we will announce as we get closer. Seating is **VERY** limited for this event. Please [RSVP](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10199.1.3c28c71ab3b46ab0081b25c63b00fead) here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10200.1.9f323a511c2618df5b174dbdf32afd92) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Eric Trump | Tulsa, OK ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10201.1.047c32d28900d2184b3fd04495f00523)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10202.1.7a1a68a29d4987096e092f94b1281617), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10203.1.db54aa2be0b2ba49070dfe059455040b), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10204.1.794acac53f418efa7b72e697dcd15253)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10205.1.c8523b66395c187ae5d32d071e02ee93), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10206.1.e1facaa084e39d52900c192b0f688d36), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10207.1.d3fd48da8a127bed395028f2a11f3f31), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10208.1.1c5c740e74f2bf3cf1e48172817a3cba), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10209.1.15ce7d1443221450bd45fcb70acdc17d), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10210.1.510615af51dae4a45536c5c84d0966c5), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10211.1.84f1d395cb84291d1426a54a05b7830a), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10212.1.183b040dc1cd2b4850b9622afdf7b2de), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18777722.10213.1.494c1d8fa72373fb98b78f7e087affaf) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Make sure Congress hears you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
So many people depend on the USPS. Not just our fellow citizens, but businesses as well, where private shipping companies and retailers depend on USPS for "final mile" delivery where it's not profitable for their business to do the delivery.
Privatizing the Postal Service would make USPS focus on profit, too, and not service, inevitably leading to route cuts and ending delivery in rural areas and elsewhere. It's not anything close to what our founders intended.
Make your voice heard: Tell Congress you don't want to see the USPS privatized ever! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_1&amount=25]
Folks,
The United States Postal Service has served every corner of our nation for nearly 250 years. But Trump and his billionaire allies want to rip it apart, placing profits over an essential public service. Their dangerous plan to privatize the USPS threatens rural communities, Indigenous communities, seniors, veterans, small businesses, and many millions of Americans who rely on affordable, reliable mail service.
It's simple: Privatization means higher costs, reduced access, and the elimination of mail services in areas where private companies refuse to deliver. For rural Americans, this isn’t just inconvenient, it’s catastrophic, especially for mail-in ballots.
Please, step up and tell Congress: Do NOT privatize the USPS now or ever! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
A coalition of groups stopped Trump’s last privatization push in 2018 with overwhelming, bipartisan public outcry. But this time, the stakes are higher. Trump is working with his billionaire friends Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and other MAGA allies to pressure Congress into dismantling this beloved institution.
The USPS isn’t just a service; it’s a promise to every American. That’s why both parties came together in 2022 to pass the Postal Service Reform Act with overwhelming bipartisan support. Even Postmaster Louis DeJoy stepped up to lobby Congress at the time. They knew privatization was wrong then, and it’s wrong now .
The USPS is America’s lifeline, delivering to every corner of the nation. We cannot let it be picked apart, sold for its parts, and placed into the hands of Wall Street billionaires. We must raise our voices louder than ever to protect the USPS.
Add your name and make it clear to Congress: We won't let you privatize our critical postal service >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_1&amount=25]

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans.
