clean_body: So many people depend on the USPS. Not just our fellow citizens, but businesses as well, where private shipping companies and retailers depend on USPS for "final mile" delivery where it's not profitable for their business to do the delivery. Privatizing the Postal Service would make USPS focus on profit, too, and not service, inevitably leading to route cuts and ending delivery in rural areas and elsewhere. It's not anything close to what our founders intended. Make your voice heard: Tell Congress you don't want to see the USPS privatized ever! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Folks, The United States Postal Service has served every corner of our nation for nearly 250 years. But Trump and his billionaire allies want to rip it apart, placing profits over an essential public service. Their dangerous plan to privatize the USPS threatens rural communities, Indigenous communities, seniors, veterans, small businesses, and many millions of Americans who rely on affordable, reliable mail service. It's simple: Privatization means higher costs, reduced access, and the elimination of mail services in areas where private companies refuse to deliver. For rural Americans, this isn’t just inconvenient, it’s catastrophic, especially for mail-in ballots. Please, step up and tell Congress: Do NOT privatize the USPS now or ever! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] A coalition of groups stopped Trump’s last privatization push in 2018 with overwhelming, bipartisan public outcry. But this time, the stakes are higher. Trump is working with his billionaire friends Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and other MAGA allies to pressure Congress into dismantling this beloved institution. The USPS isn’t just a service; it’s a promise to every American. That’s why both parties came together in 2022 to pass the Postal Service Reform Act with overwhelming bipartisan support. Even Postmaster Louis DeJoy stepped up to lobby Congress at the time. They knew privatization was wrong then, and it’s wrong now . The USPS is America’s lifeline, delivering to every corner of the nation. We cannot let it be picked apart, sold for its parts, and placed into the hands of Wall Street billionaires. We must raise our voices louder than ever to protect the USPS. Add your name and make it clear to Congress: We won't let you privatize our critical postal service >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

In just 24 hours, Virginia Democrats will face off against extreme Republicans in two majority-defining special elections. This is one of the first opportunities for Dems to gain momentum in 2025. | | |

**In just 24 hours, Virginia Democrats will face off against extreme Republicans in two all-important special elections.** This is one of the first opportunities for Democrats to gain momentum in 2025, and if we want to start the new year off on the right foot, we must secure victories and defend our majorities in Virginia’s legislature. Later this month, Trump will begin his second term with Republican majorities in the U.S. House and Senate. State legislatures will be the last line of defense against the MAGA agenda. Winning in Virginia tomorrow will _prove_ Democrats are ready to fight back in the states. | Join President Trump at the MAGA Victory Rally in DC!
---

| Massachusetts Republicans,
Get ready for an unforgettable evening! Join President Donald J. Trump at the Make America Great Again Victory Rally at Capital One Arena.
📅 Event Details:
* When:
* January 19th
* 3:00 PM
* Where: Capital One Arena, Washington, D.C.

🎟️ Registration Details:

* **TOP NEWS**

"**ERCOT issues weather watch ahead of freezing weather conditions across Texas,** " Dallas Morning News' **Zacharia Washington** -- "ERCOT, the electrical grid operator for most of Texas, issued a weather watch Sunday evening ahead of an Arctic air blast expected to bring freezing temperatures and bitterly cold weather conditions this week to a wide swath of the state.

The watch, which begins Monday and runs through Friday, was issued "due to forecasted cold weather across the ERCOT region, higher electrical demand, and the potential for lower reserves."

Grid conditions, however, are expected to be normal during the weather watch period, ERCOT stated in the advisory. The [watch does not indicate](https://substack.com/redirect/520b555b-a120-40d5-8f49-688808edcecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the state will see any widespread outages or that ERCOT will call for energy conservation, but it does signal a higher than expected demand on Texas' power infrastructure.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/1e031558-124b-49ec-b1f8-9916cbab9550?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/1e031558-124b-49ec-b1f8-9916cbab9550?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
An arctic air mass has arrived in North Texas, ushering in below-freezing temperatures, extremely cold weather conditions and a chance later in the week for wintry precipitation, according to the National Weather Service.

The extreme cold will linger in the region over the next several days, with temperatures expected to rise above freezing most days before dropping again each evening.

To view real-time power supply conditions, visit _The Dallas Morning News '_ [ERCOT hub](https://substack.com/redirect/d01a8fca-0bce-4d32-a65a-14073fe684b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "ERCOT issues weather watch ahead of freezing weather conditions across Texas, " Dallas Morning News' Zacharia Washington -- "ERCOT, the electrical grid operator for most of Texas, issued a weather watch Sunday evening ahead of an Arctic air blast expected to bring freezing temperatures and bitterly cold weather conditions this week to a wide swath of the state. The watch, which begins Monday and runs through Friday, was issued "due to forecasted cold weather across the ERCOT region, higher electrical demand, and the potential for lower reserves." Grid conditions, however, are expected to be normal during the weather watch period, ERCOT stated in the advisory. The the state will see any widespread outages or that ERCOT will call for energy conservation, but it does signal a higher than expected demand on Texas' power infrastructure. An arctic air mass has arrived in North Texas, ushering in below-freezing temperatures, extremely cold weather conditions and a chance later in the week for wintry precipitation, according to the National Weather Service. The extreme cold will linger in the region over the next several days, with temperatures expected to rise above freezing most days before dropping again each evening. To view real-time power supply conditions, visit The Dallas Morning News ' ." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. body:
Now is our chance to fight back

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDEwNl9YQS1NVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1OTI1OTItMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAxMDZfWEEtTVYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNTkyNTkyLTI4OTkifQ/bk0u--iU1fXD8FX4f-lmBQ)

Peter,

I’m hitting the ground running to hold China accountable. From buying up American farmland to stealing our technology, the threats are clear – and I need your voice to help guide my actions.

[**I’ve launched my Defend Against China Survey, and your input is critical. This is your chance to shape the policies I’ll prioritize in my first months in Congress.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDEwNl9YQS1NVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1OTI1OTItMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAxMDZfWEEtTVYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNTkyNTkyLTI4OTkifQ/s0rPdqZw9Kw9ixvAa8xR3A)

Thank you for standing with me,
Troy Downing

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I am honored to serve as chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I am honored to serve as chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee.
| | |
---
Friend, I am incredibly honored to serve as chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee. And I'm grateful to Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer for entrusting me with this important role.
From now until Election Day in 2026, I will work my hardest to recruit the strongest possible Democratic candidates, help them build exceptional and energized campaigns and ensure they have every resource needed to win. I am confident that we will protect our Democratic incumbents, mount strong challenges in our battleground races and look to expand our efforts into some unexpected states.

I took on a long-term Republican incumbent in a district with a 2-to-1 Republican majority — and won. _I know what it takes to win in red and purple places,_ and I look forward to helping the next generation of Senate candidates do the same.
Thank you, friend, for your incredible support and for trusting me as we prepare for the fight ahead. **Now, it's time to get to work. **

Kirsten

* **TOP NEWS**

"**ERCOT issues weather watch ahead of freezing weather conditions across Texas,** " Dallas Morning News' **Zacharia Washington** -- "ERCOT, the electrical grid operator for most of Texas, issued a weather watch Sunday evening ahead of an Arctic air blast expected to bring freezing temperatures and bitterly cold weather conditions this week to a wide swath of the state.

The watch, which begins Monday and runs through Friday, was issued "due to forecasted cold weather across the ERCOT region, higher electrical demand, and the potential for lower reserves."

Grid conditions, however, are expected to be normal during the weather watch period, ERCOT stated in the advisory. The [watch does not indicate](https://substack.com/redirect/6c8c35d4-6157-4120-8ec9-e64db85d90fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the state will see any widespread outages or that ERCOT will call for energy conservation, but it does signal a higher than expected demand on Texas' power infrastructure.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/c1aaa91e-3ebd-4c44-8029-b7e359697dec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/c1aaa91e-3ebd-4c44-8029-b7e359697dec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
An arctic air mass has arrived in North Texas, ushering in below-freezing temperatures, extremely cold weather conditions and a chance later in the week for wintry precipitation, according to the National Weather Service.

The extreme cold will linger in the region over the next several days, with temperatures expected to rise above freezing most days before dropping again each evening.

To view real-time power supply conditions, visit _The Dallas Morning News '_ [ERCOT hub](https://substack.com/redirect/d3fcd03b-3554-49d0-b1a0-8ef312ad0b24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "ERCOT issues weather watch ahead of freezing weather conditions across Texas, " Dallas Morning News' Zacharia Washington -- "ERCOT, the electrical grid operator for most of Texas, issued a weather watch Sunday evening ahead of an Arctic air blast expected to bring freezing temperatures and bitterly cold weather conditions this week to a wide swath of the state. The watch, which begins Monday and runs through Friday, was issued "due to forecasted cold weather across the ERCOT region, higher electrical demand, and the potential for lower reserves." Grid conditions, however, are expected to be normal during the weather watch period, ERCOT stated in the advisory. The the state will see any widespread outages or that ERCOT will call for energy conservation, but it does signal a higher than expected demand on Texas' power infrastructure. An arctic air mass has arrived in North Texas, ushering in below-freezing temperatures, extremely cold weather conditions and a chance later in the week for wintry precipitation, according to the National Weather Service. The extreme cold will linger in the region over the next several days, with temperatures expected to rise above freezing most days before dropping again each evening. To view real-time power supply conditions, visit The Dallas Morning News ' ." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. * **TOP NEWS**

“**ERCOT issues weather watch ahead of freezing weather conditions across Texas,** ” Dallas Morning News' **Zacharia Washington** — “ERCOT, the electrical grid operator for most of Texas, issued a weather watch Sunday evening ahead of an Arctic air blast expected to bring freezing temperatures and bitterly cold weather conditions this week to a wide swath of the state.

The watch, which begins Monday and runs through Friday, was issued “due to forecasted cold weather across the ERCOT region, higher electrical demand, and the potential for lower reserves.”

Grid conditions, however, are expected to be normal during the weather watch period, ERCOT stated in the advisory. The [watch does not indicate](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_lluvBHObVnWYoJIkX6OvcFSmkxzYPimgtBpe8t-mzWTuTtTG5xwK3UZXFC8RjbOGa5ivlrIwDrI4Cmf6nF-kG4OV81CyWxN5PCTP3RXcDBykz1EFV2KqJOjExA5020gc1pon7QABZo-yiVEi1nSRmcF1_tO6mokXwOqFvEc9puGPUMF0kjV3_mvIyPx1IqNG1V-IDluql2IvdGhHCayopis_zKSj6DShj2Oh1l2ztw8zhOq7B98BoZaRWnU-CG1-ns2qtz1yEjIBGSgTztQ1jKCLibsO2pXLZ31o0MDxeZcpkzvj7wjDXFgWTjRGgkP34jF-SmHxF9rUalWwlj_h649afaKmovS2lKumc5adj3shnLtrOkW_q_k6KNCr7-17-h0UHdLFhwQTITbEetz6R05E2-7Rctca8SiAb8B8LEFzNFKzIeb_stIbczwxIBJb9DLidgizzUwvbnwSJC7cWl3lj8vm0U7ZzTOSK70GdDZg-k5HcphSTt_4j6r1sRXDnlOWF02mjWl4JiYRz8HgyER_YqxG9KEXbmBcaORCv_0g/4cx/dYAbKJRsT_6YZ7LcDwPjeA/h13/h001.GjPSlPB84yxslJKsRPumQeyS-ytN3wHxMDQOJE8UtBQ) the state will see any widespread outages or that ERCOT will call for energy conservation, but it does signal a higher than expected demand on Texas’ power infrastructure.

An arctic air mass has arrived in North Texas, ushering in below-freezing temperatures, extremely cold weather conditions and a chance later in the week for wintry precipitation, according to the National Weather Service.

The extreme cold will linger in the region over the next several days, with temperatures expected to rise above freezing most days before dropping again each evening.

The watch, which begins Monday and runs through Friday, was issued “due to forecasted cold weather across the ERCOT region, higher electrical demand, and the potential for lower reserves.” Grid conditions, however, are expected to be normal during the weather watch period, ERCOT stated in the advisory. The the state will see any widespread outages or that ERCOT will call for energy conservation, but it does signal a higher than expected demand on Texas’ power infrastructure. » » An arctic air mass has arrived in North Texas, ushering in below-freezing temperatures, extremely cold weather conditions and a chance later in the week for wintry precipitation, according to the National Weather Service. The extreme cold will linger in the region over the next several days, with temperatures expected to rise above freezing most days before dropping again each evening. name: Andy Kim
subject: A caretaker for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
As we reflect on the events of four years ago...
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99957166/521297347/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGRlNTNhMC00Y2NjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKRnte9lzQ94cyw39TLVTEHO9FkOPjTwPKmCWHKIOSM=&emci=f2e98c50-3fcc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=58de53a0-4ccc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=26261389)
---

| | As we reflect on the events of four years ago, I believe that the lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot but the selfish silence and purposeful amnesia afterward that greatly damaged our democracy. After the riot took place, I walked out the center doors of the House chamber, the same doors that Presidents walk through to give the State of the Union. Just hours earlier, they'd been smashed and barricaded. Security officers had drawn their guns. Again, guns were drawn on the House floor. As I walked the halls away from the chamber, I kept thinking, maybe our nation lost its ability to be shocked. After January 6, could something actually shock us to the point where we rediscover our shared identity and common good like our nation has in the past? Then I reached the Rotunda. To see that room – the most beautiful room in the most beautiful building in America – desecrated and strewn with trash broke my heart. I got on my knees and started to pick up. As I cleaned up the debris, I wandered down a side hall and saw a plaque: "Beneath this tablet the cornerstone...was laid by George Washington." I stood there holding a bag of torn flags and broken glass, reminded that this building is bigger than all of us. I realized at that moment that I am but a mere caretaker of this building. **This realization of being a caretaker fundamentally changed the way I see my job. Changed how I see the responsibility of being a citizen. Our democracy was handed to us, and on our watch, we must do our best to preserve it and then pass it off to those who follow.** Look, I don't want to keep living through history. I'd rather be able to spend more time with my little boys, but this is just the moment that we're in. I refuse to believe that my kids are doomed to grow up in a broken, divided America. I want to help build a future where we can look at our kids and their kids and tell them that this is a country where I can guarantee that they will have a better life and more opportunities than we do. That's what I want. It's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to get our country back on track. And if I believe that in my heart, the question then is, what am I going to do about it? **My answer to that is that I'm going to be a caretaker of our democracy and lead in the Senate. I hope you join me in this mission.** More soon, _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

clean_body: As we reflect on the events of four years ago... | | | | As we reflect on the events of four years ago, I believe that the lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot but the selfish silence and purposeful amnesia afterward that greatly damaged our democracy. After the riot took place, I walked out the center doors of the House chamber, the same doors that Presidents walk through to give the State of the Union. Just hours earlier, they'd been smashed and barricaded. Security officers had drawn their guns. Again, guns were drawn on the House floor. As I walked the halls away from the chamber, I kept thinking, maybe our nation lost its ability to be shocked. After January 6, could something actually shock us to the point where we rediscover our shared identity and common good like our nation has in the past? Then I reached the Rotunda. To see that room – the most beautiful room in the most beautiful building in America – desecrated and strewn with trash broke my heart. I got on my knees and started to pick up. As I cleaned up the debris, I wandered down a side hall and saw a plaque: "Beneath this tablet the cornerstone...was laid by George Washington." I stood there holding a bag of torn flags and broken glass, reminded that this building is bigger than all of us. I realized at that moment that I am but a mere caretaker of this building. This realization of being a caretaker fundamentally changed the way I see my job. Changed how I see the responsibility of being a citizen. Our democracy was handed to us, and on our watch, we must do our best to preserve it and then pass it off to those who follow. Look, I don't want to keep living through history. I'd rather be able to spend more time with my little boys, but this is just the moment that we're in. I refuse to believe that my kids are doomed to grow up in a broken, divided America. I want to help build a future where we can look at our kids and their kids and tell them that this is a country where I can guarantee that they will have a better life and more opportunities than we do. That's what I want. It's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to get our country back on track. And if I believe that in my heart, the question then is, what am I going to do about it? My answer to that is that I'm going to be a caretaker of our democracy and lead in the Senate. I hope you join me in this mission. More soon, Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c35c1ca03d5442a988e5088665f0b4c&_e=yOtksiMi1T76bUoxtPyiidrHhWFXfxsnitoInuq_MVfwXXDVcEZS-qz_OKpB86dMjGnCC_Jsp8mDEb4NOqH8RfHFfATatxhItwtHAFcOOCijxjQ8Ta799RvmD5Kr1sbtds8Iv2GNsxOHDi_rgwRqWMnDiOcYOyuJpwyXRma_wF4EVIDj2mrLWbCuR4r02Lc0gOkBwDGovdoFYm8kybm6ImWezkAXjH2kAgxFvEb8eufDatsgsSuRr4DMa2-Ed3tsSEn3VVdWbHR5hla6MVn6Y3CU4vfGO3brBtaNoNYhxRi8RUBL8oWQ3otK9dBxBHXmyH3pCDKi-7UQMKdwALnFrhE4DfUodTfDC66HlVXLj2winijJwH0kAezo5fIgiuI0sQUBcWhGmgrM4-4t_BclXw%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c35c1ca03d5442a988e5088665f0b4c&_e=yOtksiMi1T76bUoxtPyiidrHhWFXfxsnitoInuq_MVfwXXDVcEZS-qz_OKpB86dMjGnCC_Jsp8mDEb4NOqH8RfHFfATatxhItwtHAFcOOCijxjQ8Ta799RvmD5Kr1sbtds8Iv2GNsxOHDi_rgwRqWMnDiOcYOyuJpwyXRma_wF4EVIDj2mrLWbCuR4r02Lc0gOkBwDGovdoFYm8kybm6ImWezkAXjH2kAgxFvEb8eufDatsgsSuRr4DMa2-Ed3tspQKc6QBo_xjjdVrShG1Zacv2OgZZtlpYWsjn0FmS2UYS0NdXB0BMo-MmVjCUFusV_JzP_XJruTm7L73OQHH2YtAolbhkEDocYvqa3waJM3soKqhacMOPvDX9Z7Tx22vE9CWn7nzbi1PM0kJ3IDVgfQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c35c1ca03d5442a988e5088665f0b4c&_e=yOtksiMi1T76bUoxtPyiidrHhWFXfxsnitoInuq_MVfwXXDVcEZS-qz_OKpB86dMjGnCC_Jsp8mDEb4NOqH8RfHFfATatxhItwtHAFcOOCijxjQ8Ta799RvmD5Kr1sbtds8Iv2GNsxOHDi_rgwRqWMnDiOcYOyuJpwyXRma_wF4EVIDj2mrLWbCuR4r02Lc0gOkBwDGovdoFYm8kybm6ImWezkAXjH2kAgxFvEb8eufDatsgsSuRr4DMa2-Ed3ts7PXE2Ciu0UuOG0wrsr3MAGqqW9SS0HekITbzRCr7jXd706m_6iiuv6socQApGkBJSohQFtYfyJc-Zwl7dvZTzscK7vQ3H-slrcFioDHA5BffsSN_xVtBKgBbQRGDW9i9KoNFBAuZwU8VTyHfMjb18Q%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

_I wouldn't know it yet, but my life was about to change forever._

I'd be attacked. Beaten with clubs, baseball bats. Sprayed with WD-40, pepper spray, bear spray. Called slurs that I'd never been called in my life.

An angry mob, emboldened by Donald Trump and MAGA-extremists pushing the Big Lie, would storm the Capitol. Never caring about the lives of me and my fellow officers. They destroyed a sacred place, an institution dedicated to upholding the rule of law. And they attempted to destroy democracy.

**My life changed on January 6. It's the reason I've spent the last 4 years fighting.**

**[Our fight for democracy is never over, especially with Donald Trump taking office two weeks from today. I need you to dig deep right now. This thing can load 10 rounds in less than 9 seconds - No exaggeration! Plus it works for 9mm and .40 S&W. **[Grab your Ammo Speed Loader for 70% Off + Free S&H!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19626/6374453/6c28b81c7e778873cb32cb2c0f28ce32fa8c33a1/2b8b27dba6023da7af1c952f89e1e1182ddbd8e7)** _-John, G., Gunner Gear_

subject: Discover What They Don’t Want You to Know: The Great Reset
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5999abf6f8044437bca1e14a9f98657c&_e=0n3jzI5TPbUHJKbzdfi9NWAtYdYYLYfG9cquf4PqxzOj2Ib88JAPQLfc5bzoyOBa8QiC15GjXOrhYvhF2RWsLF2DJwn0ywyWrKeyqd_N43YvVb15SznnS1mGI8xpGBvKrsrHJW84LL40mVR5WZ4dy0sB7M73NWBx-qEE207rMjCjBQHntHdus2B_iUtqnHEDmv9oV72B14Xia4AUZ96KTq5VkCXk2qGSD0eK4mLwDNXIDhsXdMSZZKVZc7TroAdmDImdHqisn2j-4l6ebPsnUQx58V3ZlO05CApv1TvyZtq5x1F9t7K15NSZoU23qFOSctaLA6QeV5ArFj_zI_mu2gOWQYXEF6BTCPSrZ09NIqpP-egQ2IcnofbZ8TgLAljLslqXva7s3xRRz3xzanTOsQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5999abf6f8044437bca1e14a9f98657c&_e=0n3jzI5TPbUHJKbzdfi9NWAtYdYYLYfG9cquf4PqxzOj2Ib88JAPQLfc5bzoyOBa8QiC15GjXOrhYvhF2RWsLF2DJwn0ywyWrKeyqd_N43YvVb15SznnS1mGI8xpGBvKrsrHJW84LL40mVR5WZ4dy0sB7M73NWBx-qEE207rMjCjBQHntHdus2B_iUtqnHEDmv9oV72B14Xia4AUZ96KTq5VkCXk2qGSD0eK4mLwDNXIDhsXdMSZZKVZc7TroAdmZ7Ttt0azPUUaVW9wj1vOnoXGFGCQPlzM1WLJwE5BKjKqMpVs5zhqpDx0-zol-6HzpEevg-R9RAt77SveZ4vBAFRBnkQanMWC8NOqyQnhI7zzS2AQUnSSkpzsgEZNfjDANe5dt5xtCLIp5b4EsW6Wyg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5999abf6f8044437bca1e14a9f98657c&_e=0n3jzI5TPbUHJKbzdfi9NWAtYdYYLYfG9cquf4PqxzOj2Ib88JAPQLfc5bzoyOBa8QiC15GjXOrhYvhF2RWsLF2DJwn0ywyWrKeyqd_N43YvVb15SznnS1mGI8xpGBvKrsrHJW84LL40mVR5WZ4dy0sB7M73NWBx-qEE207rMjCjBQHntHdus2B_iUtqnHEDmv9oV72B14Xia4AUZ96KTq5VkCXk2qGSD0eK4mLwDNXIDhsXdMSZZKVZc7TroAdmjGC6qeASPPMyRu4KSmBdh3xMSuNkPH3HK_9URBaU1GQTgd-Mo4ofZ4cv-DN-eOT-aiiVymi-PxISnkt1SuMMBKpoQm3Ltcov_Py_-VSdr46tNFVOgzj5QmmyGoqK1AnJkffKr2kH70t5zJum-eBhDA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Pat Herrity
subject: First Test of the Lieutenant Governor Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter,

Since announcing my campaign for Lieutenant Governor last Friday, I've been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support from across the Commonwealth.

This weekend I hit the campaign trail in Virginia Beach and Loudoun, and was thrilled by the enthusiastic reception from day one supporters, and volunteers already working hard gathering petitions for ballot access.

Everyone I've met is enthusiastic to continue Governor Youngkin's commonsense, conservative leadership in Richmond, and I'm thrilled at the opportunity to play a big role in continuing that legacy.

This week I'm headed to Richmond, the Shenandoah Valley, and out to Southwest Virginia to continue meeting with Republicans across the Commonwealth.

Just a few short days after announcing, my campaign is facing our first fundraising deadline of the year.

We're required to file a report disclosing contributions received prior to the beginning of the General Assembly Session in Richmond, which begins on January 8th. That means we need to disclose contributions received between my announcement on January 3rd, and the last pre-session day of January 7th.

It is **critical that we show a strong fundraising number** from these first couple of days, and a report that demonstrates **grassroots support from across the Commonwealth**.

Thankfully, a long-time friend and supporter has offered to match all contributions made before tomorrow, January 7th at midnight, up to $25,000.

Would you consider making a [contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 or even $250 to make double the impact](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=16f0d86a60&e=a1ea0f9c99) and help us maximize this supporter's generous offer?

---
| [Contribute $10](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=e90422ebd4&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=234422b768&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=fcde565abe&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=16d86852fb&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute $250](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=09342fe085&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $250")
---
|
In 2025, it is critical that Republicans hold our statewide elected offices and continue the legacy of commonsense, conservative leadership that Governor Youngkin has brought to Richmond.

I'm glad to be a part of that fight, and I'm committed to seeing it through.

I'm deeply grateful for your support, and I look forward to having the opportunity to talk more with you over the coming months!

Thank you,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

|

body:
Are you with President Trump?

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Mxe/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Fellow Patriot – Every legal scholar, political analyst, media pundit, and American patriot knows:
**The prosecution of President Trump is a political witch hunt designed to derail President Trump’s victory.**
They couldn’t **impeach him** successfully.
They couldn’t **beat him** at the polls.
So now, they are trying to **criminally sentence**** __**President Trump while he is still a private citizen.
[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Mxe/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, if you are reading this now **it still is not too late**** _._**
**__[But we need to act FAST](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Mxe/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!_**
We cannot allow this sentencing to go forward as President Trump would be wrapped up in some scam sentencing when he **_should_** be wrapped up in planning the first 100 days of his administration!
[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Mxe/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Democrats have proven that there is **nothing they will not do** to stop President Trump.
We don’t know what will happen if they are able to sentence President Trump for bogus false accusations before he officially becomes president...

So we need to be ready to fight back even harder!
**_[Will you stand with President Trump when he needs it most](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Mxe/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)?_**
_With_ _Urgency_ _,_
House GOP

name: Bryan
subject: January 6 Campaign Update
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | **January 6, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# Happening Today: Counting of the 2024 Presidential Election Results

| Today, a Joint Session of Congress will meet to count the Electoral College Votes for President-elect Donald J. Trump. Be a part of this historic event by watching **LIVE** on C-SPAN, or wherever you watch your news.

name: National Democratic Redistricting Committee
subject: Even before the attack on the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The January 6th coup attempt was not an isolated attack — nor was it the end of it.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99959876/521306568/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5ZGU2YWIxLTRmY2MtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yoApsxQSL-dCKuMQMph5XM6_TkAo_ZjEtSQDXejhpIs=&emci=fc158ad6-f0c9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=59de6ab1-4fcc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Four years ago today, we witnessed an attempted coup on the United States Capitol by insurrections who didn’t like the results of an election. Without a doubt, the January 6th attack was unprecedented, dangerous, and disruptive. But in the years leading up to it, extreme Republicans had _already_ been running a highly strategic, well-funded campaign — one committed to implementing extreme gerrymandered maps so they could manipulate the results of elections. **And the scariest part of it all is that the January 6th coup attempt was not an isolated attack — nor was it the end of it. ** Gerrymandering still poses a critical threat to our democracy, with opponents of fair maps actively undermining redistricting reforms, electing Election Deniers, and threatening mid-decade map redraws. But the story of our democracy is one of an ongoing struggle. The fight for a _truly_ representative government has existed since the beginning of our nation. And now, with an incoming Trump administration and a Republican Congress, we’re _right_ in the middle of an important chapter of our nation’s story. Are we going to succumb to the anti-democratic forces or will we defend our democracy and strengthen our country for years to come? **We know you’ll do everything you can to protect and enhance democracy. And we’re glad — and so grateful — you’re a part of the team. We can do it.** \- National Democratic Redistricting Committee | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99959878/521306572/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Jan6_email_20250106-NDRC-Tier1-Jan6_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250106-NDRC-Tier1-Jan6_&utm_campaign=Jan6&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5ZGU2YWIxLTRmY2MtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yoApsxQSL-dCKuMQMph5XM6_TkAo_ZjEtSQDXejhpIs=)

name: NEXTGENAMERICA.ORG
subject: Add your name: Tell Congress to Pass the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99960330/521308509/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmNjZDNjOS01MWNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79vGOaaxGFFR9DR23wxcp9ZjKPfcZ2bonBJcOzdyG98=&emci=c866c0e4-4fcc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f2ccd3c9-51cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
---
Happy New Year, team!
A lot’s happened since we last reached out. A new Congress has taken power. The Commanders won 12 games for the first time this century. And the Walmart “Birkin” has taken the internet by storm.
**But one thing that hasn’t changed is the need to hold the Supreme Court accountable. **
Unlike every other federal court, the Supreme Court operates without a binding code of ethics. Justices are free to accept lavish gifts, fail to disclose financial entanglements, and refuse to recuse themselves in cases of clear conflicts of interest.
There’s absolutely nothing stopping SCOTUS justices from ruling exactly the way Trump wants for the next 4 years. And if Trump is able to confirm additional justices while he’s in office, **we could be stuck with a corrupt, far-right court for _decades_.**
That’s why we partnered with our friends at Civic Shout to urge Congress to pass the **Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act**. This landmark legislation will _finally_ require justices to follow an enforceable code of ethics, make their financial disclosures more transparent, and establish clear recusal standards for cases where conflicts of interest arise.
_It just makes sense._
[Add your name TODAY and demand that Congress pass the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act. Let’s make it clear that no one — not even a Supreme Court justice — is above the law.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99960332/521308516/930642518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmNjZDNjOS01MWNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79vGOaaxGFFR9DR23wxcp9ZjKPfcZ2bonBJcOzdyG98=&emci=c866c0e4-4fcc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f2ccd3c9-51cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | Happy New Year, team! A lot’s happened since we last reached out. A new Congress has taken power. The Commanders won 12 games for the first time this century. And the Walmart “Birkin” has taken the internet by storm. But one thing that hasn’t changed is the need to hold the Supreme Court accountable. Unlike every other federal court, the Supreme Court operates without a binding code of ethics. Justices are free to accept lavish gifts, fail to disclose financial entanglements, and refuse to recuse themselves in cases of clear conflicts of interest. There’s absolutely nothing stopping SCOTUS justices from ruling exactly the way Trump wants for the next 4 years. And if Trump is able to confirm additional justices while he’s in office, we could be stuck with a corrupt, far-right court for decades. That’s why we partnered with our friends at Civic Shout to urge Congress to pass the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act. This landmark legislation will finally require justices to follow an enforceable code of ethics, make their financial disclosures more transparent, and establish clear recusal standards for cases where conflicts of interest arise. It just makes sense. | Together, NextGen America | | = |

name: Dan Goldman
subject: January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York
body:
Dan Goldman for New York [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94087/images/dsg_logo.png]
Peter,

On January 6, 2021, a swarm of rioters descended on the Capitol at the direction and incitement from then-President Donald Trump in an attempt to violently stop the peaceful transition of power.

It was a dark day for our nation, but we did not give up then. And we won’t give up now, even as Donald Trump prepares to resume office as President.

Four years later, we know there will be a peaceful transfer of power because the Democratic Party is the party of democracy. But the danger posed by Donald Trump is even greater today.

Already, Trump is nominating his most dedicated MAGA loyalists to positions of power in his cabinet and calling for the arrest of everyone who served on the House January 6th Committee and exposed his misconduct.

Our fight for this nation’s core democratic principles has never been more important.

I was just sworn in for my second term in Congress — and I am more ready than ever to get back to work defending our democracy and ensuring greater access to the American Dream.

Peter, thank you for your support of my work in this fight. The battle ahead of us will not be an easy one, but with you on my side, I will never back down.

In this together,

Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States
dangoldmanforny.com [https://www.dangoldmanforny.com/] | info@dangoldmanforny.com [info@dangoldmanforny.com]

IL House GOP Leader Tony McCombie Joins ‘Woke’ Left, Supports Insurance Coverage for Men’s ‘Cervical’ Exams and Women’s ‘Prostate’ Screenings (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/il-house-gop-leader-tony-mccombie-joins-woke-left-supports-insurance-coverage-for-mens-cervical-exams-and-womens-prostate-screenings.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=62d26a9b46-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/il-house-gop-leader-tony-mccombie-joins-woke-left-supports-insurance-coverage-for-mens-cervical-exams-and-womens-prostate-screenings.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=62d26a9b46-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
IL House GOP Leader Tony McCombie. (Tony McCombie/Facebook)
By Illinois Review

Illinois House Republican Minority leader Tony McCombie, Dist. 89, joined the progressive wing of the Democratic Party to support legislation that requires insurance coverage for “cervical” exams for males and “prostate” exams for females in 2023 – just months after her election as leader.

House Bill 2350, which was introduced by Democratic State Rep. Kelly Cassidy, Dist. 14, on February 14, 2023, sought to amend the Illinois Insurance Code and require coverage to include an “annual cervical smear or Pap smear test for all (rather than female) insureds.” The legislation also required coverage to include an “annual prostate cancer screening for insureds (rather than male insureds) upon the recommendation of a physician licensed to practice medicine...”

The law went into effect on January 1, 2025.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8beb82ee4b174f05b1e1bff80d40ee14&_e=HdPzGe4Hn8lKFJWWBVrFdXbDQgsdQvRwx5cfK_YpZGidHtOF7-pih1_KTuxjFHa-4VDj8qinjf0LsZnuCcp-YO1zTBmjZC-bBbeAobFWwqQCBsCNATR5HLykI9d9ahTIqNgCSzvsI7Ds88sB_aEsYW7aL7u0X83xqcZcFmF8LBALfso1zRE5kdcCmnVLPqdddNd-tibqPk3OFn6HdPV5odC12o5R6tHNDwTzk7nHF4yo8zyToafCaBIjg0RLjJ4rKCai5lxcqUeqjazJpCR2aH-8WYXSm16iOKmvW84tXe4b2NYXIXL4bNNOsaFJKmAdVVihaOST5NPH1MGe1mg87E36fZTYB6x1JWGxU5wwY2gPjY2gAsQwFHI9uQxISfqby9rkIsbhF6fXw2A3G3xz-w%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8beb82ee4b174f05b1e1bff80d40ee14&_e=HdPzGe4Hn8lKFJWWBVrFdXbDQgsdQvRwx5cfK_YpZGidHtOF7-pih1_KTuxjFHa-4VDj8qinjf0LsZnuCcp-YO1zTBmjZC-bBbeAobFWwqQCBsCNATR5HLykI9d9ahTIqNgCSzvsI7Ds88sB_aEsYW7aL7u0X83xqcZcFmF8LBALfso1zRE5kdcCmnVLPqdddNd-tibqPk3OFn6HdPV5odC12o5R6tHNDwTzk7nHF4xHk-SzB5q-Ctncxwcehd5r8mMGWf9rFbuM2nXOqw85_XNR7CrGCDTqjwCcMaOHpWH9YA9zUNGvdnSVM3AweDl25qO4eZGJYsJ0IQvk426Oiq_A5aFT04YMaasxrTmMfwMriYRVFzSNtQ1QP6shYc13ygw7kNGARb99XkgevFydAg%3D%3D)

clean_body: My final chance to save my home... They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me. | Dear Friend, I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you. Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration. This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my final chance to save my home. Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th. During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s truly important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that eternal “heavenly treasures” await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession. I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions. "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Chair Jaime Harrison (via Democrats.org)
subject: Our democracy
body:
---
Derek, Four years ago, the world watched as Donald Trump inspired a violent mob to storm our Capitol, attacking law enforcement and threatening our democratic institutions. Today, we especially remember the 140 officers who were injured on January 6 and those who lost their lives due to the Capitol attack. We reaffirm our commitment to making sure this kind of violent attack on our democracy never happens again. What happened on January 6, 2021, was an assault on one of America’s most fundamental freedoms: the right to have your vote counted in a free and fair election. The peaceful transfer of power is a hallmark of our democracy — especially when elections do not turn in our favor. And while our democracy has prevailed, it’s up to all of us to remain vigilant in defending the values our country was founded on. As this new administration begins, we must make sure our democratic processes and institutions continue to function in service of the American people, no matter who wins and loses. To do this, we cannot let up for even a minute. The Democratic National Committee has made historic investments in protecting voters nationwide and electing Democrats who will fight for what is right. No matter who our president is and who controls Congress, that work continues. [**If you are able, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to support these efforts.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250106_2495_fr&refcode2=2498_22930333_4C8gYK&akid=2498%2E22930333%2E4C8gYK) Today and every day, thank you for being a part of this work. Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250106_2495_fr&refcode2=2498_22930333_4C8gYK&akid=2498%2E22930333%2E4C8gYK)

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Steve Simon
subject: January 6th was not a "day of love"
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99960807/521309930/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1YzBhNmQtNTNjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zjgMlly0hTVyE8U_eWnFPVJjToWvRIQ8fgshL0Ddgnw=) | Today marks the fourth anniversary of the attack on the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 - when a mob tried by force to overturn the legitimate result of a presidential election. It was never a "day of love," as the President-elect still claims. It was an ugly and violent day; a shameful stain on our history where people died. We can never forget that. And we can't let partisans gaslight the American people about what really went on that day. What a difference four years makes. Today, virtually no one challenges the legitimacy of the recent presidential election. Gone are the chants of "stop the steal" - mostly yelled by those whose anger with the outcome of the election was a substitute for actual evidence. **Today, the strong consensus is that last November's election was fair, accurate, honest, and secure.** In Minnesota, we led the way - with sky-high turnout and a smooth election carried out by tens of thousands of friends and neighbors who did their jobs with integrity. On this day, let's resolve to protect our democracy. That means never failing to remind people how close we came four years ago to a true constitutional crisis. But it also means looking to the future; protecting the laws and procedures that work while doing even more to show the public how well our system works. We should keep moving forward by:
* Safeguarding the freedom to vote for every eligible voter.
* Pushing back against dangerous disinformation about elections.
* Protecting our election workers from threats and harassment.

Today is a grim anniversary - but also an opportunity. Even when democracy has seemed dinged and dented in recent years, it has never come close to being defeated. _**My pledge is to use the remembrance of January 6th as a strength and a power to push forward; to make elections accessible and secure for every eligible voter.**_ [**But I can't do it alone. I need to know that you're standing with me and ready to defend democracy alongside me. If you're ready, will you consider making your first contribution to my campaign in 2025? Your support makes all the difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99960808/521309931/-150123429?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250106&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1YzBhNmQtNTNjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zjgMlly0hTVyE8U_eWnFPVJjToWvRIQ8fgshL0Ddgnw=) Thank you for standing with me, Steve | | [DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99960809/521309932/-150123429?amount=25&refcode2=e35c0a6d-53cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250106&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1YzBhNmQtNTNjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zjgMlly0hTVyE8U_eWnFPVJjToWvRIQ8fgshL0Ddgnw=)

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73af0afe350c4f6bb4243c73986e80ea&_e=NtvH9dc4UcKL2x-xkvfj8emm0z4HNf7V5-f-33qZWEO9J3HobeHdtQed2AaGpLGZu9NqsxiAn1yy5noCWCI6-D5L6SJGh5UqjXxZqKOIUTJnkILJ6wmRbqcPNwG9dS3eyFBI46boyR2Was9U_z5uneH8oSSBzocRalKZuybIwW60VZg77NgOf3IM8hokMxpxqGLgOYxM4dJjPlLq8PrOvXsTMkFNhKOUexiHUkw1k9lUrgh-YYBcVIRvJFGk4L7kbX2P3EJgSG1wJHgO6dVJYNmTGK9CCwiiXX0Te6pCc6C0DfeI5gt8xx35TXF9vXAYJu8DSoSwSWH0x7LbvuCzavN0DqQz-emqpCHziLt4uqVfh0orf3T3hTiWKm3jW04pVotcNvP6DFAPJ_rgkR-YFA%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73af0afe350c4f6bb4243c73986e80ea&_e=NtvH9dc4UcKL2x-xkvfj8emm0z4HNf7V5-f-33qZWEO9J3HobeHdtQed2AaGpLGZu9NqsxiAn1yy5noCWCI6-D5L6SJGh5UqjXxZqKOIUTJnkILJ6wmRbqcPNwG9dS3eyFBI46boyR2Was9U_z5uneH8oSSBzocRalKZuybIwW60VZg77NgOf3IM8hokMxpxqGLgOYxM4dJjPlLq8PrOvXsTMkFNhKOUexiHUkw1k9kph7RIrbB9lCFl72aXKy801LMe0cV-JAkKp13NUewX9W0P8yo5aSNFYoGx94gTVBlVlkO8sAL5m-i7cWUKhiglK_pXPp0noPCEpaeY5KpL9cNAR6kLcSHTv2ruBf7-D_h_A-JGLo7HY-Ui8KYGJP457HSGFPxA-2az5eSvu8RdTQ%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73af0afe350c4f6bb4243c73986e80ea&_e=NtvH9dc4UcKL2x-xkvfj8emm0z4HNf7V5-f-33qZWEO9J3HobeHdtQed2AaGpLGZu9NqsxiAn1yy5noCWCI6-D5L6SJGh5UqjXxZqKOIUTJnkILJ6wmRbqcPNwG9dS3eyFBI46boyR2Was9U_z5uneH8oSSBzocRalKZuybIwW60VZg77NgOf3IM8hokMxpxqGLgOYxM4dJjPlLq8PrOvXsTMkFNhKOUexiHUkw1k9kJ402yw1yuP9BtCD5P2YcxwBrFNbbBfxtfLzH7ayARd2Qkmtzy3_15K0GKK6H0H9eyTU80Phge9yX_1eQNSkyL4S2t1vYmJvDtceEeWEBKTJJSGYZsZZcgFG8JuLqMyvOVLZWK6cz2WcMcGdDfzhvpnGV9hJ6FdcpM2b-fcrL0CQ%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73af0afe350c4f6bb4243c73986e80ea&_e=NtvH9dc4UcKL2x-xkvfj8emm0z4HNf7V5-f-33qZWEO9J3HobeHdtQed2AaGpLGZu9NqsxiAn1yy5noCWCI6-D5L6SJGh5UqjXxZqKOIUTJnkILJ6wmRbqcPNwG9dS3eyFBI46boyR2Was9U_z5uneH8oSSBzocRalKZuybIwW60VZg77NgOf3IM8hokMxpxqGLgOYxM4dJjPlLq8PrOvXsTMkFNhKOUexiHUkw1k9meRYnAccFQ1c4EG50LuqmIxeW7wrPZhklwflTsh62DNYFoIZk5wfkocLuwKS1vUrrC_KSllWWDR54m7ZzigohvXWT9sk3OOJpGTuIkvMz_TrERLqxfJ1Xjt6tpsU0H8cqyCLio5oXZ2WI5b8h3twhFdPGUIxnfoB5ndppIZfJHaw%3D%3D)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73af0afe350c4f6bb4243c73986e80ea&_e=NtvH9dc4UcKL2x-xkvfj8emm0z4HNf7V5-f-33qZWEO9J3HobeHdtQed2AaGpLGZu9NqsxiAn1yy5noCWCI6-D5L6SJGh5UqjXxZqKOIUTJnkILJ6wmRbqcPNwG9dS3eyFBI46boyR2Was9U_z5uneH8oSSBzocRalKZuybIwW60VZg77NgOf3IM8hokMxpxqGLgOYxM4dJjPlLq8PrOvXsTMkFNhKOUexiHUkw1k9kZJV-73HNh8okQ_J-MXPKhjd9hzRicvzESyC_2orxjCiJJJSe5S1UN1Apj7b1KYQ4aN4oGrAYMnahtjbS1ncYrKw-J-QDF2kjXgR6B-mvin18kYIs6eWZ20rUr2vWyFXVRx9K61q-eDtTVJIRl6gcStUlMEyOIYgp7TfXqc5rwQQ%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73af0afe350c4f6bb4243c73986e80ea&_e=NtvH9dc4UcKL2x-xkvfj8emm0z4HNf7V5-f-33qZWEO9J3HobeHdtQed2AaGpLGZu9NqsxiAn1yy5noCWCI6-D5L6SJGh5UqjXxZqKOIUTJnkILJ6wmRbqcPNwG9dS3eyFBI46boyR2Was9U_z5uneH8oSSBzocRalKZuybIwW60VZg77NgOf3IM8hokMxpxqGLgOYxM4dJjPlLq8PrOvXsTMkFNhKOUexiHUkw1k9lHLeyBXAP_axI_sdVUwGwbOAo8JllKTcPhOeOrfEQWEaAcmQ7m53_nrOkKqB5YQMQtquDp603cB7g64vuUeu4sf6MtL3kE95GmBUzDCrmxwvHnbDQpvuKjuAjrCQ8C5ZrVdiyPT5fHl6sYy2Y5sUatr0mfLn9QR0WhtwtdcN068w%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73af0afe350c4f6bb4243c73986e80ea&_e=NtvH9dc4UcKL2x-xkvfj8emm0z4HNf7V5-f-33qZWEO9J3HobeHdtQed2AaGpLGZu9NqsxiAn1yy5noCWCI6-D5L6SJGh5UqjXxZqKOIUTJnkILJ6wmRbqcPNwG9dS3eyFBI46boyR2Was9U_z5uneH8oSSBzocRalKZuybIwW60VZg77NgOf3IM8hokMxpxqGLgOYxM4dJjPlLq8PrOvXsTMkFNhKOUexiHUkw1k9mu9je9jg4o9IGP0dJKUWQ44tyEvM8M04d6HWu8CQDFHzgOw7CiOBBmOtecLW0542feieNMDxG94ov5C96PSQJpbGw0y5gJjGLWYnwCh84oPGnStuQOycr3SN51QfCO3xsuPP0WRrDRlr1P5tMTxY6sp9V9c0IbubpsWq1AjFGiqg%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e62b3555c04146ff84e1405cbd26bf33&_e=5rhz25xji2uBUMnXnQ8tZJaMC7HTXWkfHKlol2P2dtSGNr69deFF9koxl_fvf5zyG8_fenKW-F8nA1gOlYIgQlMlXnAX60flFa0JDpEezE88bPBge9pLL5jJFVRl6OsdtENpfzRrdWmtlETAKglKp_mpuDcqREo4H8XN5v7GeQEyqo0itJ3AsyUNV18XsZYrEi3M7Fvgv8RUn0vG8_GDRx6KXo7zPOuFTsTdH2NCELUZbdE7lEYUDUZ1hzI_JD8B_3qLa9wZe1Yqm0Wqz2Y6hZUsr76aS0UiStrdvt_a-jORnbYYo29UF4CkDTwZnarY9jPIQ0pXD_Xt4b69QILPEvNX-b_WKPugKEujwDxKJsRNe3Hf-RF3Xctdf49v9daaSFwkh9Wxu-zwkBckrBVxNg%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Peter,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Friends,

On January 6, 2021, the U.S. Capitol — recognized around the world as a symbol of democracy — was flooded with a violent mob determined to overthrow the will of the people. Confederate flags and Nazi symbols — ideas that we fought wars against — paraded through the halls of our Capitol during the election certification process.

This year’s process stands in stark contrast to the insurrectionists of that dismal day. While this November served as a bitter reminder of the work we need to do, our concessions remain peaceful.

On the other hand, Donald Trump and every member of Congress who pushed his “Big Lie” are responsible for the violence on that day. They must be held accountable for what they’ve done.

We owe it to those who risked their lives that day — and to future generations — to continue standing up for the truth.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight. Together, we will ensure that such a dark moment will never happen again.

— Team Swalwell

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99961482/521312026/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250106_EN_Swearingin_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_Swearingin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjU2ZDg1Yy01NWNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l11RHQYvK7PBDNsMPYJFPfI80mR2Rhk-ma_4Ubig2B4=&emci=a7927956-55cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3656d85c-55cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=30096098) | On Friday, the new Congress was sworn in, and my Democratic colleagues and I are ready to get to work for the American people. Thank you, I would not be able to represent our community without your continued support.

In this new session, we will face challenges stemming from unstable Republican congressional leadership and a dangerous Trump administration. But I’m determined to create solutions for New Jersey’s 12th congressional district and our country in Congress.

In this time of new beginnings, we need leaders who put the need to defend democracy ahead of their personal ambitions. With your support, I will do everything in my power to fight for our fundamental rights, families, and communities.

Serving the people in this district is an honor and I am so grateful I have been entrusted to represent you again.

Thank you,

Bonnie
---
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.
