Today is the four year anniversary of the January 6 insurrection, the most violent attack on the U.S. Capitol since the War of 1812. And in two weeks, the man behind that insurrection will once again be sworn into the White House. Below I recap how we got here, the failures of Republicans, Democrats, and Merrick Garland, and what we as Americans must do to protect our democracy going forward. It will not be easy, but it is necessary. **Let 's Address This.**
**We need all hands on deck in 2025 to stand against fascism and disinformation. I invite you to join our movement for justice as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ap4zlt8o6YUkrWzVjGngK0-puzCbrhneycZWsB-c61E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154275682)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef981e39-5171-4877-ac66-8ae06bfcd16e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I reported on January 6 as it was unfolding, the role Donald Trump played on that day, and provided updates on each anniversary (and otherwise) in subsequent anniversaries. And indeed, Donald Trump was responsible for that day, as attested to by then Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell himself, who said:
> There's no question--none--that President Trump is practically and morally responsible for provoking the events of the day. No question about it. The people who stormed this building believed they were acting on the wishes and instructions of their president. The leader of the free world cannot spend weeks thundering that shadowy forces are stealing our country and then feign surprise when people believe him and do reckless things.
The cowardice of Republicans to refuse to hold Trump accountable, while acknowledging he was "practically and morally responsible," was the first step in ensuring an insurrectionist would return to the White House. But since our standard is absolute justice, we must also recognize the role that apathetic Democrats and the failures of Merrick Garland played in this failure. First, let's revisit that painful day to ensure we bear witness to the violence and injustice enacted by Donald Trump.
## January 6, 2021
**7:49am - The day started positive with a celebration of winning both Georgia Senate Seats. I wrote the following:**
> We have officially won the White House, the US House of Representatives, and the United States Senate. Congrats to Reverand Warnock & Jon Ossoff! They went through a hell of a campaign and won with dignity.
> Perdue ran campaign ads that enlarged Ossoff's nose. Loeffler ran campaign ads that darkened Warnock's skin. Ossoff and Warnock ran on $2000 relief and science.
> Let our nation continue to rebuke hate & embrace service in every election. That is how we unite and move forward with justice. January 20 can't come soon enough.
**12:45pm - By noon we knew something was wrong, but did not yet understand how serious the situation was about to become.**
> BREAKING: While GOP in Congress try to undermine democracy, thousands of Trump supporters have breached the Capitol building, tearing down 4 layers of security fencing, & attempting to occupy the building.
> Federal police are overrun. Hill staffers asked to evacuate. This is your law and order president.
**1:25pm - By early afternoon the unprecedented happened, a peaceful transfer of power was at risk.**
> BREAKING: The GOP attempt to overturn the election is temporarily suspended because the Capitol building is on lockdown due to violent GOP voters attempting to storm the Capitol to overturn the election.
> This is what Trump wanted. This is your "law & order" President. Reprehensible. American must stand United against this injustice and hate.
**1:43pm - I took a moment to point out the massive hypocrisy in how law enforcement responded to BLM protestors versus these MAGA insurrectionists.**
> Trump supporters violently fought Capitol police & stormed the Capitol. I see no tear gas. No rubber bullets. No riot gear. The Capitol is on lockdown and House members are being told to stay in their offices and out of sight. Others are being evacuated with police protection.
> DC Mayor is calling for police backup because Capitol police are overwhelmed. Meanwhile, Rep Miller (R-IL 15) just praised Hitler on Capitol grounds. And the GOP leadership has refused to condemn this violence and terrorism.
> Black Lives Matter protestors were beat mercilessly while peacefully protesting. Violent white supremacists allowed to storm the Capitol building without issue.
**1:49pm - It was official. Trump had violently (but temporarily) stopped the peaceful transfer of power for the first time in American history.**
> My God. Extremists are now shooting firearms inside the chamber. Capitol Police have now finally deployed tear gas. The Vice President has been evacuated. Members of Congress have been evacuated.
> America's reign of a peaceful transfer of power has come to an end. This falls at Trump's feet & his enablers.
> I implore all Americans across the political spectrum to stand united against this terrorism. This is not democracy.
**3:20pm - Trump remained silent as his family members tried to appease the violent insurrectionists.**
> In a now deleted tweet, Ivanka Trump called these terrorists "American Patriots."
> Peacefully take a knee: Son of a B*tch
> Commit Insurrection: American Patriots
> In case you were wondering what they really think of the folks committing this violent insurrection.
**4:54pm - Unsurprisingly, Republicans cited a fascist dictator as their inspiration.**
> Lost in today's violence was GOP Congresswoman Mary Miller of IL-15 praising genocidal dictator Adolf Hitler on Capitol grounds.
> She proclaims "Hitler was right" in how he radicalized Hitler's youth & called on the GOP to do the same with American youth.
> How is this not sedition? Horrific.
**9:04pm - My final thoughts recapping the day on January 6, 2021.**
> I'll have more thoughts tomorrow but let me say this tonight after this exhausting and violent day. The Senate is confirming Joe Biden as President. But why did we even get here? The Georgia Secretary of State, a lifelong Republican, pleaded with Trump & fellow Republicans to stop lying about the election because he & his wife were getting threats of violence. What did Trump and hundreds of Republican politicians do? They doubled down.
> The violence & death today are on their hands. They inspired this insurrection. If Republicans now finally invoke the 25th Amendment, it won't be because Trump separated & caged babies, abused women, praised Nazis, banned Muslims, protected dictators, starved 50M Americans, oversaw the deaths of 370,000 Americans and counting, or incessantly violated the Constitution.
> It will be because he inspired terrorists to attack them. If you're not here to serve the American people, you have no business in public office.
* * *
On January 6, 2022, I wrote the following with clear steps that Democrats needed to take to hold accountable those who committed violence. Remember, Democrats had the House, the Senate, and the White House. They could have acted with urgency. They did not meet the urgency of the moment, and we need to recognize that failure.
## January 6, 2022
> Today is the 1 year anniversary of the GOP led insurrection to overthrow our democracy. It killed 5 people and injured dozens of police officers.
> But we must remember that the Jan 6 insurrection was simply the final step to overthrow US democracy. It was preceded and embraced by GOP gerrymandering, voter purges, racist voter ID laws, felon disenfranchisement, mass polling booth closures, and the BiG Lie propaganda campaign of widespread voter fraud.
> How do we fix this? We must abolish the Jim Crow filibuster and pass comprehensive voting rights. If we do not, the next insurrection, and there will be another GOP led insurrection, will be successful.
> In the one year since the Jan 6 insurrection there has been little, if any, meaningful consequences for those who ignited that insurrection. Meanwhile the GOP has introduced 550+ bills to restrict the vote for Black & brown Americans, and 0 bills to hold the white supremacist insurrectionists accountable.
> It was never about protecting democracy--it was always about protecting white supremacy. We must abolish the filibuster and protect our democracy with voting rights legislation. That's the choice. I hope future generations remember us for making the right one.
* * *
On January 6, 2023, I again implored the DOJ to act. I pointed out virtually nothing had been done to hold accountable the ringleaders of January 6, and warned we must act before it is too late.
## January 6, 2023
> Truly a shame that on the 2 year anniversary of the Jan 6 insurrection, none of the ringleaders of this attack on our democracy have faced the slightest bit of justice and accountability. Justice delayed is justice denied, and an insurrection that goes unpunished becomes a training exercise for next time.
> The DOJ must act immediately to protect the American people, our democracy, and our national peace--before it's too late.
* * *
On January 6, 2024 I made a final plea to the DOJ to act with urgency. I called out members of Congress who failed to recognize the urgency of the moment. I wrote in particular, "an insurrection that goes unpunished becomes a training exercise for next time."
## January 6, 2024
> Today is the 3 year anniversary of the Jan 6 insurrection. While many have faced prosecution, sadly none of the ringleaders of this attack on our democracy have faced meaningful justice and accountability. Justice delayed is justice denied, and an insurrection that goes unpunished becomes a training exercise for next time.
> We cannot compromise the peaceful transfer of power. And we cannot accept members of Congress who don't recognize the urgency of the moment--including those who think it's a good idea to co-sponsor legislation with pro-insurrection Republicans.
> The DOJ must act with urgency to protect the American people, our democracy, and our national peace--before it's too late. And we must elect new leaders committed to justice, not rely on career politicians who compromise our democracy by elevating pro-insurrection MAGAs.
* * *
## January 6, 2025
Now it is again January 6, and to answer the question in this article's headline--it seems explicitly clear we are worse off. We are worse off as we watch as the man who tried to overthrow the 2020 election waltz back into the White House, with full control of the House, the Senate, and the Supreme Court. We are worse off as Democrats did not act to abolish the Jim Crow filibuster to protect voting rights, codify Roe, expand the Supreme Court, or overturn Citizens United. We are worse off as the DOJ did not act with urgency to prosecute Donald Trump despite clear evidence and admission that he was practically and morally responsible for January 6. Indeed, history will remember Merrick Garland's incompetence, cowardice, and complicity in enabling Trump's fascism. And while Democrats and Garland refused to act with the urgency of the power, we are worse off as Republicans instead advanced their Project 2025 fascist initiative to undermine American democracy, install Christian nationalism, and let billionaires transform our democracy into an oligarchy.
I say this not to cite grievances after the fact -- indeed you can see that I (and many many others) warned of this dire scenario years ago if those in power did not act with urgency. I say this because we need to bear accurate witness to history to prevent its repetition.
But just because we are worse off, does not mean we must remain worse off. As the late, great, James Baldwin reminds us, despair is not an option. Hopelessness is not an option. But taking action, is. What we do now determines whether we have any semblance of a functioning democracy in the future. So I close with both recognition that we have an insurmountable challenge ahead of us, and with hope in my fellow Americans to rise to that challenge. And I offer a few practical ideas on how we can remain active and organized.
## The Future
Let me start with four action items each of us can accomplish in January:
1. Get involved with your local city council, school board, and/or county board. Attend their meetings, speak at these meetings, and understand the local issues. And where you see injustice, call it out and make your voice heard.
2. Get behind candidates committed to justice, that reject corporate and SuperPAC money, and who have a track record of condemning horrors like genocide. Donate to their campaigns, volunteer for their election and re-election, and share their content on social media.
3. Run for office. If you cannot find the right candidate who is committed to justice, become the candidate committed to justice and lead by example. Young people, women, underrepresented communities -- all of your voices are needed. Run.
4. Stay actively informed on the critical issues that impact us locally, nationally, and internationally. And on that, I hope you also invest in me to provide that insight by subscribing below.

We know what went wrong these past four years, and it began and ended with those in power failing to meet the urgency of the moment. Let us then act with urgency, demand accountability, and work relentlessly to form the more perfect Union we are promised. The idea of America is one in which justice overcomes tyranny, and it is not an idea I am ready or willing to discard.
**I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join the movement.**

Friend,

Three crucial House seats are headed to special elections, and we need your immediate support to defend our majority. _**These seats are the key to maintaining our America First agenda, and Democrats are already mobilizing to take them from us.**_

_Active for 30 minutes_

House Republican leaders are launching an emergency fundraising drive to fuel our efforts and keep these seats in Republican hands - NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6. **[And for the next 30 minutes, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED by House Republicans, so your impact will be twice as strong.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=713811a1afd94f668e4b6b2d72cc541b&_e=tznRpMEbOZhLEC8cKIFnPjkk32rvikixwrK5hcZSyRWvCwpxk9JD-v-3eNlf0ep6d4hFuhUiUNIKn5s1VNEfpgYYJ03v_wMwqdV-ZloUMUcqhJ_qK3x2BzRjHb2Of-PRiADAa6S3cQcQ-m5uYgjb7syk_lysfl6l8A5yFDuivx_XnZejIZzjtWEWYW1VTFelUvygM7brAFtI31Bt-BEBPEqCQ5oAq7AJKLWsvZdTimYJD8wtZeAWIacybC77NPzgBxVGotiEcK8sTsj_pHTVB4yWUxFpxYECWuo5KMzYJvev_a_BS-Rqr6YX6pyyBehMoAAQO8wrd0H5H2ILCWGD03puPibPg-_gbeEUJOVJ872_xVlCPODrKCClk2is1_ARd43biyk9dnzg8KFzXqUGhxXIu66v8TXuTWFXSZnRxC_MsI-HmW2e7qwQ_MK4JK3lS9IAnbH_eB9eIaPAJIu_1g%3D%3D "And for the next 30 minutes, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED by House Republicans, so your impact will be twice as strong.")**

_Will you step up and help us defend our Majority?_

Peter,
As the holidays come to a close, I’m looking forward to new opportunities in 2025.
Legislative session begins next week. I am determined to continue to advocate for you in the legislature and to support policies that will protect and improve the lives of all Tennesseans.
Before I return to session and enter a fundraising blackout period, I need your help to ensure my campaign account is strong. I can’t afford to delay fundraising efforts until after session, and I’m counting on your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025hcemail]

We flipped District 20 in 2020, protected it in 2024, and we must continue working to uphold this seat in the years to come.
Please don’t hesitate to reach out to me if I can ever be of assistance and thank you for your continued support.
Heidi Campbell

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=048349f743c944ada533a4bc15a41e96&_e=Jrw9PRc_wQFsxQnF_VY2rjKyyeg_x2-vcpwKj3d-me2XvIevRd_Fb4rsYLqBWIJqwF9b48CGELaPIy8D_nt7249mBnndlUHPUZa73umMAZtV_1XWnJLiVSevIOoY01ElbJ4o3JG11BaRcuk9evGbTwKno23VBfjSoEdK2d-wgdlpJK1K1Hnl-66Bq0EXBmFKcOWBDXZcMQzjetA3Cm92GjjyQ_W9M-wNKICpF6JV_f7AvlfnPlG5FHc1TOvltLwr66TgxSmTAQQrjPEXjGrbzNwI0xNq8iLWgMkcTZ6W_pAJ6vritHJ4ImpAnpWnCGd7zod7lpxxooz-3SkHMWm7azszRjVj4jxmypoTrRn1e8XJD4iTrpuPR0XNZofWA26y-DSyy9r61Mx0M0m2zbyUMg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=048349f743c944ada533a4bc15a41e96&_e=Jrw9PRc_wQFsxQnF_VY2rjKyyeg_x2-vcpwKj3d-me2XvIevRd_Fb4rsYLqBWIJqwF9b48CGELaPIy8D_nt7249mBnndlUHPUZa73umMAZtV_1XWnJLiVSevIOoY01ElbJ4o3JG11BaRcuk9evGbTwKno23VBfjSoEdK2d-wgdlpJK1K1Hnl-66Bq0EXBmFKcOWBDXZcMQzjetA3Cm92GjjyQ_W9M-wNKICpF6JV_f7AvlfnPlG5FHc1TOvltLwrklszQZbWBPQOjYG2_NkQaYvxCM_-K832yOU24eOpuixrJdk9dAn3zVh7ZlNti7U1kIiqwFPSKwOs_4F7t6cZQm1KYWlWRk-oFGXsIyB09tcuvYO7-xwhmul4SrWHQ1V09qOLx0syXfLEr1LiRL-N1A%3D%3D)

clean_body: My final chance to save my home... They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me. | Dear Friend, I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you. Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration. This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my final chance to save my home. Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th. During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s truly important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that eternal “heavenly treasures” await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession. I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions. "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Harry Dunn
subject: My life changed on January 6, 2021.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bc08ec0-23bc-4a92-a172-1f26e38bb254/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Four years ago today, I was walking into the Capitol for my shift as a Capitol police officer. I wouldn't know it yet, but my life was about to change forever. I'd be attacked. Beaten with clubs, baseball bats. Sprayed with WD-40, pepper spray, bear spray. Called slurs that I'd never been called in my life. An angry mob, emboldened by Donald Trump and MAGA extremists pushing the Big Lie, would storm the Capitol. Never caring about the lives of me and my fellow officers. They destroyed a sacred place, an institution dedicated to upholding the rule of law. And they attempted to destroy democracy. My life changed on January 6. It's the reason I've spent the last four years fighting. [Our fight for democracy is never over, especially with Donald Trump taking office two weeks from today. I need you to dig deep right now. Will you chip in a split contribution of $20 or more to Dunn’s Democracy Defenders and Blue Amp Action to help reach our goal before midnight tonight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te36aa413-c9a5-47d9-a4d6-0ee61a33996a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T839ab1a9-971c-40e6-a42b-3a243fc18095/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a80aff778b254dafa80da9ae852b21ae&_e=EGhdRaKS-H3wglSl3CfpdF-LC3U9wIUppE1Bbi8k2c3tQ8SR7vmdoFKcfQYi9nQAW7b83wlu8_kSSjl-hB9eZmi2sUOOnPHnC9uPVcrMP-iRnx3Fofu5r32c06uZHABxo20LUuW-pymmNKm8XqItr109HNoVqAqk87MG7_uMCiN9HNo_cU009n2RvplwBdm9jxsu1HBFvbUm_qkKAsXb1T_x-DiIvLZQLGKSdr9AW864-AqBhEWOPC_sHlZbwUrfyDDL769yMREKXUHRPUtbpmVWpiJDGEz2W09w8EOzAfRF-saj3MPQzwCmGjgp9PXtRS3olumKmwv-z3RMdLNJJkf7MIVzvapT-RyQCfDSRDOFEEoW1jgSu01lXzh1z0C91L-iiSfX2whnD0s6ZP69pQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a80aff778b254dafa80da9ae852b21ae&_e=EGhdRaKS-H3wglSl3CfpdF-LC3U9wIUppE1Bbi8k2c3tQ8SR7vmdoFKcfQYi9nQAW7b83wlu8_kSSjl-hB9eZmi2sUOOnPHnC9uPVcrMP-iRnx3Fofu5r32c06uZHABxo20LUuW-pymmNKm8XqItr109HNoVqAqk87MG7_uMCiN9HNo_cU009n2RvplwBdm9jxsu1HBFvbUm_qkKAsXb1T_x-DiIvLZQLGKSdr9AW864-AqBhEWOPC_sHlZbwUrfymotkaTB2FwQtgUrwRSmymeqluNwFaYM9gXP0lf17GkH7XbewTtBePxXORSuTjmrtkMUpNEj0FpFi-Dt3zVoPuZ_AfmRR6HZHaPo86prr0kgVM7g68oTDJEst1voYh_hLN46qkXCNabvR4RiBHi8NA%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a80aff778b254dafa80da9ae852b21ae&_e=EGhdRaKS-H3wglSl3CfpdF-LC3U9wIUppE1Bbi8k2c3tQ8SR7vmdoFKcfQYi9nQAW7b83wlu8_kSSjl-hB9eZmi2sUOOnPHnC9uPVcrMP-iRnx3Fofu5r32c06uZHABxo20LUuW-pymmNKm8XqItr109HNoVqAqk87MG7_uMCiN9HNo_cU009n2RvplwBdm9jxsu1HBFvbUm_qkKAsXb1T_x-DiIvLZQLGKSdr9AW864-AqBhEWOPC_sHlZbwUrfpVKLobSNxS957OyH_pblN982WUk2o3px0OHcIPT4o6FDoolMQXhWQ4_CXU4tLh550GJxpgiAs2KzUFzMQN48C2qaApDoUkYvuSuHg2tSl9no2DghSb7dGgywznIEE9rdgjqQ_syVhL6s4025YXI0rQ%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a80aff778b254dafa80da9ae852b21ae&_e=EGhdRaKS-H3wglSl3CfpdF-LC3U9wIUppE1Bbi8k2c3tQ8SR7vmdoFKcfQYi9nQAW7b83wlu8_kSSjl-hB9eZmi2sUOOnPHnC9uPVcrMP-iRnx3Fofu5r32c06uZHABxo20LUuW-pymmNKm8XqItr109HNoVqAqk87MG7_uMCiN9HNo_cU009n2RvplwBdm9jxsu1HBFvbUm_qkKAsXb1T_x-DiIvLZQLGKSdr9AW864-AqBhEWOPC_sHlZbwUrfx-eenbDY6ukBiaLSJshdR6sOBMMXzq97_TUpwb30r2y__YahKZ540noxGHJicWAAKF2AcKFmQIgzHjqadKN1MCTTxHGtsbkN-2mNEDui5WnKTCYpt4-7BEcpXCE54Ob150xiGC79xn_b0mS1U0-Pag%3D%3D)

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Let's get to work!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
I've officially been sworn in and now it's time to work! | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,
_**Happy New Year!**_
It was a big day on Friday with the opening of the 119th Congress and the start of my service as Eastern Washington’s Representative!
It was wonderful to have Eleanor and the children, as well as my parents Delores and David, join me in Washington D.C. for the swearing-in ceremony.
---
| We started the morning with the traditional interfaith prayer service, hosted by the House Chaplain at St Peter’s Catholic Church. Many Members of Congress were in attendance to pray for our Nation, the President, House Staff, the Supreme Court, our Armed Forces and those we serve.
I particularly enjoyed the reading of Thomas Jefferson’s “Prayer for the Nation”. Jefferson is believed to have personally said the prayer each morning of his Presidency. (For those interested - I’ve included the prayer below at the bottom of this email.)
The first order of business for the opening of the 119th Congress was to elect a Speaker of the House. There are only 219 Republicans in Congress and 218 votes were required to elect the Speaker. With all 215 Democrats voting in opposition, President Trump took an active role in urging my fellow Republicans to come together in a unified vote for Mike Johnson.
Republican unity will be crucial to start moving forward with the urgent actions needed to fix our border security and get America back on track. With a tiny Republican majority, we have no time to lose.
It was very special having the kids join me on the House floor to watch the vote live. _(Maria even took a short break from the Speaker debate to watch a little Bluey!)_
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| After Speaker Johnson was elected, the next item of business was the official swearing-in for Members of the new Congress. The children stood with me as I swore to “support and defend the Constitution of the United States...So help me God.”
It’s the honor of a lifetime to be able to serve Eastern Washington in the United States of Representatives, and I am very grateful for your support!
---
| My staff have quickly started work on setting up our D.C. office. We welcome visitors and hope you’ll come by and say hello anytime you make the trip to our nation’s capital. My office is located in the Cannon Office Building, Room 124.
The Washington State University government relations team were among the first to stop by, and they gave us a few gifts from home to decorate the office!
---
| Each new Congress, a pin is given to Members and their spouse. The pin signals to security officials that the bearer can enter restricted spaces on Capitol Hill. We thought the Reagan statue in the Capitol Rotunda would be a good spot for Eleanor to put mine on for the first time.
---
| It’s now time to get to work! Thank you for standing with me, supporting our campaign and my family, and for all of your well wishes and prayers. I’ll continue to share more as often as I can. Please keep in touch!
Sincerely,
---
[DONATE](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=4bc389c086&e=5a45b9550e)
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---
| | | | | | | | You can [update your preferences](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&e=5a45b9550e&c=3e631354d8) or [unsubscribe](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&t=b&e=5a45b9550e&c=3e631354d8)
---

name: COURIER
subject: The fight for the truth about January 6 is more important than ever
body:
January 6th wasn’t patriotism or resistance. It was an attack on democracy and the gravest violation of our Constitution by any president in American history.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99963730/521320165/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiMTA1NGQtNWFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAN2YIoLASwGhh_w8QkFr5LbYj8Q4BW_oG_HHwMoMBo=&emci=a5b1054d-5acc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b2b1054d-5acc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
Four years ago today, a mob stormed the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election. It was an unprecedented assault on our democracy—a day of broken windows, Confederate flags in the Rotunda, and violence against law enforcement officers.
**But for millions of Americans, that’s not the story anymore.**
Thanks to a relentless right-wing media machine—cable outlets like Fox News and Newsmax, influencers like Tucker Carlson and Benny Johnson, and platforms like Truth Social, X, and Meta—January 6th has been rewritten. For some, it’s now seen as a “normal tourist visit” or even a “false flag” orchestrated by the left. For others, it’s a story of patriotism and resistance.
[**We can’t let their lies become the narrative. If you’re ready to help build a progressive media network strong enough to fight back against Fox News and MAGA misinformation, can you chip in $25 now to support COURIER’s mission?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99963732/521320171/-593472309?refcode=20250106-EM-Jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiMTA1NGQtNWFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAN2YIoLASwGhh_w8QkFr5LbYj8Q4BW_oG_HHwMoMBo=)
For years, Donald Trump’s allies in the right-wing media have laid the foundation for what comes next: Trump’s promise to pardon January 6th rioters on his first day back in office. It’s a brazen attempt to rewrite history, reframing an act of violence as one of patriotism.
**This whitewashing isn’t just a political strategy; it’s a chilling hallmark of authoritarian regimes—something we associate with Putin’s Russia, not the United States.**
By normalizing the insurrection, Trump and his media allies are erasing the trauma, rewriting the violence, and emboldening the same forces that attacked democracy four years ago.
They’re counting on disinformation to shield their plans for the future. The justification machine is already in overdrive, crafting narratives that defy reality and give MAGA loyalists permission to do it all again. Or worse.
But here’s the truth: January 6th wasn’t patriotism. It wasn’t resistance. It was an attack on democracy and the gravest violation of our Constitution by any president in history.
**That truth matters.**
At COURIER, we’re ensuring it’s never erased. Our progressive media network is working to deliver fact-based reporting directly to communities where MAGA propaganda thrives. We’re countering the lies with facts, fighting to keep the truth front and center, and protecting democracy from authoritarian disinformation.
[**If we’re going to stand up to Trump’s propaganda machine and the MAGA media empire, we need your help. Chip in $25 now to help COURIER expose the lies, defend democracy, and ensure the truth about January 6th is never forgotten.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99963734/521320173/-593472309?refcode=20250106-EM-Jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiMTA1NGQtNWFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAN2YIoLASwGhh_w8QkFr5LbYj8Q4BW_oG_HHwMoMBo=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99963736/521320175/-593472309?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20250106-EM-Jan6&refcode2=b2b1054d-5acc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiMTA1NGQtNWFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAN2YIoLASwGhh_w8QkFr5LbYj8Q4BW_oG_HHwMoMBo=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99963738/521320177/-593472309?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20250106-EM-Jan6&refcode2=b2b1054d-5acc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiMTA1NGQtNWFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAN2YIoLASwGhh_w8QkFr5LbYj8Q4BW_oG_HHwMoMBo=) | [$125](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99963740/521320179/-593472309?express_lane=true&amount=125&refcode=20250106-EM-Jan6&refcode2=b2b1054d-5acc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiMTA1NGQtNWFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAN2YIoLASwGhh_w8QkFr5LbYj8Q4BW_oG_HHwMoMBo=) | [$250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99963742/521320181/-593472309?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20250106-EM-Jan6&refcode2=b2b1054d-5acc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiMTA1NGQtNWFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAN2YIoLASwGhh_w8QkFr5LbYj8Q4BW_oG_HHwMoMBo=)

Thank you for standing with us,

name: Harry Dunn
subject: My life changed on January 6, 2021
body:
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250106-1?refcode=em20250106-1670&amount=5&refcode2=1670_21716_9SuyPx&akid=1670%2E21716%2E9SuyPx ][IMG]

4 years ago today, I was walking into the Capitol for my shift as a
Capitol police officer.

I wouldn't know it yet, but my life was about to change forever.

I'd be attacked. Beaten with clubs, baseball bats. Sprayed with WD-40,
pepper spray, bear spray. Called slurs that I'd never been called in my
life.

An angry mob, emboldened by Donald Trump and MAGA-extremists pushing the
Big Lie, would storm the Capitol. Never caring about the lives of me and
my fellow officers. They destroyed a sacred place, an institution
dedicated to upholding the rule of law. And they attempted to destroy
democracy.

My life changed on January 6. It's the reason I've spent the last 4 years
fighting.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250106-1?refcode=em20250106-1670&amount=5&refcode2=1670_21716_9SuyPx&akid=1670%2E21716%2E9SuyPx ]Our fight for democracy is never over, especially with Donald Trump
taking office two weeks from today. I need you to dig deep right now. Will
you chip in a split contribution of $5 or more to Dunn’s
Democracy Defenders and Sarah McBride to help reach our goal before
midnight tonight?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250106-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250106-1670&refcode2=1670_21716_9SuyPx&akid=1670%2E21716%2E9SuyPx ]Donate $5 »

It's not dramatic to say that our democracy is on thin ice – but I can't
save it alone.

Harry

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.sarahmcbride.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1670%2E21716%2E9SuyPx

name: Trent Staggs
subject: The U.S. Supreme Court will decide Utah's political future this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trent Staggs_
body:
| | | [ ](https://trentstaggs.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6d1d02aa6cfa6c9205f5d9ce1&id=4ade817c70&e=9ab300f3fc)
---
| | Friends,

Utah's application of S.B. 54 is blatantly unconstitutional. For a decade now, state officials have coerced Utahns and political parties to abide by the state government's process on how to choose our own Republican nominees.

The U.S. Supreme Court has held time and again that political parties have freedom of association and have the right to determine their membership and nominee selection process. This Friday, January 10, the U.S. Supreme Court will meet in conference to decide whether to take up the case filed by Phil Lyman, which would finally determine the constitutionality of S.B. 54. The trampling on our rights needs to end. For that reason, **I have filed an amicus brief in support of Phil's petition.** You can view it [here](https://trentstaggs.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6d1d02aa6cfa6c9205f5d9ce1&id=2987bb2286&e=9ab300f3fc).

Utahns' God-given right to freedom of association must be restored. Senator Mike Lee and many others have called for the repeal of this misguided legislation. I wholeheartedly agree, but If our state government can't be made to see the light of their wrong after all these years, then it is time to make them feel the heat.

I have heard from thousands of delegates and members of our party since winning our state party convention and nomination outright on April 27, securing almost 70% of the delegate votes. All of them have expressed dismay over how the state has run roughshod over their rights, rendering their service entirely futile. Worse, many have told me they would never become a delegate again nor participate in party meetings again given this law!

The Utah State Government is wrong to trample on the First Amendment to the U.S. Constitution by extorting the Utah Republican Party to adopt the state's coercive process of choosing our nominees, rather than following our own Party Constitution and internal processes. The government has never articulated a compelling state interest to burden our First Amendment rights; and if it exists, to delineate how the government's actions are narrowly tailored to that compelling state interest.

This case is not about me\--its about contesting the constitutionality of a state law that has seriously damaged the party and each of our associational rights. A state law that has turned statewide elections into a contest of money (mostly out-of-state) and name recognition, rather than a contest of ideas and accountability to a party platform.

The U.S. Supreme Court dodged the question the first time this state law was brought before them. I, along with numerous others, are hoping this time they will give Utahns their rightful day at our nation's highest court to defend their rights.

Thank you all who serve so diligently in our Republican party. God bless you and may we forever have a republican form of government.

Yours in freedom,
Trent Staggs
---
|
---
| [Read the Amicus Curiae brief here](https://trentstaggs.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6d1d02aa6cfa6c9205f5d9ce1&id=d5919dc945&e=9ab300f3fc "Read the Amicus Curiae brief here")
---
|
---

Dear Friend,

You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=2a431d2fdaf347af932a5cec5d0c4e85&_e=jaWO4e_589lK9WxXOWlzBMuLChj6h0Lhh1dwNCEjgjbD4_lx481-REi6lKQioS0s6n0SUVlkrCYQgeS237YIIdLmDOwclIUwpI7j5Evb8IMPThgKPMRvhjKa7GFE-oYVoz0pK4v5kDjVxtBDyJkTM9wnteBLZV70BxVekGwQcWcL8AG0LBrgXilinRqfZ2MWlQKseugBj-yg0G1dOswLYgnTlTkPwM5DMPogDXVfvJAjph-jzrkTP3bwGN2mosxcRoq5HMbsHYA2_WF3SObh8iQenxh1dkSgXtxPdGZCkgob2tmtw1cNtCIBnHNwiNuZHpjSf7fTWnKlQdWe6xoA3LJqUuOwMNpPR1ophhWZaEnq3egbslwqUJnOqhITq-7tdLLkiEZgefRIhLwXzhMG2w%3D%3D)

The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty.

Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=2a431d2fdaf347af932a5cec5d0c4e85&_e=jaWO4e_589lK9WxXOWlzBMuLChj6h0Lhh1dwNCEjgjbD4_lx481-REi6lKQioS0s6n0SUVlkrCYQgeS237YIIdLmDOwclIUwpI7j5Evb8IMPThgKPMRvhjKa7GFE-oYVoz0pK4v5kDjVxtBDyJkTM9wnteBLZV70BxVekGwQcWcL8AG0LBrgXilinRqfZ2MWlQKseugBj-yg0G1dOswLYgnTlTkPwM5DMPogDXVfvJAjph-jzrkTP3bwGN2mosxcZ9bLFxwp-RzXcJW1mVSJzQXuPRPdxXEKsPRJU7QmhhQyS-kyjBBMjiXbxpzfteEZvGlz-qZZ7XTAQMno8und0Qjdb6hYRXBsbk0VFCHpxPVPKnuixLENgMFFZVy8g2at4KgVcb2JXiGJ_ZeTUsZIzg%3D%3D)

Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."**

Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion."

These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties.

You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course.

**The first step is ...EDUCATION.**

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.**

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=2a431d2fdaf347af932a5cec5d0c4e85&_e=jaWO4e_589lK9WxXOWlzBMuLChj6h0Lhh1dwNCEjgjbD4_lx481-REi6lKQioS0s6n0SUVlkrCYQgeS237YIIdLmDOwclIUwpI7j5Evb8IMPThgKPMRvhjKa7GFE-oYVoz0pK4v5kDjVxtBDyJkTM9wnteBLZV70BxVekGwQcWcL8AG0LBrgXilinRqfZ2MWlQKseugBj-yg0G1dOswLYgnTlTkPwM5DMPogDXVfvJAjph-jzrkTP3bwGN2mosxcV2VQgM9WfZci2HgqJELpgvijc6NT-cvhMwasVrgjDCYxHPJNFTgNpWommAq05rNOlVXrjh9JAqlSCF1hlSBzdnpBvKL_O64-ZSvf6GRpXXaTuucMzLAcA_NuH_rgIY53sEdi0rerU9RY10_jAkvU6w%3D%3D)

Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

body:
I hope your 2025 is off to a great start. I'm grateful to count you among _The Flyover's_ dedicated readers.

---
| | |
# Monday January 6, 2025

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: I was just sworn in as CA-12's new Congresswoman.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
On Friday, I stood on the House floor and officially took the oath to represent you in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_010625_SwearingIn_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_010625_SwearingIn_actrs]
At that moment, the weight of our collective journey filled my heart. Every dream, struggle, and victory we’ve shared has led us to this day. I thought of CA-12—its resilience, beauty, and the urgent work ahead of us.
But let me be clear: this isn’t just my oath. It’s ours.
Together, we will fight for: Homes families can afford, healthcare that doesn’t lead to financial ruin, and safe, thriving communities built on equity and opportunity — the fight starts now.
In these critical first few weeks, we must show that CA-12 is ready to lead—to stand against injustice, push back against extremism, and build a future that centers working families in every decision. This is our moment to set the tone for the battles ahead. Can I count on you to chip in today and help us make a powerful statement for progress and justice? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_010625_SwearingIn_actrs]

clean_body: [] Friend, On Friday, I stood on the House floor and officially took the oath to represent you in Congress. [] At that moment, the weight of our collective journey filled my heart. Every dream, struggle, and victory we’ve shared has led us to this day. I thought of CA-12—its resilience, beauty, and the urgent work ahead of us. But let me be clear: this isn’t just my oath. It’s ours. Together, we will fight for: Homes families can afford, healthcare that doesn’t lead to financial ruin, and safe, thriving communities built on equity and opportunity — the fight starts now. In these critical first few weeks, we must show that CA-12 is ready to lead—to stand against injustice, push back against extremism, and build a future that centers working families in every decision. This is our moment to set the tone for the battles ahead. Can I count on you to chip in today and help us make a powerful statement for progress and justice? name: Justice Democrats
subject: January 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Today is the fourth anniversary of the deadly U.S. Capitol attack on
January 6th, 2021. When Congress was scheduled to formally certify
President Biden’s victory in the 2020 presidential election, a violent mob
of right-wing extremists emboldened by Donald Trump stormed the U.S.
Capitol.

After the Capitol was cleared and the mess cleaned up, members of Congress
reconvened to authorize the Electoral College votes. Despite everything
that had just happened, 147 Republican members chose party over country
and voted against certifying Biden’s election victory. Since then, AIPAC
has endorsed 109 of those 147 Republicans who supported overturning the
2020 election.

Bankrolled by Republican billionaires and Trump megadonors, AIPAC is
willing to sacrifice our country’s democracy as long as their candidates
unconditionally support Israel’s right-wing government and their war
crimes.

While AIPAC continued to back GOP insurrectionists in the years since
2021, they also spent nearly $30 million (more than ever before in U.S.
history) to unseat progressive Democratic incumbents Cori Bush and Jamaal
Bowman last year. And yet, the majority of Democrats keep taking their
money and support.

Today, Congress is certifying the presidential election results for Trump
once again, in part thanks to big money lobbies like AIPAC’s efforts to
influence our elections and Democratic leadership’s prioritization of
billionaire and corporate donors over working people.

If we’re going to stop the dangerous spread of right-wing extremism and
start winning more elections, we need a bold Democratic Party made up of
working-class leaders who will fight to take big money out of politics and
defend our democracy.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250106?refcode=em20250106-36294&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36294_1203867_Zy3jRT&akid=36294%2E1203867%2EZy3jRT ]We’re looking for those very leaders to run in 2026 as we speak. Will
you support our efforts to find and recruit working-class, progressive
candidates for Congress to stand up against AIPAC, Trump, and the
billionaire class by pitching in $5 or more today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250106?refcode=em20250106-36294&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36294_1203867_Zy3jRT&akid=36294%2E1203867%2EZy3jRT ]Contribute $5

With your support, Justice Democrats is devoted to transforming the
Democratic Party for the better and giving working-class people more seats
at the table as we take on right-wing extremism and the U.S. oligarchy.

We couldn’t do this work without you.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250106-36294-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36294_1203867_Zy3jRT&akid=36294%2E1203867%2EZy3jRT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36294%2E1203867%2EZy3jRT

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: New warnings from voting rights experts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
The Guardian: Fears grow for voting rights as Trump plots to reshape US justice department [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
Team -- Experts are warning that Donald Trump could use his second term to gut enforcement of U.S. federal voting laws and deploy the Department of Justice (DoJ) to undermine voting rights instead of protecting them.
Full control of DoJ under MAGA nominee Pam Bondi could allow them to amplify misleading claims of voter fraud by non-citizens and others, as well as investigate and intimidate local election officials.
Trump could also cause the department’s civil rights section to end its enforcement of the Voting Rights Act , returning it to the approach that it took under Trump’s first term where they stopped prosecuting several voting rights cases.
Shortly after Trump was inaugurated in 2017, DoJ pulled out of two major voting rights cases -- challenging Texas’s suppressive voter ID law and Ohio’s practice of purging voters from the rolls. It filed almost no new voting rights enforcement cases during the first four years Trump was in office.
Folks, it's going to be on us to watch out for voters and defend voting rights. Chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us defend our fundamental right to vote, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010625_2&amount=35]
Trump has made no secret of his intention to punish his political enemies and subvert the American voting system. And he's not alone:
AG Nominee Pam Bondi assisted Trump’s efforts to try to overturn the 2020 election results, echoing his false claims of fraud. His nominee to lead the civil rights division, Harmeet Dhilon , did the same, plus she has defended suppressive laws in court and fought to keep Trump on the ballot. And FBI Director nominee Kash Patel is a MAGA conspiracy theorist who wants to weaponize the FBI to follow Trump's every whim.
We're about to start a four year period where we need to be on guard and ready to step up for voting rights at any moment. From Congress, to the Department of Justice, to state legislatures, and to the courts -- we've got our work cut out for us.
Our right to vote is worth defending and we need you with us. Fuel our work with $25 or however much you can today and make every vote count in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280

It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. clean_body: | | | Peter, we’re officially in 2025, and I can’t overstate how high the stakes are. Extremist Republicans in Florida and across the country are forcing their fascist policies on vulnerable communities every single day. And every single day, we’ve been fighting back. But in 2025, we need to kick it into high-gear. That’s only possible with sustained, year-round grassroots support from everyday folks like you, Peter. Our organizing teams are working around the clock to bring more people into our movement against fascism – and we won’t stop working until we’ve defeated the fascists who are determined to keep Florida and the country in their grasp. But we need to ensure we have the funds year-round to ramp up our organizing work. [[BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR >>]]() While some campaigns are funded by shady special interests, ours has been fueled by everyday folks giving a few bucks each month. Your monthly support allows us to know how big of an impact our campaign can make in a given month, quarter, and year. See, our team’s work requires significant planning and budgeting. From knowing how many youth organizers we can hire, to how many community events we can hold – it all comes down to what our fundraising strength is looking like at any given time. Monthly donations played a major role in helping me defy the odds and make history as the first Gen Z member of Congress. Now, I’m asking you to step up so I can stay in Congress and keep up our fight against fascism in Florida in 2025. [[BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR >>]]() Thank you, Maxwell Frost | Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

subject: To President Biden: THANK YOU!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
There’s officially a few weeks left with President Biden in the White House.

We’re sending a thank you letter to let him know how grateful we are for his service to our nation and we’d like you to add your name! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q12025_thankbiden?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q12025_thankbiden?amount=7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q12025_thankbiden?amount=7]

Add your name to the “Thank You President Biden” Letter » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q12025_thankbiden?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

Dear President Biden,
With your time in the White House coming to an end, I wanted to say thank you.
Thank you for setting aside politics and uniting Americans to fight for a better future for us all.
You accomplished so much – from lowering prescription drug prices, to creating millions of jobs, and investing in historic climate change reform.
You have paved the path for progress, and I need you to know that Democrats are committed to building upon it!
That’s why I'm signing this letter and sending a donation of $7 to New Dems now to show that I’m committed to the Democratic agenda — to defend our democracy, unite our nation, and fight for a better future for everyday Americans » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q12025_thankbiden?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]
Add your name to the “Thank You President Biden” Letter » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q12025_thankbiden?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

New Dems

body:
Four years ago, Donald Trump incited a violent insurrection, unleashing a mob of MAGA extremists who conspired to overturn the will of the people.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99966081/521328669/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTA3NzVlZS02NGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOZcgnZkhwEDR_L3O4yg3Vlpi2pvpyqU3Au_NOx5pBs=&emci=e40a9968-4ecc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c10775ee-64cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=7731215)

| | Four years ago, Donald Trump incited a violent insurrection, unleashing a mob of MAGA extremists who conspired to overturn the will of the people. **The assault on our democracy is still happening now, and ****we have to fight harder than ever against MAGA extremism because Trump will try to finish what he started.** Here's the catch: It may not look as obvious this time around because his tactics will be different. He'll enact roadblocks to make voting harder for all of us, install Trump loyalists at every level of government, and give billionaires and corporate polluters free rein to dictate the Republican agenda. Our democracy survived four years ago because people like you stood up to protect it and have been safeguarding it ever since. **In 2025, we need to dig deep and do even more to ensure it can repel every attack Trump and MAGA extremists hurl at it.** Right now, we face unprecedented challenges. **The road ahead will not be easy, but the work we do in the coming months and years to ensure a functioning democracy will have a profound impact on the lives of Oregonians and the American people.** I know we won't back down from this fight. Onward! _Jeff_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99966082/521328670/-2122444374?refcode=2025-01-06-jansix&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c10775ee-64cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTA3NzVlZS02NGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOZcgnZkhwEDR_L3O4yg3Vlpi2pvpyqU3Au_NOx5pBs=) |

The assault on our democracy is still happening now, and we have to fight harder than ever against MAGA extremism because Trump will try to finish what he started. Here's the catch: It may not look as obvious this time around because his tactics will be different. He'll enact roadblocks to make voting harder for all of us, install Trump loyalists at every level of government, and give billionaires and corporate polluters free rein to dictate the Republican agenda. Our democracy survived four years ago because people like you stood up to protect it and have been safeguarding it ever since. In 2025, we need to dig deep and do even more to ensure it can repel every attack Trump and MAGA extremists hurl at it. Right now, we face unprecedented challenges. The road ahead will not be easy, but the work we do in the coming months and years to ensure a functioning democracy will have a profound impact on the lives of Oregonians and the American people. I know we won't back down from this fight. Onward! Jeff = | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

Folks, it’s Kevin, Executive Director of Georgia Democrats. Four years ago, Donald Trump led an attempt to overturn Joe Biden’s victory in the 2020 election. He claimed with no evidence that our free and fair elections were rigged and that he had actually won, leading to MAGA rioters storming the Capitol building and the deaths of several people, including a Capitol Police officer. Right now, despite leading an insurrection and being the only president ever to be impeached TWICE, **Donald Trump is set to be inaugurated once again and wreak havoc on the lives of ALL Americans for another four years.** It’s up to us — _all of us_ — to send a clear message to MAGA extremists that we’ll never stop fighting for our democracy. Trump’s second win may be a setback in our fight, but it is not a defeat. That’s why we need to raise $10,000 before midnight — to prove that Georgia Democrats aren’t going ANYWHERE. We’re going to re-elect Jon Ossoff in 2026 and Democrats up and down the ballot to continue our fight for progress and against extremism. [But we need your help to do it. Four years ago, Donald Trump led an attempt to overturn Joe Biden’s victory in the 2020 election. He claimed with no evidence that our free and fair elections were rigged and that he had actually won, leading to MAGA rioters storming the Capitol building and the deaths of several people, including a Capitol Police officer. Right now, despite leading an insurrection and being the only president ever to be impeached TWICE, Donald Trump is set to be inaugurated once again and wreak havoc on the lives of ALL Americans for another four years. It’s up to us — all of us — to send a clear message to MAGA extremists that we’ll never stop fighting for our democracy. Trump’s second win may be a setback in our fight, but it is not a defeat. That’s why we need to raise $10,000 before midnight — to prove that Georgia Democrats aren’t going ANYWHERE. We’re going to re-elect Jon Ossoff in 2026 and Democrats up and down the ballot to continue our fight for progress and against extremism. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Kevin Executive Director, Democratic Party of Georgia | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please = | = | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change. It's never been more important for every one of us to use our voices to speak up and be heard. But we rely on grassroots support to fuel our fight. Without you, we’re nothing. If you'd like to donate, please = | = | = | | | | ---|---|--- | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We know you probably receive a lot of emails, but we wouldn’t reach out if it weren’t important. Your support is crucial to helping elect Democrats in Georgia, but if you’d like to unsubscribe, . From all of us with the Georgia Democratic Party, thank you for your support! ** | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Harry Dunn
subject: My life changed on January 6, 2021.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
4 years ago today, I was walking into the Capitol for my shift as a Capitol police officer. I wouldn't know it yet, but my life was about to change forever. I'd be attacked. Beaten with clubs, baseball bats. Sprayed with WD-40, pepper spray, bear spray. Called slurs that I'd never been called in my life. An angry mob, emboldened by Donald Trump and MAGA-extremists pushing the Big Lie, would storm the Capitol. Never caring about the lives of me and my fellow officers. They destroyed a sacred place, an institution dedicated to upholding the rule of law. And they attempted to destroy democracy. **My life changed on January 6. It's the reason I've spent the last 4 years fighting.** [**Our fight for democracy is never over, especially with Donald Trump taking office two weeks from today. I need you to dig deep right now. Will you chip in a split contribution of $20 or more to Dunn’s Democracy Defenders and Serve America to help reach our goal before midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99966262/521329198/1122462078?refcode=250106_Serve_Dunn_Jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTY3NjkwMy02NWNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2te_j8DZSErRKY2Nmjhs4bs5Wj_Hi_beEw1PqLW7rCo=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99966263/521329199/1122462078?refcode=250106_Serve_Dunn_Jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTY3NjkwMy02NWNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2te_j8DZSErRKY2Nmjhs4bs5Wj_Hi_beEw1PqLW7rCo=) It's not dramatic to say that our democracy is on thin ice – but I can't save it alone.
