Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Peter.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault - not just on my freedom - but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats' Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn't end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with "_IMPRISONMENT!_ " **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it 's the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala's disastrous policies. And if that's your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I 've never needed your help more than right now.__

clean_body: It's hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Peter. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault - not just on my freedom - but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats' Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn't end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with "IMPRISONMENT! " But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it 's the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala's disastrous policies. And if that's your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I 've never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

| | Friend, January 6th, 2021. I was there. It was awful. Police officers were attacked and abused. An inflamed mob wanted to stop the electoral count, people were running for their lives. It was an embarrassing and disgraceful day. I was one of the first members of congress to “tweet” that morning. The country exhausted from Covid and negativity, we were all still wearing masks. Those are the facts, this is what happened. Our democracy continued, the markets barely moved, but we came very close to losing a lot more. Lives were lost, over 120 Capitol police were injured. Acts of treason and subterfuge and a surreal event to pay witness as they unfolded. Let’s continue to stay vigilant and not forget what happened and how too many of our fellow countrymen and women were motivated to attack their own government based on falsehoods. clean_body: | = | | Friend, January 6th, 2021. I was there. It was awful. Police officers were attacked and abused. An inflamed mob wanted to stop the electoral count, people were running for their lives. It was an embarrassing and disgraceful day. I was one of the first members of congress to “tweet” that morning. The country exhausted from Covid and negativity, we were all still wearing masks. Those are the facts, this is what happened. Our democracy continued, the markets barely moved, but we came very close to losing a lot more. Lives were lost, over 120 Capitol police were injured. Acts of treason and subterfuge and a surreal event to pay witness as they unfolded. Let’s continue to stay vigilant and not forget what happened and how too many of our fellow countrymen and women were motivated to attack their own government based on falsehoods. Sincerely, Haley Stevens | | | = | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Just days left until my trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3032673c93374df9bf1f43595c8e67af&_e=A4jxUv9ZAKvYpWtqJT1X5AxXlRgTlRh4h0ezOM01DlKHF10T8yrKrBIK_WwbAlh2SeC3yFJoF_Sq2QvVfxjZEAB1O8TSNE0CnMgk1JP9PLqXaslVUo2lS6mnl1Nb54t0B-bvinDspMpMxMVwo4cuLcASHNWN3qxFaGhBy6OxvlZzXvfPINu8CHdA_Xx_ZThTxslkfOizbzc0egSJWVo-9cWRxSIwkBhvCChbnht9q5JW_UcSedw-2YFw9q58joNTlpavwycCaQNvOToJQrE6S0ztV1fMmS70w5LnSrS_7xoHsfpUvi28TEmPE_9habBVknOTIkjkVwqiZX004LS8i2c5iRb9etQZCcS6W_jeZJFxIUqiEYrqq4ysa-Xce7o4)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ _IMPRISONMENT!_ ” **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now.__
---

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Reminder: Meet the Whips Event Moved to Tuesday, January 7 @ 2pm
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Dear Friend,
Just a quick reminder that we’ve moved our “Meet the Whips” Happy Hour at Federal House to tomorrow, Tuesday, January 7, 2025, from 2 to 4 p.m. We want everyone to be safe in the New Year!
I’ll still be joined by Chief Deputy Whips Vaughn Stewart and Melissa Wells , but we’ll gather at a new time one day later. Together, we’ll fight for what matters most to you and those you care about .
If you’d like to join us, visit bit.ly/JazzJan6 [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] (this link still works for the Tuesday event). If you prefer to contribute by check or money order, please bring your donation to the door so we can deposit it before Session convenes on January 8 at noon.
If you have any questions, please contact Rachael Rice at 410-218-1964 or rachaelrice@riceconsultingllc.com.
Please take care in the cold weather.
Jazz

Peter: Our nation’s democracy is as fragile as ever four years after Donald Trump incited deadly white nationalist violence at the U.S. Capitol. Nowhere is this more apparent than right here in Texas.

Texas has already seen these impacts firsthand through restrictive voting laws and aggressive gerrymandering that dilutes the power of Black and Latino communities.

❌ Increase of Trump's authority over every part of the federal government — following Texas's model of consolidated executive power
❌ Ban abortion nationwide and jail healthcare providers — expanding on Texas's existing near-total ban
❌ Enable discrimination against LGBTQIA+ Americans — building on Texas's recent restrictions on transgender healthcare

There’s not a doubt in our minds that Trump will wield every bit of his power to dismantle democratic processes for his own benefit, weaponize the rule of law to attack Black and Latino communities, and stifle opposition to his own extremist agenda.

Here at TOP PAC, we’ll be fighting back at every opportunity, but we can’t do the work we do without the support of supporters like you. So if you’re able, can you pitch in just $10 or $20 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=20]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=20]

January 6th, 2021 wasn’t the start of Trump’s dangerous attacks on democracy and it won’t be the last.

Regardless of race, income, immigration status, preferred language, or ZIP Code, all Americans and all Texans deserve representation from elected leaders who want to preserve our democracy, not destroy it. We won’t stand idly by as the Trump administration and Texas Republicans minimize the clear-cut white supremacy we as a nation witnessed on January 6.

So will you donate today to help us reach as many voters across Texas as possible and build power for 2026 and beyond? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=138bc12ffa4d4340865483b844cbd264&_e=plxWPyKfciHawl8ieWuSz0vO6IY-TIm9S9KdVhPwh5QvybkWLfEywehvGF2hOmx0BUf6Dc9sPLFwyoJOOuStRMnx0xW5l2JFA2nJZhM5390kQO7sKLbhvU7PZRHpH4SGBORpIUo6CyvSLNzrXy0ZtaaEj8in1X_Gn-ZlwI8eg-b_9kgkZ9Nbz1opycx-sU5HC0OmA2jb2EeO__g0lATYzvu1YNrOyWhfRx-MZLo59OpTWIGw04FDyO63sBDWxrL6eExKQ9LaJQ781DsloszR9yQ51VnZrizVPkVEcQcWW6lU0rJe-prCkRTjZKkZ78PFYC1zNpLrWXoOBNQf4_H0RlvDXQEJd0jHtKTceOZujZb6UgR1tRzC4BINtUIPQRq0WiaQpNJyZJAUrUTCFpoxfQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=138bc12ffa4d4340865483b844cbd264&_e=plxWPyKfciHawl8ieWuSz0vO6IY-TIm9S9KdVhPwh5QvybkWLfEywehvGF2hOmx0BUf6Dc9sPLFwyoJOOuStRMnx0xW5l2JFA2nJZhM5390kQO7sKLbhvU7PZRHpH4SGBORpIUo6CyvSLNzrXy0ZtaaEj8in1X_Gn-ZlwI8eg-b_9kgkZ9Nbz1opycx-sU5HC0OmA2jb2EeO__g0lATYzvu1YNrOyWhfRx-MZLo59OpTWIGw04FDyO63sBDWxrL6IhetN3viEn-9rdO2feBl_rRJifZUoMI_zPgCmJ5Tg6lWIpzObk37OzvG5p6QeE4YLnm8wu4bk0NWhaVLeLrdExFfOSj9bs-Gx6OJRBPcYU8VxwxxuwYLK1-yMuQ8ufEKI0qWeq-hVDNpD--1mYS4MA%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=138bc12ffa4d4340865483b844cbd264&_e=plxWPyKfciHawl8ieWuSz0vO6IY-TIm9S9KdVhPwh5QvybkWLfEywehvGF2hOmx0BUf6Dc9sPLFwyoJOOuStRMnx0xW5l2JFA2nJZhM5390kQO7sKLbhvU7PZRHpH4SGBORpIUo6CyvSLNzrXy0ZtaaEj8in1X_Gn-ZlwI8eg-b_9kgkZ9Nbz1opycx-sU5HC0OmA2jb2EeO__g0lATYzvu1YNrOyWhfRx-MZLo59OpTWIGw04FDyO63sBDWxrL68GBvEGc-Kw-tZP1SN3TWhI4mgDykdqi25nlmifM51r1sEP0FnSwfFZZ8OXU--SNJyH7v232zvZ7WECuRohfV8deZI6LwoJ7n79mfemMf9ppETDGZM-bQPOp6NMgigEIpJSnKDHldLIP6glN9ANuyAg%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=138bc12ffa4d4340865483b844cbd264&_e=plxWPyKfciHawl8ieWuSz0vO6IY-TIm9S9KdVhPwh5QvybkWLfEywehvGF2hOmx0BUf6Dc9sPLFwyoJOOuStRMnx0xW5l2JFA2nJZhM5390kQO7sKLbhvU7PZRHpH4SGBORpIUo6CyvSLNzrXy0ZtaaEj8in1X_Gn-ZlwI8eg-b_9kgkZ9Nbz1opycx-sU5HC0OmA2jb2EeO__g0lATYzvu1YNrOyWhfRx-MZLo59OpTWIGw04FDyO63sBDWxrL6-4abljzOU6nvsXP8y2A7aC1lDfKfS6EwYsJ7-tQeM-Cx0VfOPpACDuqboL-rWjKfmIyZAys2fSEhUNyxKA_snwTaHQWlZRzVx-avsy8epLGyScMmDg4Jt6NYFFgXymNWuDVaMq5RtiRTGwTqFPix2Q%3D%3D)

I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... body:

---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e842975e3c5b4a3e8e075976ae3fd705&_e=ns1Fv0lxBcfxN-CTR_mPTNlWh63zxh66ilhRksu9GLMbWcp7L4RnjXq_OUeZ-XZundEgBKhXqS6EQOLtikhZPQVumbA8keYvtGY49xiWjJJJKqKrnF6JhlFtPdau6SZZV-SgPx9Aas_-dmH-OcOBPiIHw5vl5qQzx6v_0kTNSDZNbqpM6z1I0_0ViACbgkpkMQ-ozebMdrZ2W8bsQPlR9YaQpM2rIDoUjxPzxyIVt0DZzeBknq96PjmWG24mzv5KeAUiI2QC1d21Blzetb_FK-1uNw2kRLYVAZL52tQ4roW34nwfS9Tx6IGYEeV_FCAZsv6keqA91pQgGKvjs99jMNklRjIsWVxdXXDukXl3dVROaQ8ARBHmV4YrjTXFdqg4P-ZIi8V3SPYDZ3inukHEug%3D%3D)

| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e842975e3c5b4a3e8e075976ae3fd705&_e=ns1Fv0lxBcfxN-CTR_mPTNlWh63zxh66ilhRksu9GLMbWcp7L4RnjXq_OUeZ-XZundEgBKhXqS6EQOLtikhZPQVumbA8keYvtGY49xiWjJJJKqKrnF6JhlFtPdau6SZZV-SgPx9Aas_-dmH-OcOBPiIHw5vl5qQzx6v_0kTNSDZNbqpM6z1I0_0ViACbgkpkMQ-ozebMdrZ2W8bsQPlR9YaQpM2rIDoUjxPzxyIVt0DZzeBknq96PjmWG24mzv5KLvVcO8h2l1PA5gFFdvJO_asKMaZPL3sPfyGWqhquQCUvCJHyDKG54dnt-If7IbRb3oACA1IeyY0CgfcnX9XyI2IqntqmSGFSymc1qWBaAMREPwuqogveN2kjNuv3aapa-qyxwLIoRw68W-avqLLYjw%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e842975e3c5b4a3e8e075976ae3fd705&_e=ns1Fv0lxBcfxN-CTR_mPTNlWh63zxh66ilhRksu9GLMbWcp7L4RnjXq_OUeZ-XZundEgBKhXqS6EQOLtikhZPQVumbA8keYvtGY49xiWjJJJKqKrnF6JhlFtPdau6SZZV-SgPx9Aas_-dmH-OcOBPiIHw5vl5qQzx6v_0kTNSDZNbqpM6z1I0_0ViACbgkpkMQ-ozebMdrZ2W8bsQPlR9YaQpM2rIDoUjxPzxyIVt0DZzeBknq96PjmWG24mzv5Ky0HQk-JeDh6-S__30mNAuAMy5PabBsx3pblwmISuoSCbK3HLDAuYhsYC5ktde9nYjHb2fVdr-5zSzenb6CKnghQ1cG7cts4jSLYp65R2o6jzIBR0YXRytLmGi4F0KW5g821dXp-06PN0hOguKPY4wQ%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e842975e3c5b4a3e8e075976ae3fd705&_e=ns1Fv0lxBcfxN-CTR_mPTNlWh63zxh66ilhRksu9GLMbWcp7L4RnjXq_OUeZ-XZundEgBKhXqS6EQOLtikhZPQVumbA8keYvtGY49xiWjJJJKqKrnF6JhlFtPdau6SZZV-SgPx9Aas_-dmH-OcOBPiIHw5vl5qQzx6v_0kTNSDZNbqpM6z1I0_0ViACbgkpkMQ-ozebMdrZ2W8bsQPlR9YaQpM2rIDoUjxPzxyIVt0DZzeBknq96PjmWG24mzv5Klqy7b8a0aG4p7rIBwYXB0OGnQiE0pafg61yA9kqnykGrGp90MPLX_WDRpPv8QamzM4wgIGoxRWSiRfjj_WrBXVO04G3Ea5UWbUEwAd4NXOYdk5LpmsueiT2IkZBAnqY-1mxFYFKQuMKn59R5uLYafw%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Four years ago today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8255%2E5257348%2E6yS8ko)
Derek,
Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on me, and on our democracy as January 6, 2021 — four years ago today.
I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday.
The sounds of the mob outside. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol building and breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves.
The sight of Capitol police officers running toward danger. Of my colleagues crouched on the floor, clutching masks to protect themselves from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and desecrating the hallowed halls of Congress.
You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, _but barely_.
**Derek, I will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my GOP colleagues in Congress did.**
After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members of Congress still voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of whom are still in office today. _Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties._
Since that day, we have seen continued threats to our Constitution and our democracy.
Our democracy was battered and bruised on January 6, 2021, and it has not yet recovered.
**And Derek, it’s not lost on me that today, as a U.S. Senator, I will be voting to certify the election results of the same man who incited the January 6 insurrection. Even though I disagree with him, even though he calls for my arrest and tries to smear me, I will vote to certify the election — because it’s the will of the American people, and I take this responsibility seriously.**
January 6 will forever mark a somber day in our country’s history. The impacts of that horrific day still reverberate through the halls of Congress. But we will get through this difficult time in our history. America is a deeply resilient country filled with patriotic citizens who love our democracy, and those who do, vastly outnumber those trying to tear it down.
Please take care of yourselves, and thank you for all your support during this pivotal time in our history.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2025_abs_em.slA1qC&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20250106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8255%2E5257348%2E6yS8ko)

name: Team AOC
subject: Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It's been four years since the attack on the Capitol.
#
Four years ago today, a joint session of Congress was disrupted by an attack on the Capitol. Alexandria and her colleagues sheltered in place for hours as rioters breached the House floor to try and overturn the 2020 election results.
Today, a joint session of Congress will confirm **the same president that triggered that attack**.
GOP leadership have worked overtime to downplay the scale and violence of the insurrection, spreading lies about who was responsible for the attack.
But the global rise of fascism hinges on disinformation and the erosion of trust in our democratic processes, and **it’s our responsibility to set the record straight.**
[Alexandria is not afraid to take on fascists and combat right-wing, extremist lies because accountability isn’t about revenge — it’s about creating safety for all. Will you make a $5 contribution today to power our fight? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250106.g53BUm&refcode=em20250106-7860-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7860%2E2526796%2EmN8zQq)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250106.g53BUm&refcode=em20250106-7860-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7860%2E2526796%2EmN8zQq)**
President-elect Trump himself has shared outrageous conspiracy theories over 175 times on Truth Social to avoid accountability for January 6.1 Because of these lies, 25% of Americans — and 34% of Republicans — believe that the January 6th riot was an FBI set-up.2
But Alexandria will not stop fighting for accountability for those who incited the riot because **we are not safe from fascism when people who hold positions of power are willing to endanger the lives of others to score political points.**
If you’re able to chip in to help us go toe-to-toe with right-wing Republicans who are still trying to spread lies about what happened, [you can do so here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250106.g53BUm&refcode=em20250106-7860-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=7860%2E2526796%2EmN8zQq)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**CREW** : Trump has spread conspiracy theories about January 6th more than 175 times on Truth Social](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31534?t=22&akid=7860%2E2526796%2EmN8zQq)
2 - [**Washington Post** : A quarter of Americans believe FBI instigated Jan. 6, Post-UMD poll finds](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22111?t=23&akid=7860%2E2526796%2EmN8zQq)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250106?refcode=em20250106-7860-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&refcode2=7860_2526796_mN8zQq&akid=7860%2E2526796%2EmN8zQq)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250106-7860-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=25&akid=7860%2E2526796%2EmN8zQq)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Alexandria and her colleagues sheltered in place for hours as rioters breached the House floor to try and overturn the 2020 election results. Today, a joint session of Congress will confirm the same president that triggered that attack. GOP leadership have worked overtime to downplay the scale and violence of the insurrection, spreading lies about who was responsible for the attack. But the global rise of fascism hinges on disinformation and the erosion of trust in our democratic processes, and it’s our responsibility to set the record straight. name: Ritchie Torres
subject: The lasting legacy of January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
|
---
Peter,

Today marks four years since a violent mob of insurrectionists, fueled by President Trump’s lies and conspiracies, stormed the United States Capitol.

It was my third day as a Congressman, and a truly terrifying and devastating day that I will never forget.

This dangerous siege was an organized and targeted attack orchestrated by our American democracy’s greatest enemy – the far right.

And now two years later, the perpetrators of the insurrection have yet to be held fully accountable.

**We are living in a terrifying time when political violence has become a new normal — the legacy of January 6.**

So as we mourn the lives that were lost and reflect on this dark day, let this time also be a call to action to stop and condemn these repeated attacks on our democracy.

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99967343/521334090/-250809415?refcode=RTFC_20250106_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWEyNTcwNy02ZGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PAJUzpt8EF0dZlQXDN81jQenfKrzReSqOIRHvWhqw00=&emci=2ea215ab-4fcc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b5a25707-6dcc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=34594689). I know the fights that lie ahead won’t be easy, but I believe that we can stand up for American families and move our country forward as long as folks like you continue to stand with us. | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Roberto Nava
Email: roberto@solidaritystrategies.com
Phone: 787-366-6013
### RootsCamp 2025: The Premier Gathering for Progressive Action
January 23-25, 2025 | Maritime Conference Center, MD Washington, DC — The progressive movement’s leading minds will come together at [RootsCamp 2025,](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=3055ce5bbd&e=b8f90417f9) an innovative “unconference” designed to shape the future of advocacy, elections, and democracy. Held from January 23-25, 2025, at the Maritime Conference Center in Linthicum Heights, MD, RootsCamp invites media outlets to witness and cover this one-of-a-kind event where strategy meets action. RootsCamp’s unique format empowers attendees to create the agenda, fostering dynamic, relevant conversations on the most pressing issues. This collaborative space serves as a launchpad for ideas, strategies, and partnerships that will define the next chapter of progressive advocacy.
#### **Event Highlights**
* What: RootsCamp 2025, a progressive “unconference”
* When: January 23-25, 2025
* Where: Maritime Conference Center, 692 Maritime Blvd, Linthicum Heights, MD
* Format: In-person with hybrid participation available

#### **Why Cover RootsCamp?**
RootsCamp offers unparalleled access to:
* Progressive Leaders & Organizers: Gain insight into the ideas and strategies shaping the movement.
* Innovative Solutions: Explore tools and approaches driving advocacy forward.
* Inspiring Stories: Highlight the voices and visionaries fueling change.

With the 2024 elections behind us, this event provides a critical platform to reflect, strategize, and prepare for the challenges ahead. Journalists are encouraged to attend and report on the discussions and connections forged at RootsCamp 2025.
#### **Media Access**
Members of the press can register for credentials and request interviews with event organizers, speakers, and participants. For registration and additional information, please contact Roberto Nava at roberto@solidaritystrategies.com We will be sharing more updates as we get closer to RootsCamp 2025!

[**_If you’re not ready to talk about it or don’t have time to read the whole email, I understand. But if you could still support Dunn's Democracy Defenders by making a small donation to help us hit our $15,000 goal, I’d appreciate it >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99967603/521334933/-1139120540?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.06_J6-Trauma_B2_F1_S1_C1_U3_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYxNWJmMjYtNmVjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M80Hc5gcBrZizsQR5Y_2st8GhvaxuO7JArBZSefRZZA=)

If you’re still reading this, I’m assuming you’re ready. Let’s talk about our trauma. You and me.

**January 6, 2021.**

The ripples from that day still threaten our democracy.

**_“Watch your back.” “I know where you sleep.” “Be afraid.”_**

Even worse? Donald Trump is threatening the January 6 committee members like Liz Cheney, Bennie Thompson and Adam Schiff.

Because I speak out about these challenges to our democracy, I get the same threatening messages. “We know where you live.”

The only difference between your January 6th trauma and mine is where we were when we experienced it.

I was at the Capitol immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, fear, blood, death, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism.

Capitol and Washington Police officers fought for our lives, the lives of fellow police officers, and the nation's elected leaders – it didn’t matter if they were a Republican, Democrat or an Independent. They were the men and women we sent to Washington to govern our nation.

**It was my duty to protect them. And our democracy.**

All the while, Donald Trump did _nothing_ to help us. For hours after inciting the violence himself – we were beaten bloody. And some died.

Even though my experience looks different from yours, I am first an American citizen. _A girl dad. A football lover. A voter. This is my country – _our country.__

That day was a stain on our nation. And we need to fight like hell to make sure we NEVER repeat a day like that. I’ll continue to use my voice to protect this country. I’ll stand up to the lies, hate, and bigotry. I will always stand my ground to make sure democracy exists.

[**_So I’m asking you to stand with me. We will get through this trauma – we will get through this nightmare – but only if we stand together. Can I count on you to contribute to our January 6th anniversary fund today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99967604/521334934/-1139120540?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.06_J6-Trauma_B2_F1_S1_C1_U3_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYxNWJmMjYtNmVjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M80Hc5gcBrZizsQR5Y_2st8GhvaxuO7JArBZSefRZZA=) | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99967605/521334935/-1139120540?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.06_J6-Trauma_B2_F1_S1_C1_U3_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYxNWJmMjYtNmVjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M80Hc5gcBrZizsQR5Y_2st8GhvaxuO7JArBZSefRZZA=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99967606/521334936/-1139120540?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.06_J6-Trauma_B2_F1_S1_C1_U3_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYxNWJmMjYtNmVjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M80Hc5gcBrZizsQR5Y_2st8GhvaxuO7JArBZSefRZZA=)

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=zThrJXyK3oO9sEurGUGSS3v%2BK6Q7eq3mcVoWJqvef4%2FeM90bXrddoaODeceQgWMNTdbUpU3ZyXc6ESrVM8e28%2FRoeWcEYFQ%2BF6DjOxO3kOrAM5sl6MHAp9Qk2FiWAFAJsxf%2BTwyH%2B2U8wzOZEW%2F%2FMsdTfqFMufdgkPc9YIGiyNgSRQwETPF1giw%2B1TYk%2Bjzny0CaFWw%2B6ul7yy7aoBxU01FcQxGoC7zMYLG5fdlvpiJ4qVNg5VgKhn0i04RZ10agyyUi1Q%2FmjIbCl2V%2F43URRjd783MQdmzaTqJPhCklNXD34mf025oeGHAzLN%2Bw2%2FkbtVKc%2FOCIQ8%2FoYj0aDNdgNGpSsTjUZRxxu4DznEPGE4uJ1w4pQaM7ZgLvBt47za60eQifXwfQ93JQT2hBaXP3ifWsGqKDKXHnYFKAwA7EVDmz%2Fu78s29O3BRMRiDQyJV5)

| |

Four years ago today, Donald Trump led a violent group of his supporters in breaking the centuries-long tradition of a peaceful transfer of power between presidents, resulting in the deaths of several people and cementing January 6, 2021, as one of the darkest days in our nation’s history. Now, in just two weeks, Donald Trump is set to be inaugurated once again for another term. But make no mistake: He and his supporters have not escaped accountability for the role they played in viciously attacking the democracy Americans have fought for centuries to protect. Dr. Ruiz and the Democratic coalition we’ve built will be the first line of defense against whatever a second Trump presidency might hold — and we can assure you that he’s not finished wreaking havoc on all that our country holds dear. But we need you standing with us as we prepare to resume a fight that many of us know all too well. [Will you contribute $10 or any amount possible to Dr. Ruiz today and help fuel his fight against MAGA extremism in Congress for the new session? Now, in just two weeks, Donald Trump is set to be inaugurated once again for another term. But make no mistake: He and his supporters have not escaped accountability for the role they played in viciously attacking the democracy Americans have fought for centuries to protect. Dr. Ruiz and the Democratic coalition we’ve built will be the first line of defense against whatever a second Trump presidency might hold — and we can assure you that he’s not finished wreaking havoc on all that our country holds dear. Peter, four years ago today, a violent mob breached our nation’s Capitol in a desperate attempt to halt the peaceful transfer of power.
Today, the Congress certified President-elect Donald Trump’s victory peacefully. There are no election deniers on our side of the aisle.
Now, everyone will be watching to see how Democrats respond. The action you take in these next 24 hours is essential to demonstrating that we will continue to deliver For The People.
[**_I’m asking: Will you step up and take my Priorities Survey to share what you believe Democrats should focus on in this next Congress and help put us on the path to win the House in the next election? I need 10,000 Democrats to share their priorities with me in order to get an accurate sample size. Can I count on your response? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99967712/521335299/1707618179?source=20250106_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE2MDg3MC02ZWNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQbUrlbA3xUd62PjudvJmtFqiLWPuW57RN34ivJtrc8=&emci=f8af22ef-4bcc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=90160870-6ecc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=21290350)

MAGA Republicans are rushing to prove we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the majority.

|
Friend,**

** Today is the fourth anniversary of the insurrectionist takeover of the United States Capitol on January 6th, 2021.

I’ve heard many people say that fascism could never take over in America because even most Republicans know that it’s bad for business.

While I agree that a large number of Republicans are moderate and most of them likely don’t want a fascist takeover - what we saw on January 6th was **_the triumph of the fascist militant wing of the Republican party_** over all of its moderate voices and impulses. ****

| _Four years ago today. Many of the rioters were armed, highly trained, and belonged to militant extreme right wing groups._

|
Since the new 119th Congress began this past Friday, Democrats in Congress have been engaged in a peaceful transition of power._We don’t do insurrections.

_ Sadly, MAGA doesn’t operate by this playbook.

Unless we can make a fundamental course correction, **_January 6th will happen again_****,** and _again_ , and _again_ , it will keep happening until we lose our republic and everything that makes us America.

I am running in the special election in Florida's 6th because I want us to stay a Democracy and because this bellwether first race of 2025 offers us an opportunity to upend the minuscule GOP majority in Congress **_without storming the Capitol_**. [

name: Brad Finstad
subject: We Did It—Now Let’s Keep Fighting
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQlMwBGIy40Aggwtsn2MyUAAJzOhENvNr8AzTOpmqGmBEEctjXrHQ-PrIfUNY)

I’m honored to have been re-elected to represent Minnesota’s 1st Congressional District and sworn into the 119th Congress. Your steadfast support made this possible, and I can’t thank you enough. Now that President Trump’s re-election has officially been certified, returning him to the White House, and with Republican majorities in the House and Senate, we have a real chance to get America back on track.
That’s why I'm excited about our next steps and want you at my side. We know the Left won’t sit idly by - they'll throw everything they have at us to stop our America First agenda. [Please accept my invitation to become a Sustaining Member of my campaign by making a contribution of any amount today.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQlMwBGIy40Aggwtsn2MyUAAJzOhENvNr8AzTOpmqGmBEEctjXrHQ-PrIfUNY)

This fight isn’t just about holding the line—it’s about delivering real results for the American people. Together, we must secure our borders, fix the economy the Biden Administration left in shambles, unleash American energy, and cut the reckless spending that threatens our future. President Trump’s agenda to Save America is our roadmap, and your support will ensure we have the strength to see it through.
Let’s seize this opportunity and make lasting, meaningful change.
[Please accept my invitation to become a Sustaining Member of my campaign by making a contribution of any amount today.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQlMwBGIy40Aggwtsn2MyUAAJzOhENvNr8AzTOpmqGmBEEctjXrHQ-PrIfUNY)

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Trump being sentenced this week in "hush money" case. Urge judge to consider prison for him
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Judge Merchan he should NOT rule out prison when he sentences Trump on January 10th](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc884a29b-486b-4bb7-b600-aa41870fcd15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4bbf665d-a6cd-4e5e-974a-aaf897dccdfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Judge Juan Merchan, the judge presiding over Trump's "hush money" case in New York has set January 10th as the date for Trump's sentencing. [**But Merchan has indicated that he will NOT include incarceration as part of the sentence, even though it is authorized, because it would not be "practicable."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76a72bf1-c296-4b47-9030-0854b62d73bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Please join us in urging Merchan to reconsider. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21997b7c-afff-43f6-8467-5ab34745a411/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump was found guilty of of 34 felonies. He should not be given special treatment because he won an election, he should be treated like any other convicted felon -- no better and no worse. And if that means jail time, so be it. [**Please join with us, add your name, and urge Merchan NOT to rule out jail time for Trump, simply because he won the election.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d54db10-5290-4cd3-8dbc-a12cc8e4e2a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf499f0d6-6325-45f9-8d81-1fb86874f43f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9aa9e66b-917c-49df-9251-d2e5650c8a45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8609bfb6-9311-47a4-98d1-399434f5d297/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0838231-e359-4728-94a1-96382c94d65c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Dear Friend,

We heard from many Californians who missed our New Year's Eve Revival in Florida but wanted to kick off the new year with praise and worship! So without further ado, we're bringing a powerful Holy Spirit experience to California! Join us at for a special one-night revival on January 11th at Los Angeles' historic Angelus Temple! Let Us Worship brought worship to Angelus Temple last year, but we're coming back for another powerful night of worship! Come join us—details below!!

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Standing up to protect our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
Their goal has always been to undermine our democratic process. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99968764/521339565/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFiZTQ3YS03M2NjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8q1xDmThi6pd6SwA_oguTX9d4HjSAbazjOrWeK-Q7yw=)

Friend, Four years ago today, right-wing extremists stormed our Capitol in a blatant attack to stop the peaceful transfer of power. After relentless months of Donald Trump seeding doubts and spreading falsehoods about winning the 2020 election, his inciting language drove an angry mob to attempt to overturn the results by force. In these past four years, numerous right-wing members of Congress have persistently sought to undermine our democracy. By fueling and promoting Trump's Big Lie, they've relentlessly blocked essential legislation meant to safeguard equitable access to the ballot box for all Americans. Their goal? Undermine our democratic process. Now, we’re heading into a second Trump Administration with a GOP majority that empowers such extremism, it's become more crucial than ever to protect our democracy. I am fully committed to standing up and fighting for our democratic principles. But I need your support to do it. As we gear up to get back to work in the 119th Congress, your involvement is vital. **We must show the far-right that a robust grassroots movement stands determined to counter GOP radicalism and fortify our democracy.** **[Can I count on you today to join us in this fight? Your signature will serve as a powerful message that we, the people, are united and resolute in overcoming extremist threats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99968765/521339566/809935222?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFiZTQ3YS03M2NjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8q1xDmThi6pd6SwA_oguTX9d4HjSAbazjOrWeK-Q7yw=&emci=00dead74-73cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a1be47a-73cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=13891387)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99968766/521339567/809935222?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFiZTQ3YS03M2NjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8q1xDmThi6pd6SwA_oguTX9d4HjSAbazjOrWeK-Q7yw=&emci=00dead74-73cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a1be47a-73cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=13891387)

name: Bill Gray
subject: What do you think about the campus protests?
body:
Campus radicals

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ed61558928a94d7792053b9831296fba&_e=dyFgh_6qqalzA0pwxEl54Sotex6IP3omuFHcjSxUXvavZ0FdrSo5RIYu2YGbwPE86LZYGoTgIh_GNSjVn6u3My0DCUK1t24vwiw8QQ8uV_UWMATR0wTXlQlxWxdbatwjiU3X0DJ9YytnmXEGWT5k3P2tRBX_dVF59-S0dF1AHs4mV7ARI-X5mCgY6CJFkG5vFJadZkPCqsbxZELt6zfqOsYbE98b4S6CCUDe_8ysNIOoM4ND9T4o9xIh3C0iXTNTavT2u00ClFGuQUjkMJs9wDk3KDV1M6Z3tRAkzfWd7QiMWvd3oGQ4QTALwoUZGcQsCyOcqGziIdqT5f6_GGpTNdlfL6vSQG1_xQJQ0F1Y9_srsMKpXqKY8fm2P-0zec88TJhOdWwrnmkh--q2UmkDvQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Have you followed the latest coming from college and university campuses in America?

In 2024, revolutionary leftists and rent-a-mob organizations funded by progressive billionaires occupied elite universities across the country.

Many of these universities canceled classes and commencement due to pro-terror protests. Police have arrested students and even professors at several institutions due to violence!

That's why I need to hear from you right away. What do you think about all of this?
**Could you please take a few minutes to complete our National Survey on Higher Education and let me know your thoughts[today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ed61558928a94d7792053b9831296fba&_e=dyFgh_6qqalzA0pwxEl54Sotex6IP3omuFHcjSxUXvavZ0FdrSo5RIYu2YGbwPE86LZYGoTgIh_GNSjVn6u3My0DCUK1t24vwiw8QQ8uV_UWMATR0wTXlQlxWxdbatwjiU3X0DJ9YytnmXEGWT5k3P2tRBX_dVF59-S0dF1AHs4mV7ARI-X5mCgY6CJFkG5vFJadZkPCqsbxZELt6zfqOsYbE98b4S6CCUDe_8ysNIOoM4ND9T4o9xIh3C0iXTNTcQzzvdh2qPLeVRn8Ar2dR-hTuG7vrWmIY322BVk_T-S4_amJGrPJUbDZouhdNZ3wG2vhhyoHUefsjPmgN_nWQlsI2WFZDkDnU3s-I8QSUvdG0tHo9cou2tGAcQvk7vjeqmqhxg2FXgav-TQBIAzetw%3D%3D)?**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ed61558928a94d7792053b9831296fba&_e=dyFgh_6qqalzA0pwxEl54Sotex6IP3omuFHcjSxUXvavZ0FdrSo5RIYu2YGbwPE86LZYGoTgIh_GNSjVn6u3My0DCUK1t24vwiw8QQ8uV_UWMATR0wTXlQlxWxdbatwjiU3X0DJ9YytnmXEGWT5k3P2tRBX_dVF59-S0dF1AHs4mV7ARI-X5mCgY6CJFkG5vFJadZkPCqsbxZELt6zfqOsYbE98b4S6CCUDe_8ysNIOoM4ND9T4o9xIh3C0iXTNT0m02VpVKAbj9KA8B8XGE0b-LyHFR4sTlyLvxGU2tb5465aObNcF26QMiCOhkVsJSdATs7qgZA7r-t52WJXyobOaQo5an8iYQq-jI2h-A4pYAAi2KfNbDWaWTFk1GQrawlUienTv9sGYacFFBD7zWvQ%3D%3D)

** Thank you in advance for letting me know your thoughts.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, ’01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars have helped far-Left activists, administrators, and bureaucrats take over elite colleges and universities. That’s why you see these places erupt in protests—and even violent mobs—that have led to canceled classes and commencements, and even the arrests of students and professors.

That’s why I’m asking you today to take Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on Higher Education**. It’ll only take a few minutes. You can find our survey at the secure link here:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ed61558928a94d7792053b9831296fba&_e=dyFgh_6qqalzA0pwxEl54Sotex6IP3omuFHcjSxUXvavZ0FdrSo5RIYu2YGbwPE86LZYGoTgIh_GNSjVn6u3My0DCUK1t24vwiw8QQ8uV_UWMATR0wTXlQlxWxdbatwjiU3X0DJ9YytnmXEGWT5k3P2tRBX_dVF59-S0dF1AHs4mV7ARI-X5mCgY6CJFkG5vFJadZkPCqsbxZELt6zfqOsYbE98b4S6CCUDe_8ysNIOoM4ND9T4o9xIh3C0iXTNTOaK9zUjBGtUCFcTPI1z4qYVT2Bs-o8_D-oEmCQoOmUTDzqjhDjTpDsH93ZClkLQgmqG5Y-r9Qzz9ilWajIbVVe2_NPVkotFprLdx_Px6Oza4NLlBx7FJKCe180vY9MQNzyunc5D6NwAVozT4d4XiuA%3D%3D)**

Thanks again!

subject: I Witnessed the most Preventable Law Enforcement Blunder in American History
body:

# [I Witnessed the most Preventable Law Enforcement Blunder in American History](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154279762&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0Mjc5NzYyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzYyMDA1MjEsImV4cCI6MTczODc5MjUyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gover_rODitO7zEe-Ji-o_pKJpE6b3yARZmKcf4gSCU)
### When I arrived at the Capitol just after 2 p.m. on January 6, 2021, my first thought was 'why am I better prepared than these cops?'
Jan 6
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154279762&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0Mjc5NzYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjIwMDUyMSwiZXhwIjoxNzM4NzkyNTIxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3qcfZoCUI3hux-zFpOYPjdRxwCbhLHwDjEno8Qd15AQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154279762&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0Mjc5NzYyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzYyMDA1MjEsImV4cCI6MTczODc5MjUyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gover_rODitO7zEe-Ji-o_pKJpE6b3yARZmKcf4gSCU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/i-witnessed-the-most-preventable?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

When I arrived at the western front of the Capitol just after 2 p.m. on January 6, 2021, my first thought was _ 'why am I better prepared than these cops?'_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/958a8323-c2fe-40fd-967d-13fe85c021a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the early afternoon of January 6, I was serving my role as Chief Video Director of Daily Caller, streaming Trump's speech from my house in Georgetown, four miles from the Capitol. I had five reporters on the ground and, knowing that internet would be limited to nonexistent, I elected to stay home where I could manage the team over wifi. I thought that violence would start after the rally when Trump supporters filtered out into the city and clashed with counter protesters, as I had witnessed during the escalating street brawls that took place at the first Stop the Steal rally in DC in November, and the second one in December. During the second rally, the Proud Boys showed up by the hundreds and I knew they would return for January 6. That's why, when I heard a report that police were running around while Trump supporters marched toward the Capitol as Trump's speech winded down, I knew that violence and mayhem was afoot. As it happened, I was able to hail an Uber then skateboard down to the Capitol quicker than police could muster appropriate reinforcements.
As shown **[in this video](https://substack.com/redirect/31fbb7cf-ab84-4621-bde5-8078f84b51cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , most of the officers were painfully unprepared to defend the western front of the Capitol against a wave of tens of thousands of protesters, Trump supporters, and a much smaller group of scurrilous agitators.
As I continued down the line, a few rioters armed with their own cans of pepper spray hosed down the cops. The officers responded with their own spats of mace. The air was thick with the spicy liquid. Fortunately, I was prepared with a ballistic helmet, a bulletproof vest, bulletproof backpack, and gas mask. Most of the cops were not so lucky. Many of them were **[rendered blind and unable to continue their duties](https://substack.com/redirect/9b20a9cc-d7c7-4d8c-a188-82549e3334e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** defending what was allegedly one of the most secure buildings on earth.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/716feea8-951f-4ed4-bf2a-a1f54d710566?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I continued along the police line towards the media tower that was partially constructed for Joe Biden's Inauguration. When I climbed up for a better angle of the clashes, I was astonished to find only about 100 police officers holding the line against tens of thousands pushing towards the Capitol. I was looking down at a lost cause as one man broke through the line, then another. Meanwhile, hundreds were streaming around the cops through the scaffolding that supported the grandstands for the impending Inauguration. The bleachers acted as a siege tower that made the western front even more impossible to defend. The Capitol and Metro police officers never stood a chance.
* * *
# Quick intermission...
Check out my book **["Riot Diet"](https://substack.com/redirect/b5fdc533-3bf7-4932-badf-e1c758a04876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for my firsthand account covering the left-wing riots of 2020 that the media told you were "peaceful protests."
FYI, they weren't...
Get your info directly from the source, not from mainstream media giants trying to sell you an agenda. **[Pick it up using the link below:](https://substack.com/redirect/b5fdc533-3bf7-4932-badf-e1c758a04876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5fdc533-3bf7-4932-badf-e1c758a04876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ Get "Riot Diet" Today](https://substack.com/redirect/b5fdc533-3bf7-4932-badf-e1c758a04876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**PROCEED WITH CAUTION:** any questions about exactly why law enforcement failed so miserably that day will be labeled as an anti-Democratic **CONSPIRACY THEORY.** The irony being that no one got screwed worse than the sorry cops without gas masks in the image below.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83e8f61f-63d6-4149-9068-a11f297e0e4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/88a9ef05-7900-4e4f-bea7-56f6c32fcd4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ec0cd8c7-a427-4f67-a29b-682ed8492ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I watched from on high as police retreated and hundreds streamed into the Capitol building. I was confronted with the decision of whether or not I should follow them in. As with the protests and riots during the so-called "Summer of Love" of 2020, my job was to show the public unadulterated video from on the ground, rather than relying on law enforcement or protesters/rioters to show their versions of what went down. Besides, I had Congressional Press Credentials issued by the House Radio TV Gallery, and I would have been able to enter restricted areas of the Capitol building even if there were no riot taking place.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f1985e13-e175-464c-922d-9ce5bd73f8a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I followed them in, scaling a wall on the western front in order to get to the Rotunda as quickly as possible. Once inside, many marveled at the sight of the building's beautiful interior and priceless works of art. Others were determined to stop the counting of the votes. I followed one contingency all the way to the House Floor. Through a broken window, the Sergeant at Arms had pistols pointed at us on the other side of the doors that led to where Congressmen were still filing out of the gallery. At that moment I feared I might be caught in the crossfire, as I was in Kenosha, Wisconsin less than four months prior.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/68f9437a-25ee-44d3-9458-f978fe11984b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Fortunately, police reinforcements arrived and pried the mob away from the doors. Ten minutes later, I found myself interviewing a man who decided to roll and smoke a joint beneath the dome of the Capitol Rotunda. In a matter of minutes, I witnessed a savage effort to stop the proceedings on the House Floor, and a man who decided to smoke weed inside of the Capitol. As with the BLM protests/riots, present at the Capitol were both violent agitators and peaceful demonstrators.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27075b1e-df83-42bd-9b6b-14c92cdd58b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f33878d5-28ee-40a6-b691-fd19f7492b92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/eb66ba9c-7464-4cee-a74f-004ed08dea77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Regardless of the proportion of peaceful vs not so peaceful demonstrators that entered the Capitol that day, one essential question has remained unanswered and has burned into my mind ever since, '_why was I better prepared than the cops? '_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b46d6ce7-a474-4c13-8aec-1feefacd7800?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At 1:00 p.m. how was I-using the limited intelligence afforded to my little video team-able to ascertain that s***t was about to hit the fan, then grab my protective gear, hail a ride, and skateboard to the Capitol, all before the cops were able to reinforce their numbers? Federal law enforcement has already admitted that they had dozens of confidential sources on the ground that day. Was their intel shared with Capitol and Metro Police? If so, why were they not better prepared? If not, then why? Why have I witnessed routine anti-abortion marches with more security around the Capitol than what I saw on January 6? And why, after years of the most comprehensive manhunt in American history and an entire Congressional investigation, have none of these questions been addressed?
The answer is simple: political gamesmanship. Liz Cheney and her January 6 committee were more keen on dragging Trumpers through the mud than unearthing actual facts.
It's time for all the partisan hacks to stop decrying that what happened on January 6 should disqualify Trump from ever holding office again. In November, voters resoundingly showed that the American people want a second term from Trump. Once he takes office, the public should demand a real investigation into what happened on January 6, 2021. Perhaps one day we can learn the answer to that question, _why was a lowly video director better prepared than the cops?_
* * *
_All images and footage used was taken by Richie McGinniss on January 6 as a reporter for the Daily Caller._
* * *
Remember to pick up **[Richie's new book "Riot Diet"](https://substack.com/redirect/b5fdc533-3bf7-4932-badf-e1c758a04876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about his experience covering the 2020 riots that destroyed cities across America.
[Bring me to the book!](https://substack.com/redirect/b5fdc533-3bf7-4932-badf-e1c758a04876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Today marks the 4th anniversary of a dark day in American history. On January 6, 2021, MAGA extremists launched an egregious attack on Capitol Hill and our democracy at the bidding of Donald Trump — an attack that resulted in several deaths, including that of a Capitol Police officer. Shortly after, 147 Republicans voted to decertify the fair results of the 2020 presidential election. Now, we’re two weeks away from a Republican trifecta spearheaded by Donald Trump taking control of our government. I'm proud to be your representative because I love our community, our public lands and working with you to make New Mexico the best it can be. Meanwhile, four years after the January 6 attacks, MAGA extremists are still busy undermining democracy and freedom and spreading conspiracy theories instead of fighting for the people who elected them. I'm ready to keep creating progress for you and help Democrats reclaim our House majority in the upcoming cycle, but with our democracy and freedoms on the line, we can't afford to back down for a second. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Today marks the 4th anniversary of a dark day in American history. On January 6, 2021, MAGA extremists launched an egregious attack on Capitol Hill and our democracy at the bidding of Donald Trump — an attack that resulted in several deaths, including that of a Capitol Police officer. Shortly after, 147 Republicans voted to decertify the fair results of the 2020 presidential election. Now, we’re two weeks away from a Republican trifecta spearheaded by Donald Trump taking control of our government. I'm proud to be your representative because I love our community, our public lands and working with you to make New Mexico the best it can be. Meanwhile, four years after the January 6 attacks, MAGA extremists are still busy undermining democracy and freedom and spreading conspiracy theories instead of fighting for the people who elected them. I'm ready to keep creating progress for you and help Democrats reclaim our House majority in the upcoming cycle, but with our democracy and freedoms on the line, we can't afford to back down for a second. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. Gabe Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . body:
"Congestion Relief Zone - 9 Dollars"

| | | | [ ](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/_j2mtk_2AAH~/RFgrZk5FSXB3MjlyN3lWNDQzejZOL0JwYllNUCtYa05oUTZ5MTEvY0pEdk04RGZwejd6QVhDRndUaFZLci82b3g0YVp0TklsbSs3UnpRVUdyYlQ0WDg5SXFDeXBmTGJLMFFmODRxTUNMc3c9S0/)
---
| | Peter, The worst Governor in America just _**fleeced**_ hard-working New Yorkers out of their money with her new congestion pricing tax.
---
| | [ ](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/20_~JdYrDDFA/RFgrZk5FSXB3MjlyN3lWNDQzejZOL0JwYllNUCtYa05oUTZ5MTEvY0pEdk04RGZwejd6QVhDRndUaFZLci82b3g0YVp0TklsbSs3UnpRVUdyYlQ0WDg5SXFDeXBmTGJLMFFmODRxTUNMc3c9S0/)
---
| | In case you aren’t aware, here’s a quick breakdown of what Governor Hochul’s regressive tax will do: ✅Punish cops, teachers, firefighters, construction workers, and nurses for going to work
✅Do nothing to solve the systemic waste, fraud, and abuse in the MTA
✅Force businesses out of Manhattan
✅Do nothing to fix the public safety crisis in our subways
✅Increase asthma rates in the Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, and surrounding communities And that’s just the beginning. [**_Governor Hochul is sticking it to the people who can least afford it, while the MTA keeps failing us._**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/9-R~HVj4AAfK/RFgrZk5FSXB3MjlyN3lWNDQzejZOL0JwYllNUCtYa05oUTZ5MTEvY0pEdk04RGZwejd6QVhDRndUaFZLci82b3g0YVp0TklsbSs3UnpRVUdyYlQ0WDg5SXFDeXBmTGJLMFFmODRxTUNMc3c9S0/) Crime is up, delays are constant, and our public transit system is a disaster. _**It’s only going to get worse unless we act fast.**_ **Here’s the thing:** The congestion pricing toll is $9—that’s what you’ll be forced to pay every time you drive into Manhattan. [**_So that’s why I’m asking, will you please chip in $9 today to help fund our campaign to stop Governor Hochul’s congestion pricing attack?_**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/kExAckYgDDH7/RFgrZk5FSXB3MjlyN3lWNDQzejZOL0JwYllNUCtYa05oUTZ5MTEvY0pEdk04RGZwejd6QVhDRndUaFZLci82b3g0YVp0TklsbSs3UnpRVUdyYlQ0WDg5SXFDeXBmTGJLMFFmODRxTUNMc3c9S0/)
---
| | | [ STOP HOCHUL’S CONGESTION PRICING ](https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/congestion-pricing-9/?amount=9?utm_source=AC&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=20250106_Lawler_CongestionPricing9&utm_id=Pcoin)
---
| | Together, we can show Hochul, the MTA, the Democrats in the Albany Legislature who signed off on this crap, that New Yorkers are not their ATM. We can stop this attack on working families, but we need your help to do it.
---
| | | [ STOP HOCHUL’S CONGESTION PRICING ](https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/congestion-pricing-9/?amount=9?utm_source=AC&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=20250106_Lawler_CongestionPricing9&utm_id=Pcoin)
---

---
|

He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Stock trading ban? I want to know what you think.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s a simple question: Should there be a ban on stock trading for members of Congress?
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-stock_trading/?source=em250106-1-gm&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)
Friend — I want to know what you think.
It’s a simple question: Should there be a ban on stock trading for members of Congress? Vote here:
**[YES](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-stock_trading/?source=em250106-1-gm&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**
**[NO](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-stock_trading/?source=em250106-1-gm&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**
**[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-stock_trading/?source=em250106-1-gm&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**
Congress deals with the most pressing issues of our nation, and that includes the economy and financial sector. We make policy decisions that can shift markets and change the economic situation of this country.
With that much power, it’s completely unfair that members of Congress can then turn around and get rich by investing with insider information.
**[So I want to show that a vast majority of Americans agree that it’s time to ban stock trading in Congress.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-stock_trading/?source=em250106-1-gm&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**
**[MAKE YOUR VOTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-stock_trading/?source=em250106-1-gm&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1433_791427_pdSBJC&akid=1433%2E791427%2EpdSBJC)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033
