name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b3024a8354aa4eafac742124d42e9417&_t=0L0c8gEZbrlk_dOuNbcb0yJORqNXr5qjSeZJrklSW7U0XxicjziXlJ7u8w0AGXfjW2oevhZVNS2H0dFY-KXJIrDQA1rltnr7rqBS_n_hgE5w0UWi0gb4bi5a7Qb7vINr)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b3024a8354aa4eafac742124d42e9417&_e=_kNa14XavhDoo5SZVKD-QYy_eDAWHwugyecFQa9KSjK00YOXXXmVQXak-ta3tw3vVHARTxQ11l5OyI4NHZVyZvwdnDVGnnhkUUxkWFQZt4GQV1hEOUF27CYYTDXcyi2xg22xPwnXuAAbIsh3MQVPbMTxmIyMSN5tqcV5BAE3JTQzDEt13A2TGBWyuVeaHBcGtazzAeXBpUyHcJFfDWnZhb4gRCYl1FABbgKcPO8PosdPtBZcQTHdl0-2Vrm5w_Fm03oibRI5VnIAR9uWdO-0k5ugrB7KDnloYoXAvXBdHrbAxpjqPkVml3xpQquwEtXWLNiqa2Npc2BJYT7YkmmBJdts4m13sSbcTKN7kJ7l1rhORVImnkN_WMGyKl-Vd_tH)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
* Hides the corruption of the ruling class
* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b3024a8354aa4eafac742124d42e9417&_e=_kNa14XavhDoo5SZVKD-QYy_eDAWHwugyecFQa9KSjK00YOXXXmVQXak-ta3tw3vVHARTxQ11l5OyI4NHZVyZvwdnDVGnnhkUUxkWFQZt4GQV1hEOUF27CYYTDXcyi2xg22xPwnXuAAbIsh3MQVPbMTxmIyMSN5tqcV5BAE3JTQzDEt13A2TGBWyuVeaHBcGtazzAeXBpUyHcJFfDWnZhb4gRCYl1FABbgKcPO8PosfEJkjBbGl6b_KebGnnm1RGx4dmzPbqDXlL8iq2m06G9vuLUho2MgQGrv8QIa1ZKxUi1XjTNPyc0_e2yd8M5dXYdxNi4vqMYpb7wV7TeqsUm9efe65bvdisd5wDHknhcsNRqHpvt-1lXg5qF8jAXWt6)**

The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.**

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack.

**You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.**

A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b3024a8354aa4eafac742124d42e9417&_e=_kNa14XavhDoo5SZVKD-QYy_eDAWHwugyecFQa9KSjK00YOXXXmVQXak-ta3tw3vVHARTxQ11l5OyI4NHZVyZvwdnDVGnnhkUUxkWFQZt4GQV1hEOUF27CYYTDXcyi2xg22xPwnXuAAbIsh3MQVPbMTxmIyMSN5tqcV5BAE3JTQzDEt13A2TGBWyuVeaHBcGtazzAeXBpUyHcJFfDWnZhb4gRCYl1FABbgKcPO8PosfAJbjnQeg4B3F5lGJdYA_Cs1oMSGM7G4Z-N9yISwve1EyCy22m7hUcfhilcayeaUQqG-y42j9xSUHEN_NVa-M0QAKQuc4uSBlAeqPWX2nqX-e2yllU3CgVL5hNxMkg5bbcMfot0pG5LL8KLX9zF2qi)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b3024a8354aa4eafac742124d42e9417&_t=0L0c8gEZbrlk_dOuNbcb0yJORqNXr5qjSeZJrklSW7U0XxicjziXlJ7u8w0AGXfjW2oevhZVNS2H0dFY-KXJIj-xWLSRiHSpkqDxZcP_CycTezpm8tWzAsDzM7oLQpzSLunzSwCYMVL1njqK4mRE33LjMiRBSPm61aGNcVpbgD0%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b3024a8354aa4eafac742124d42e9417&_t=0L0c8gEZbrlk_dOuNbcb0yJORqNXr5qjSeZJrklSW7U0XxicjziXlJ7u8w0AGXfjW2oevhZVNS2H0dFY-KXJIrDQA1rltnr7rqBS_n_hgE5w0UWi0gb4bi5a7Qb7vINr).
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Four years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As Members of Congress certify the results of the election today, let us never forget how close we came to losing our democracy completely four years ago.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250106-4647-footer&t=1&akid=4647%2E420207%2E2WSCby)
Peter,
Today, members of Congress returned to the U.S. Capitol to do one of our most important constitutional duties — certify the results of the Presidential election and ensure a peaceful transfer of power.
What we did today is in stark contrast to what happened four years ago, when insurrectionists — fueled by sitting President Donald Trump — attacked the U.S. Capitol in the most violent attack since the War of 1812.
That day, U.S. Capitol Police officers were killed, and hundreds — including over 140 law enforcement officers — were injured. Today, we remember their courage and bravery even as Republicans have refused to put up a Congressionally mandated plaque to honor those officers.
I know that many Americans across the country are still processing how it is possible that a President who resisted the peaceful transfer of power four years ago — and is also the first-ever convicted felon elected — could enter the Oval Office.
While I intend to do everything possible to continue to protect our democracy and to stand up for vulnerable Americans who stand to lose Social Security and Medicare and struggling Americans who will see their grocery prices rise while billionaires get another Trump tax scam, **I also know that the survival of our democracy depends on our willingness to uphold the results of our elections, whether we like them or not.**
But as we certified the elections today, let us never forget how close we came four years ago to losing our democracy completely.
As someone who was trapped in the Gallery that day, I remember vividly how close we came to not making it out alive. I will never forget the pounding on the doors, the shouting and screaming of both those trying to overrun our democracy and those putting their lives on the line to defend it.
I will never forget that, despite the violence, we returned that night to do the very thing we were elected to do: to certify the election for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. I also will never forget the handful of brave Republicans who, in the weeks following, stood up to put country over party during Trump’s impeachment trial.
If Donald Trump moves forward with pardoning the January 6 rioters, as he has pledged to do, he will once again be doing violence to our country and our democracy and encouraging it again in the future. **Despite those or any other efforts to rewrite history, that day will never be forgotten for its horrific violence, for just how close we came to losing our democracy, and for the strength and bravery of so many who fought to make sure we respected the results of a fair and free election.**
That day showed me just how fragile our democracy is. We can never take this for granted and we must work to protect and strengthen our democracy every single day, against all threats to it. I pledge to do exactly that.
[**If you’re with us in the mission to protect our democracy, please pitch in $3 or anything you can to sustain our campaign. Every donation adds up, no matter how large or small, and it makes more of a difference than you know.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250106?refcode=em20250106-4647&amount=3&refcode2=4647_420207_2WSCby&akid=4647%2E420207%2E2WSCby)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250106?amount=3&refcode=em20250106-4647&refcode2=4647_420207_2WSCby&akid=4647%2E420207%2E2WSCby)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250106-4647-footer&t=2&refcode2=4647_420207_2WSCby&akid=4647%2E420207%2E2WSCby)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4647%2E420207%2E2WSCby)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4647%2E420207%2E2WSCby)

name: David Horowitz
subject: Communism begins where atheism begins
body:
| | | Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020?
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020? Our own government would treat you as a criminal.
But these same Leftists bureaucrats worked hard to make sure liquor stores and weed dispensaries remained open as “essential” businesses. And if you wanted to riot in the streets causing millions of dollars in damages to private property – they’d give you the keys to the city I’ll never forget what they did—because if given the chance, they’d do it all over again. They claimed it was about “safety.” But their own actions clearly demonstrated that was a lie. It was about control. It was always about control. And it was about silencing faith. The truth is the Left’s agenda is insidious. For over 50 years, Leftists and communists have infiltrated our institutions—turning them into tools to further their agenda, particularly their decades-long war on Christian America. No matter what you believe or how you worship, this fight is yours, too. The radical Left knows that Christianity isn’t just a religion in America—it’s the foundation of the freedoms, rights, and liberties that define our nation. That’s why they’re determined to tear it out by the roots. **[**I explain all of this in my book _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=12ed53f42f4b4ce3a7556a97aaed63e3&_e=-VxAjvSTp2zXLB-TW0O2yobg7hcmPZrTd0TDZjjIQZ6jlYxWPUBpr3_mnh_no13Aq-nB4dyt-4XxPAOM0OO6K3wfYBDqcgEmlHOgiBPkKNFOvzSuL7kATz78kWvgyTtwO3wIwmuXTCH2zLPIj2Aj_5rr6vx3tZkks9H3Wclr63ljxQQleksK0o2i8WaBsstC66r5r1NiTVj5hFLg2ADrgixzMCIwGrNFNj2Mw3YiYKys7T--qxOZbJcZZRh3JjIg3Tlb1kGmliHVHCqFCaTdYgFubwJlfF5qtOmdj0sNjQWtEv7HSSBMlC-B_prndkisU34gWngsGf6_h0ffAaTUfKzebEQTbFsDqumFBE_p3VADfWm75202rSHUrCyetrpNHrzeQ59Mllvn-QT2Nj2y-VWUCjub0nMwa19lMu2UkRo%3D)** You might be surprised to learn that I’m not a Christian. name: David Hogg
subject: I want to connect, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Want more updates directly from me?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250106-1&t=1&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)
Peter, it’s pretty obvious at this point that most liberals have departed Twitter.
I don’t blame the people who deactivated their accounts. There has been an undeniable decline on the platform ever since Elon Musk took control in 2022.
Now, whether you follow him or not, you see something from Elon every few tweets, alongside a major increase in right-wing and conspiracy-related content.
**All that said, I’m not quitting Twitter.** I actually like being surrounded by people who disagree with me. I’m not afraid to debate issues. It’s when I learn the most.
If you’re still on Twitter/X, **[follow me](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/1595?t=2&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)** for updates about our work at Leaders We Deserve, my campaign for DNC Vice Chair, and thoughts on the news of the day.
**[FOLLOW ME ON TWITTER/X »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/1595?t=3&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)**
Just because I’m not leaving Twitter doesn’t mean I’m not excited about the future of social media. I think it’s awesome that progressives are staking a claim in a new platform called Bluesky – and have so far successfully cultivated a community free from obnoxious right-wing troll accounts and literal Nazis that are plaguing Twitter.
I’m still getting started on Bluesky. If you’re already there, **[follow me](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/1596?t=4&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)** and join the conversation. I would love to see our community on Bluesky keep growing larger!
**[FOLLOW ME ON BLUESKY »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/1596?t=5&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)**
Thank you!!
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250106-1&t=6&refcode2=1607_587540_KZEMjM&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1607%2E587540%2EKZEMjM)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003

subject: this is an email about our trauma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99970169/521344833/-1287247087?refcode=em-1.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjY3Njc1My03ZGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60_wm7zN4sCAAV2ZphdGO4MDiLz6v-rvCFOa9kQuvrc=)

This is going to be a long email about our January 6th trauma.

**[If you’re not ready to talk about it or don’t have time to read the whole email, I understand. But if you could still support Dunn's Democracy Defenders and DASS by making a split donation to help us hit our $15,000 goal, I’d appreciate it>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99970171/521344835/-1287247087?refcode=em-1.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjY3Njc1My03ZGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60_wm7zN4sCAAV2ZphdGO4MDiLz6v-rvCFOa9kQuvrc=)**

If you’re still reading this, I’m assuming you’re ready. Let’s talk about our trauma. You and me.

**January 6, 2021.**

The ripples from that day still threaten our democracy.

_**“Watch your back.” “I know where you sleep.” “Be afraid.”**_

Even worse? Donald Trump is threatening the January 6 committee members like Liz Cheney, Bennie Thompson and Adam Schiff.

Because I speak out about these challenges to our democracy, I get the same threatening messages. “We know where you live.”

The only difference between your January 6th trauma and mine is where we were when we experienced it.

I was at the Capitol immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, fear, blood, death, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism.

Capitol and Washington Police officers fought for our lives, the lives of fellow police officers, and the nation's elected leaders – it didn’t matter if they were a Republican, Democrat or an Independent. They were the men and women we sent to Washington to govern our nation.

**It was my duty to protect them. And our democracy.**

All the while, Donald Trump did _nothing_ to help us. For hours after inciting the violence himself – we were beaten bloody. And some died.

Even though my experience looks different from yours, _I am first an American citizen. A girl dad. A football lover. A voter. This is my country – _our country.__

That day was a stain on our nation. And we need to fight like hell to make sure we NEVER repeat a day like that. I’ll continue to use my voice to protect this country. I’ll stand up to the lies, hate, and bigotry. I will always stand my ground to make sure democracy exists. [**So I’m asking you to stand with me. We will get through this trauma – we will get through this nightmare – but only if we stand together. Will you chip in a split contribution between Dunn’s Democracy Defenders and DASS today to help us in this important fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99970173/521344837/-1287247087?refcode=em-1.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjY3Njc1My03ZGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60_wm7zN4sCAAV2ZphdGO4MDiLz6v-rvCFOa9kQuvrc=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99970175/521344839/-1287247087?refcode=em-1.6.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjY3Njc1My03ZGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60_wm7zN4sCAAV2ZphdGO4MDiLz6v-rvCFOa9kQuvrc=)**

name: Mark Takano
subject: Four years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Thank you for standing up for democracy and our country

| Peter,

Four years ago, a violent mob of insurrectionists, agitated and encouraged by Donald Trump, stormed the Capitol and attempted to overturn the 2020 election. And when the chaos of that day ended, it appeared that they had failed.

**Today, as Congress gathers to certify President-elect Trump’s 2nd presidential victory, that belief is shattered.**

We are living in a frightening time when political violence has not only become normal, but it’s _supported_ by the man who is once again about to ascend to the highest office in the land.

And as we mourn the lives that were lost and reflect on the sacrifice of all the officers who protected our Capitol that day, we must remain resolute in our defense of our democracy.

I am not done fighting for accountability and justice from the events of Jan. 6. But let’s make sure that our solemn remembrances don’t ring hollow. **We must confront _why_ the American people voted to re-elect Donald Trump despite the events of January 6th.**

We must re-commit ourselves as the party of the working class. A party that confronts the truths of a changing economy, an expensive healthcare system, and a government that too many Americans see themselves being cut out from.

**Unless we regain their trust, unless we fight for them, unless we are honest with ourselves – every email or tweet we write on this anniversary will be nothing more than hollow.** So, Peter, thank you for standing with me in this fight. Thank you for standing with our democracy, our country, and its people.

– Mark Takano
---
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

clean_body: Thank you for standing up for democracy and our country | Peter, Four years ago, a violent mob of insurrectionists, agitated and encouraged by Donald Trump, stormed the Capitol and attempted to overturn the 2020 election. And when the chaos of that day ended, it appeared that they had failed. Today, as Congress gathers to certify President-elect Trump’s 2nd presidential victory, that belief is shattered. We are living in a frightening time when political violence has not only become normal, but it’s supported by the man who is once again about to ascend to the highest office in the land. And as we mourn the lives that were lost and reflect on the sacrifice of all the officers who protected our Capitol that day, we must remain resolute in our defense of our democracy. I am not done fighting for accountability and justice from the events of Jan. 6. But let’s make sure that our solemn remembrances don’t ring hollow. We must confront why the American people voted to re-elect Donald Trump despite the events of January 6th. We must re-commit ourselves as the party of the working class. A party that confronts the truths of a changing economy, an expensive healthcare system, and a government that too many Americans see themselves being cut out from. Unless we regain their trust, unless we fight for them, unless we are honest with ourselves – every email or tweet we write on this anniversary will be nothing more than hollow. So, Peter, thank you for standing with me in this fight. Thank you for standing with our democracy, our country, and its people. – Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. subject: My first time speaking on the House floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|

Hi Peter, Last week, I was officially sworn in to represent AZ-03 in the 119th Congress. On the same day, I spoke on the House floor for the first time as a sitting Congresswoman to stand up against House Republicans’ extreme anti-immigration bills that would cut services for undocumented individuals. Don't be fooled, Peter: These bills are nothing more than a ploy to scapegoat hardworking immigrants for the problems House Republicans refuse to solve. Like so many others in AZ-03, I am a proud daughter of immigrant parents who came to the United States for a better life. I know that immigrants are an essential part of our communities and our country. [**I will fight tooth and nail to protect immigrant communities against extreme Republican policies and ensure every person has access to the American Dream. clean_body: | Hi Peter, Last week, I was officially sworn in to represent AZ-03 in the 119th Congress. On the same day, I spoke on the House floor for the first time as a sitting Congresswoman to stand up against House Republicans’ extreme anti-immigration bills that would cut services for undocumented individuals. Don't be fooled, Peter: These bills are nothing more than a ploy to scapegoat hardworking immigrants for the problems House Republicans refuse to solve. Like so many others in AZ-03, I am a proud daughter of immigrant parents who came to the United States for a better life. I know that immigrants are an essential part of our communities and our country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Yassamin Ansari Congresswoman, Arizona’s 3rd District Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

It's January 6th, and lest we forget,Peter: **Donald Trump and his MAGA forces tried to overturn an election.** Now Trump is set to return to office because his hand picked Supreme Court justices undermined the insurrection clause of the 14th Amendment, which should have barred him from holding office again, and sheltered Trump from standing trial for attempting to overturn the 2020 election or for hoarding classified documents. He's back and thanks to that same rigged Supreme Court, the guardrails are off. **Trump even committed to PARDON the January 6 insurgents.** [We cannot let Trump threaten our democracy without a fight. Please chip in right now to power our movement to hold him accountable and elect leaders who fight for us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99970975/521347857/-2122656676?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250106_fr_Jan6_team_pb_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzY2MTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZjkwYjA0LTgyY2MtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nZ1jILzM_IL7IRhV_oPqZ6RHMb0kZ8So6noWggjZCwY=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: John Fetterman
subject: About today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Today Congress did its constitutional duty by certifying the November election results.
#
Derek, today Congress did its constitutional duty by certifying the November election results.
**No fake objections. No rioting. No drama.** It was a pretty big contrast from the last time around, and I was really happy to see that.
Because if we really care about democracy as much as we say we do, we can’t go around calling every election we lose “rigged” and trying to overturn it. We have to be better than that.
But that doesn’t mean I’m going to agree with everything the new administration does. Far from it — I’m completely sure they’re gonna do _a lot_ of things I disagree with.
So over the next four years I’m going to keep fighting for our values. To strengthen unions, protect our rights, and make government work better for working folks in all 67 PA counties.
That’s the kind of leadership Pennsylvanians deserve, and grassroot support from yinz + youse is absolutely crucial to helping me keep it up.
[**So Derek, if you want to keep this seat 🔵 and help me keep fighting for working folks in every corner of PA, please chip in a $5 donation today. It really helps a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250106?refcode=em20250106-9765&refcode2=9765_434096_tslOP4&akid=9765%2E434096%2EtslOP4)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250106?amount=5&refcode=em20250106-9765&refcode2=9765_434096_tslOP4&akid=9765%2E434096%2EtslOP4)**
Thanks,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250106-9765-footer&t=1&refcode2=9765_434096_tslOP4&akid=9765%2E434096%2EtslOP4)**

**Today marks 4 years since MAGA extremists violently attacked the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overthrow the 2020 election.**

Since then, brave American patriots like Adam Schiff and Jamie Raskin investigated the incident on the Jan. 6 Committee to uncover and defeat extremism.

**But the fight is far from over** – Trump is calling insurrectionists “hostages” and threatening to jail members of the Jan. 6 Committee. We can’t let Trump minimize this horrific event and target those who brought his crimes to light!

name: Josh Harder
subject: My reflections on today
body:
January 6th

| | Peter, Today, on the anniversary of January 6th, we fulfilled our congressional duty and certified the results of the 2024 election. I’m writing today to remind us all that 4 years ago it wasn’t so simple. **[I want to share my thoughts and reflections with you and then ask you to help me continue fighting back against MAGA extremism.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99971065/521348236/-31595347?&refcode=E11912-20250106-Jan6Anniversary-SL-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk5MWYwYWYtODJjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J_Eo1yLwwfcH7hwNa94x-GlzUl8sPVyHA8kW3DyVKMQ=)** On the one hand, things look a lot different today than they did 4 years ago. There were no grand speeches lying about voter fraud and thankfully, there was no mob storming the Capitol. Instead, Democrats did our duty, voting to certify the election. Vice President Kamala Harris even presided. **Yet the effects of January 6th are still with us today. When I showed up at the Capitol building this afternoon, there was massive, tall fencing all around us. Our Capitol, and our country, will never be the same after the political violence we experienced four years ago. We can never forget the terror we all felt that day.** And yet, our incoming President has vowed to pardon the rioters who violently attacked police officers and desecrated our nation’s Capital. Marjorie Taylor Greene even called for January 6th to become a “national holiday.” Today I voted to certify the election results for a President I didn’t vote for - because that’s what we do in a democracy. We have some difficult times ahead of us, but I couldn’t feel more strongly that we must stand by our principles while we stand up for our values. **[We need strong leaders in Congress willing to stand up against MAGA extremism and safeguard our democracy. That’s why I’m hoping you will stand with me by making a $25 donation to help me fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99971066/521348237/-31595347?&refcode=E11912-20250106-Jan6Anniversary-SL-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk5MWYwYWYtODJjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J_Eo1yLwwfcH7hwNa94x-GlzUl8sPVyHA8kW3DyVKMQ=)** It’s up to us to hold the line for our democracy. \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. clean_body: January 6th | | Peter, Today, on the anniversary of January 6th, we fulfilled our congressional duty and certified the results of the 2024 election. I’m writing today to remind us all that 4 years ago it wasn’t so simple. = On the one hand, things look a lot different today than they did 4 years ago. There were no grand speeches lying about voter fraud and thankfully, there was no mob storming the Capitol. Instead, Democrats did our duty, voting to certify the election. Vice President Kamala Harris even presided. Yet the effects of January 6th are still with us today. When I showed up at the Capitol building this afternoon, there was massive, tall fencing all around us. Our Capitol, and our country, will never be the same after the political violence we experienced four years ago. We can never forget the terror we all felt that day. And yet, our incoming President has vowed to pardon the rioters who violently attacked police officers and desecrated our nation’s Capital. Marjorie Taylor Greene even called for January 6th to become a “national holiday.” Today I voted to certify the election results for a President I didn’t vote for - because that’s what we do in a democracy. We have some difficult times ahead of us, but I couldn’t feel more strongly that we must stand by our principles while we stand up for our values. = It’s up to us to hold the line for our democracy. \- Josh *

Peter Willis — Today,
January 6th, marks four years since the violent attack on our nation’s
Capitol that changed our democracy forever.

Lives were lost and more than $3 billion in damage was caused — and now

extremists who attempted to put an end to American democracy.

Our Revolution is organizing massive resistance and counter protests for
when the J6 traitors are released. We’re building our Rapid Response Team
in DC to fight the Trump admin and his far right authoritarianism every
step of the way. We need to hire organizers and recruit a mass of

name: Jason Crow
subject: Four years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

January 6th, 2021. Four years ago, we witnessed a dark day in our nation’s history. The United States Capitol was attacked, not by a foreign enemy, but by supporters of President Trump who were unwilling to accept the results of a free and fair election.

I was there that day, in the House gallery. As a violent mob tore through the halls of the Capitol, I thought of my time in combat, standing shoulder to shoulder with my fellow soldiers to defend the ideals of our great country. I also thought of the oath I took when I was sworn into Congress, to support and defend the Constitution of the United States.

Four years later, Congress will vote to certify the first presidential election since this attack. It’s our constitutional duty to do so.

We can never repeat the events of January 6, 2021. We must always fight for our democracy. We must commit to free and fair elections. And we must ensure a peaceful transfer of power, even when we disagree with those elected. Violence can never, ever be the answer to political differences.

In a matter of weeks, Donald Trump will be inaugurated for his second term as president. Even though he won, nobody is above the law and just like when I managed the impeachment trial, we’ll be ready to hold him accountable again.

I’ve never backed down from a fight to defend our nation before, and I’m not going to start now. Whether on the battlefield or in the halls of Congress, I’ve always fought for what’s right — for accountability, democracy, and freedom — and I’ll continue to do so.

In the 119th Congress, I will keep fighting every day for working families, not the richest Americans and the biggest corporations. And I will always work to protect Coloradans from an extreme agenda that seeks to take away fundamental freedoms, deny climate change, and hurt families.

Thank you,

Jason Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

[https://secure.ngpvan.com/5AdTmae3UU6fPeitwGd55w2] We believe that emails are an important way for Jason Crow for Congress to stay in contact with supporters like you. We appreciate any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. You can contact us here [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com?subject=Feedback] with any questions, concerns, or ideas. To receive text updates from Team Crow, join us here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bjvZx6_NWU2fx5btnSgikw2] .

body:

Today is the four year anniversary of the attempted coup that led to the deaths of five people including a police officer.
Now, we’re just 14 days away from Donald Trump returning to the White House. He’s setting his sights on dragging our country backwards on issues from reproductive freedom to common sense gun reform, and so many more.
**We can’t resign to cynicism.** We must continue to work to elect Democrats in Texas who will stand up to Trump’s MAGA extremism. We’re in this work for the long haul but we need your support to keep the lights on.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: 40 reasons to open this email
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5721d9c54dd0416c82bc583b02d156b0&_e=MBSCGLd0xCz2qAsZDLTbmo_php3yBOG5OybpVNd_qmYUhm6djDJhOZBRoOCUBWpKtosg1R22V_mU6lmhIAJUBum0S2Vut8_N41VIX8X9_ZgQUTHJLzMM_cbhT8x9TDNPisb4aYqo3ruvjPEg_KFftB6yLcUsZIPiWCjvqowVjB_I1-_4_7pppZ-oGJibsU4ZLgM6KMsJSzonddniDIy76W4kAJuTMssn5TeB5qZAMMLfNvTdF6KNKoq5AXC0k2wXn2Bpp-a206QWX6wtTs2pqT8u0dpgn6XfjpP2GipMAHhqtvoXUDsEjrkCX0tugtXVqApx4uBqo0kL8HVN32xejIM1idpGNnlwhHGHUlgB4sIkhkb4uMIsYkw_fcAWVsHHX56kCS4A2iVvJIUP9TZq1vhZy92rKzrWCqz5o_9qLe0%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Peter,

Most children know very little about the dangers of socialism.

In today's government schools, preaching socialist propaganda has replaced learning about the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

Libertas Network is dedicated to changing hearts, minds, and laws to build a freer society. But if we are going to build a freer society, the next generation must know about how socialism actually robs them of their liberty.

I wrote _**The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths**_ for this exact purpose.

[If you donate $5 or more to The Tuttle Twins today, then I will send you a copy of _The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths_. Click here to donate >>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5721d9c54dd0416c82bc583b02d156b0&_e=MBSCGLd0xCz2qAsZDLTbmo_php3yBOG5OybpVNd_qmYUhm6djDJhOZBRoOCUBWpKtosg1R22V_mU6lmhIAJUBum0S2Vut8_N41VIX8X9_ZgQUTHJLzMM_cbhT8x9TDNPisb4aYqo3ruvjPEg_KFftB6yLcUsZIPiWCjvqowVjB_I1-_4_7pppZ-oGJibsU4ZLgM6KMsJSzonddniDIy76W4kAJuTMssn5TeB5qZAMMJrZA_M1fRUuRX5JRXf_Azxo24cDrFprffPwqTAkNL9DEiD7FMWuVDx-5_Q0b3J3BTNs2Od4eSEAl6G0xfGM1QNUeoCF-Ksr1IhOi_uUUbZA1b1Mn3wYIfAr1o7y14O9Dg-aBef5NEJwJKiqcpZNivqUDdjfK7ydHGVHvYkxhn9LFp_oeNFbQSgPKE5tUN_nG0%3D)

Extremism in defense of your kids from radical ideologies is no vice.

We're building a new culture to challenge the many falsehoods making their way through our schools and our society. If you want to combat the forces of socialism -- you'll want to read this book.

This 115-page e-book contains rebuttals to 20 economic myths and 20 political myths. _With each one, we offer a simple analysis of why the particular myth is wrong_.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5721d9c54dd0416c82bc583b02d156b0&_e=MBSCGLd0xCz2qAsZDLTbmo_php3yBOG5OybpVNd_qmYUhm6djDJhOZBRoOCUBWpKtosg1R22V_mU6lmhIAJUBum0S2Vut8_N41VIX8X9_ZgQUTHJLzMM_cbhT8x9TDNPisb4aYqo3ruvjPEg_KFftB6yLcUsZIPiWCjvqowVjB_I1-_4_7pppZ-oGJibsU4ZLgM6KMsJSzonddniDIy76W4kAJuTMssn5TeB5qZAMMKZgJ_SNRuTeaUhpk0kWFkBV3QitDCbi2x5mxyJYBhPEM02XXHIXIHU7Q4uXsChyGDifYSggJ8KCIUrPBFLnWOhmwnjMGIL_OFuDkHzrgGjfAFFEsU3kg8LlhlBiOHJLjXBP7RO-U_R7sXDmtRZ9hsqjD7dzHSW8W0CUs3Ig8KV2aKjKHIXQkak8OpJztf1FZs%3D)

As an exclusive offer to our generous supporters, I want to provide you with the ideas and arguments that will enable you and your children to better understand the way the world works and combat the many falsehoods that its people cling to.

name: Jena Griswold
subject: The weight of January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com [https://jenaforcolorado.com]
Peter,
Today, Congress certified the results of the 2024 Presidential election. We must not take for granted this process and the peaceful transfer of power.
We also cannot forget the truth of Jan. 6, 2021. On that day, violent insurrectionists stormed the Capitol to try to overturn the election; to steal the presidency from the American people. Despite their efforts, our institutions held and democracy prevailed.
Let us use today as a reminder that we must work together to defend free and fair elections every day.
– Jena Griswold

clean_body: [] Peter, Today, Congress certified the results of the 2024 Presidential election. We must not take for granted this process and the peaceful transfer of power. We also cannot forget the truth of Jan. 6, 2021. On that day, violent insurrectionists stormed the Capitol to try to overturn the election; to steal the presidency from the American people. Despite their efforts, our institutions held and democracy prevailed. Let us use today as a reminder that we must work together to defend free and fair elections every day. – Jena Griswold Follow Jena Online: [] [] [] Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent. Jena for Colorado P.O. | I just got a new opponent, team. MAGA Michael Markey, who ran last cycle, is counting on the red wave to propel him to victory this time.

I have critically important work to do in Washington. And he’s counting on the fact that I’ll be so focused on my job, I’ll take my eyes off the 2026 midterms.

With Trump taking office later this month, it’s no surprise Republicans are feeling emboldened to gain even more ground in 2026. But, we’ve defied the odds and won re-election in a historically red district and a top target by national Republicans. I know we can build the foundation to do so again.

But I can’t take my eyes off my work in Congress. As I work to make progress on the issues that matter most to us, from protecting reproductive access nationwide to expanding access to affordable healthcare, I’ll also be working to fight back and protect our democracy. I can’t waste a single second.

[_**That’s why I’m asking for your support. Anything you can give today, $3 or $5, will help me dedicate more time to working on the issues we care about most.
